chrome/linux-149.0.7827.155/chrome-linux64/chrome-wrapper:#!/bin/bash
chrome/linux-149.0.7827.155/chrome-linux64/chrome-wrapper:
chrome/linux-149.0.7827.155/chrome-linux64/chrome-wrapper:# Copyright 2011 The Chromium Authors
chrome/linux-149.0.7827.155/chrome-linux64/chrome-wrapper:# Use of this source code is governed by a BSD-style license that can be
chrome/linux-149.0.7827.155/chrome-linux64/chrome-wrapper:# found in the LICENSE file.
chrome/linux-149.0.7827.155/chrome-linux64/chrome-wrapper:
chrome/linux-149.0.7827.155/chrome-linux64/chrome-wrapper:# Running Chromium via this script makes it possible to set Chromium as the
chrome/linux-149.0.7827.155/chrome-linux64/chrome-wrapper:# default browser directly out of a compile, without needing to package it.
chrome/linux-149.0.7827.155/chrome-linux64/chrome-wrapper:
chrome/linux-149.0.7827.155/chrome-linux64/chrome-wrapper:DESKTOP="chromium-devel"
chrome/linux-149.0.7827.155/chrome-linux64/chrome-wrapper:TITLE="Chromium"
chrome/linux-149.0.7827.155/chrome-linux64/chrome-wrapper:
chrome/linux-149.0.7827.155/chrome-linux64/chrome-wrapper:usage() {
chrome/linux-149.0.7827.155/chrome-linux64/chrome-wrapper:  echo "$0 [--gdb] [--help] [--man-page] [--] [chrome-options]"
chrome/linux-149.0.7827.155/chrome-linux64/chrome-wrapper:  echo
chrome/linux-149.0.7827.155/chrome-linux64/chrome-wrapper:  echo "        --gdb                   Start within gdb"
chrome/linux-149.0.7827.155/chrome-linux64/chrome-wrapper:  echo "        --help                  This help screen"
chrome/linux-149.0.7827.155/chrome-linux64/chrome-wrapper:  echo "        --man-page              Open the man page in the tree"
chrome/linux-149.0.7827.155/chrome-linux64/chrome-wrapper:}
chrome/linux-149.0.7827.155/chrome-linux64/chrome-wrapper:
chrome/linux-149.0.7827.155/chrome-linux64/chrome-wrapper:# Check to see if there is a desktop file of the given name.
chrome/linux-149.0.7827.155/chrome-linux64/chrome-wrapper:exists_desktop_file() {
chrome/linux-149.0.7827.155/chrome-linux64/chrome-wrapper:    # Build a search list from $XDG_DATA_HOME and $XDG_DATA_DIRS, the latter
chrome/linux-149.0.7827.155/chrome-linux64/chrome-wrapper:    # of which can itself be a colon-separated list of directories to search.
chrome/linux-149.0.7827.155/chrome-linux64/chrome-wrapper:    search="${XDG_DATA_HOME:-$HOME/.local/share}:${XDG_DATA_DIRS:-/usr/local/share:/usr/share}"
chrome/linux-149.0.7827.155/chrome-linux64/chrome-wrapper:    IFS=:
chrome/linux-149.0.7827.155/chrome-linux64/chrome-wrapper:    for dir in $search; do
chrome/linux-149.0.7827.155/chrome-linux64/chrome-wrapper:        unset IFS
chrome/linux-149.0.7827.155/chrome-linux64/chrome-wrapper:        [ "$dir" -a -d "$dir/applications" ] || continue
chrome/linux-149.0.7827.155/chrome-linux64/chrome-wrapper:        [ -r "$dir/applications/$DESKTOP.desktop" ] && return
chrome/linux-149.0.7827.155/chrome-linux64/chrome-wrapper:    done
chrome/linux-149.0.7827.155/chrome-linux64/chrome-wrapper:    # Didn't find it in the search path.
chrome/linux-149.0.7827.155/chrome-linux64/chrome-wrapper:    return 1
chrome/linux-149.0.7827.155/chrome-linux64/chrome-wrapper:}
chrome/linux-149.0.7827.155/chrome-linux64/chrome-wrapper:
chrome/linux-149.0.7827.155/chrome-linux64/chrome-wrapper:# Checks a file to see if it's a 32 or 64-bit.
chrome/linux-149.0.7827.155/chrome-linux64/chrome-wrapper:check_executable() {
chrome/linux-149.0.7827.155/chrome-linux64/chrome-wrapper:    out=$(file $(readlink -f $1) 2> /dev/null)
chrome/linux-149.0.7827.155/chrome-linux64/chrome-wrapper:    echo $out | grep -qs "ELF 32-bit LSB"
chrome/linux-149.0.7827.155/chrome-linux64/chrome-wrapper:    if [ $? = 0 ]; then
chrome/linux-149.0.7827.155/chrome-linux64/chrome-wrapper:        echo 32
chrome/linux-149.0.7827.155/chrome-linux64/chrome-wrapper:        return
chrome/linux-149.0.7827.155/chrome-linux64/chrome-wrapper:    fi
chrome/linux-149.0.7827.155/chrome-linux64/chrome-wrapper:    echo $out | grep -qs "ELF 64-bit LSB"
chrome/linux-149.0.7827.155/chrome-linux64/chrome-wrapper:    if [ $? = 0 ]; then
chrome/linux-149.0.7827.155/chrome-linux64/chrome-wrapper:        echo 64
chrome/linux-149.0.7827.155/chrome-linux64/chrome-wrapper:        return
chrome/linux-149.0.7827.155/chrome-linux64/chrome-wrapper:    fi
chrome/linux-149.0.7827.155/chrome-linux64/chrome-wrapper:    echo neither
chrome/linux-149.0.7827.155/chrome-linux64/chrome-wrapper:}
chrome/linux-149.0.7827.155/chrome-linux64/chrome-wrapper:
chrome/linux-149.0.7827.155/chrome-linux64/chrome-wrapper:# Generate a desktop file that will run this script.
chrome/linux-149.0.7827.155/chrome-linux64/chrome-wrapper:generate_desktop_file() {
chrome/linux-149.0.7827.155/chrome-linux64/chrome-wrapper:    apps="${XDG_DATA_HOME:-$HOME/.local/share}/applications"
chrome/linux-149.0.7827.155/chrome-linux64/chrome-wrapper:    mkdir -p "$apps"
chrome/linux-149.0.7827.155/chrome-linux64/chrome-wrapper:    cat > "$apps/$DESKTOP.desktop" << EOF
chrome/linux-149.0.7827.155/chrome-linux64/chrome-wrapper:[Desktop Entry]
chrome/linux-149.0.7827.155/chrome-linux64/chrome-wrapper:Version=1.0
chrome/linux-149.0.7827.155/chrome-linux64/chrome-wrapper:Encoding=UTF-8
chrome/linux-149.0.7827.155/chrome-linux64/chrome-wrapper:Name=$TITLE
chrome/linux-149.0.7827.155/chrome-linux64/chrome-wrapper:Exec=$CHROME_WRAPPER %U
chrome/linux-149.0.7827.155/chrome-linux64/chrome-wrapper:Terminal=false
chrome/linux-149.0.7827.155/chrome-linux64/chrome-wrapper:Icon=$HERE/product_logo_48.png
chrome/linux-149.0.7827.155/chrome-linux64/chrome-wrapper:Type=Application
chrome/linux-149.0.7827.155/chrome-linux64/chrome-wrapper:Categories=Application;Network;WebBrowser;
chrome/linux-149.0.7827.155/chrome-linux64/chrome-wrapper:MimeType=text/html;text/xml;application/xhtml_xml;
chrome/linux-149.0.7827.155/chrome-linux64/chrome-wrapper:EOF
chrome/linux-149.0.7827.155/chrome-linux64/chrome-wrapper:}
chrome/linux-149.0.7827.155/chrome-linux64/chrome-wrapper:
chrome/linux-149.0.7827.155/chrome-linux64/chrome-wrapper:# Let the wrapped binary know that it has been run through the wrapper.
chrome/linux-149.0.7827.155/chrome-linux64/chrome-wrapper:export CHROME_WRAPPER="`readlink -f "$0"`"
chrome/linux-149.0.7827.155/chrome-linux64/chrome-wrapper:export CHROME_DESKTOP="$DESKTOP.desktop"
chrome/linux-149.0.7827.155/chrome-linux64/chrome-wrapper:
chrome/linux-149.0.7827.155/chrome-linux64/chrome-wrapper:HERE="`dirname "$CHROME_WRAPPER"`"
chrome/linux-149.0.7827.155/chrome-linux64/chrome-wrapper:
chrome/linux-149.0.7827.155/chrome-linux64/chrome-wrapper:# Use system xdg utilities. But first create mimeapps.list if it doesn't
chrome/linux-149.0.7827.155/chrome-linux64/chrome-wrapper:# exist; some systems have bugs in xdg-mime that make it fail without it.
chrome/linux-149.0.7827.155/chrome-linux64/chrome-wrapper:xdg_app_dir="${XDG_DATA_HOME:-$HOME/.local/share/applications}"
chrome/linux-149.0.7827.155/chrome-linux64/chrome-wrapper:mkdir -p "$xdg_app_dir"
chrome/linux-149.0.7827.155/chrome-linux64/chrome-wrapper:[ -f "$xdg_app_dir/mimeapps.list" ] || touch "$xdg_app_dir/mimeapps.list"
chrome/linux-149.0.7827.155/chrome-linux64/chrome-wrapper:
chrome/linux-149.0.7827.155/chrome-linux64/chrome-wrapper:# Always use our ffmpeg and other shared libs.
chrome/linux-149.0.7827.155/chrome-linux64/chrome-wrapper:export LD_LIBRARY_PATH="$HERE:$HERE/lib:$HERE/lib.target${LD_LIBRARY_PATH:+:${LD_LIBRARY_PATH}}"
chrome/linux-149.0.7827.155/chrome-linux64/chrome-wrapper:
chrome/linux-149.0.7827.155/chrome-linux64/chrome-wrapper:MISSING_LIBS=$(ldd "$HERE/chrome" 2> /dev/null |grep "not found$" | cut -d" " -f 1|sed 's/\t//')
chrome/linux-149.0.7827.155/chrome-linux64/chrome-wrapper:CHROME_ARCH=$(check_executable "$HERE/chrome")
chrome/linux-149.0.7827.155/chrome-linux64/chrome-wrapper:uname -m | grep -qs x86_64
chrome/linux-149.0.7827.155/chrome-linux64/chrome-wrapper:if [ $? = 1 ]; then
chrome/linux-149.0.7827.155/chrome-linux64/chrome-wrapper:    LIBDIRS="/lib /lib32 /usr/lib /usr/lib32"
chrome/linux-149.0.7827.155/chrome-linux64/chrome-wrapper:else
chrome/linux-149.0.7827.155/chrome-linux64/chrome-wrapper:    LIBDIRS="/lib64 /lib /usr/lib64 /usr/lib"
chrome/linux-149.0.7827.155/chrome-linux64/chrome-wrapper:fi
chrome/linux-149.0.7827.155/chrome-linux64/chrome-wrapper:
chrome/linux-149.0.7827.155/chrome-linux64/chrome-wrapper:echo $MISSING_LIBS | grep -qs libbz2.so.1.0
chrome/linux-149.0.7827.155/chrome-linux64/chrome-wrapper:if [ $? = 0 ]; then
chrome/linux-149.0.7827.155/chrome-linux64/chrome-wrapper:    for dir in $LIBDIRS
chrome/linux-149.0.7827.155/chrome-linux64/chrome-wrapper:    do
chrome/linux-149.0.7827.155/chrome-linux64/chrome-wrapper:        if [ -e "$dir/libbz2.so.1" ]; then
chrome/linux-149.0.7827.155/chrome-linux64/chrome-wrapper:            LIB_ARCH=$(check_executable "$dir/libbz2.so.1")
chrome/linux-149.0.7827.155/chrome-linux64/chrome-wrapper:            if [ "$CHROME_ARCH" = "$LIB_ARCH" ]; then
chrome/linux-149.0.7827.155/chrome-linux64/chrome-wrapper:                ln -snf "$dir/libbz2.so.1" "$HERE/libbz2.so.1.0"
chrome/linux-149.0.7827.155/chrome-linux64/chrome-wrapper:                break;
chrome/linux-149.0.7827.155/chrome-linux64/chrome-wrapper:            fi
chrome/linux-149.0.7827.155/chrome-linux64/chrome-wrapper:        fi
chrome/linux-149.0.7827.155/chrome-linux64/chrome-wrapper:    done
chrome/linux-149.0.7827.155/chrome-linux64/chrome-wrapper:fi
chrome/linux-149.0.7827.155/chrome-linux64/chrome-wrapper:
chrome/linux-149.0.7827.155/chrome-linux64/chrome-wrapper:for lib in libnspr4.so.0d libnss3.so.1d libnssutil3.so.1d libplc4.so.0d libplds4.so.0d libsmime3.so.1d libssl3.so.1d
chrome/linux-149.0.7827.155/chrome-linux64/chrome-wrapper:do
chrome/linux-149.0.7827.155/chrome-linux64/chrome-wrapper:    echo $MISSING_LIBS | grep -qs $lib
chrome/linux-149.0.7827.155/chrome-linux64/chrome-wrapper:    if [ $? = 0 ]; then
chrome/linux-149.0.7827.155/chrome-linux64/chrome-wrapper:        reallib=$(echo $lib | sed 's/\.[01]d$//')
chrome/linux-149.0.7827.155/chrome-linux64/chrome-wrapper:        for dir in $LIBDIRS
chrome/linux-149.0.7827.155/chrome-linux64/chrome-wrapper:        do
chrome/linux-149.0.7827.155/chrome-linux64/chrome-wrapper:            if [ -e "$dir/$reallib" ]; then
chrome/linux-149.0.7827.155/chrome-linux64/chrome-wrapper:                LIB_ARCH=$(check_executable "$dir/$reallib")
chrome/linux-149.0.7827.155/chrome-linux64/chrome-wrapper:                if [ "$CHROME_ARCH" = "$LIB_ARCH" ]; then
chrome/linux-149.0.7827.155/chrome-linux64/chrome-wrapper:                    ln -snf "$dir/$reallib" "$HERE/$lib"
chrome/linux-149.0.7827.155/chrome-linux64/chrome-wrapper:                    break;
chrome/linux-149.0.7827.155/chrome-linux64/chrome-wrapper:                fi
chrome/linux-149.0.7827.155/chrome-linux64/chrome-wrapper:            fi
chrome/linux-149.0.7827.155/chrome-linux64/chrome-wrapper:        done
chrome/linux-149.0.7827.155/chrome-linux64/chrome-wrapper:    fi
chrome/linux-149.0.7827.155/chrome-linux64/chrome-wrapper:done
chrome/linux-149.0.7827.155/chrome-linux64/chrome-wrapper:
chrome/linux-149.0.7827.155/chrome-linux64/chrome-wrapper:# Custom version string for this release. This can be used to add a downstream
chrome/linux-149.0.7827.155/chrome-linux64/chrome-wrapper:# vendor string or release channel information.
chrome/linux-149.0.7827.155/chrome-linux64/chrome-wrapper:export CHROME_VERSION_EXTRA="custom"
chrome/linux-149.0.7827.155/chrome-linux64/chrome-wrapper:
chrome/linux-149.0.7827.155/chrome-linux64/chrome-wrapper:exists_desktop_file || generate_desktop_file
chrome/linux-149.0.7827.155/chrome-linux64/chrome-wrapper:
chrome/linux-149.0.7827.155/chrome-linux64/chrome-wrapper:CMD_PREFIX=
chrome/linux-149.0.7827.155/chrome-linux64/chrome-wrapper:ARGS=()
chrome/linux-149.0.7827.155/chrome-linux64/chrome-wrapper:while [ "$#" -gt 0 ]; do
chrome/linux-149.0.7827.155/chrome-linux64/chrome-wrapper:    case "$1" in
chrome/linux-149.0.7827.155/chrome-linux64/chrome-wrapper:    "--")
chrome/linux-149.0.7827.155/chrome-linux64/chrome-wrapper:        shift
chrome/linux-149.0.7827.155/chrome-linux64/chrome-wrapper:        break ;;
chrome/linux-149.0.7827.155/chrome-linux64/chrome-wrapper:    "--gdb")
chrome/linux-149.0.7827.155/chrome-linux64/chrome-wrapper:        CMD_PREFIX="gdb --args" ;;
chrome/linux-149.0.7827.155/chrome-linux64/chrome-wrapper:    "--help")
chrome/linux-149.0.7827.155/chrome-linux64/chrome-wrapper:        usage
chrome/linux-149.0.7827.155/chrome-linux64/chrome-wrapper:        exit 0 ;;
chrome/linux-149.0.7827.155/chrome-linux64/chrome-wrapper:    "--man-page")
chrome/linux-149.0.7827.155/chrome-linux64/chrome-wrapper:        exec man "$HERE/../../chrome/app/resources/manpage.1.in" ;;
chrome/linux-149.0.7827.155/chrome-linux64/chrome-wrapper:    *)
chrome/linux-149.0.7827.155/chrome-linux64/chrome-wrapper:        ARGS=( "${ARGS[@]}" "$1" ) ;;
chrome/linux-149.0.7827.155/chrome-linux64/chrome-wrapper:    esac
chrome/linux-149.0.7827.155/chrome-linux64/chrome-wrapper:    shift
chrome/linux-149.0.7827.155/chrome-linux64/chrome-wrapper:done
chrome/linux-149.0.7827.155/chrome-linux64/chrome-wrapper:set -- "${ARGS[@]}" "$@"
chrome/linux-149.0.7827.155/chrome-linux64/chrome-wrapper:
chrome/linux-149.0.7827.155/chrome-linux64/chrome-wrapper:exec $CMD_PREFIX "$HERE/chrome" "$@"

tmplogin/plugins/premium.py:async def add_premium_handler(event):

tmplogin/plugins/premium.py:        await event.respond(
tmplogin/plugins/premium.py:            'This command can only be used in private chats for security reasons.'
tmplogin/plugins/premium.py:            )
tmplogin/plugins/premium.py:        return
tmplogin/plugins/premium.py:    """Handle /add command to add premium users (owner only)"""
tmplogin/plugins/premium.py:    user_id = event.sender_id
tmplogin/plugins/premium.py:    if user_id not in OWNER_ID:
tmplogin/plugins/premium.py:        await event.respond('This command is restricted to the bot owner.')
tmplogin/plugins/premium.py:        return

tmplogin/plugins/premium.py:    parts = text.split(' ')
tmplogin/plugins/premium.py:    if len(parts) != 4:
tmplogin/plugins/premium.py:        await event.respond(
tmplogin/plugins/premium.py:            """Invalid format. Use: /add user_id duration_value duration_unit
tmplogin/plugins/premium.py:Example: /add 123456 1 week"""
tmplogin/plugins/premium.py:            )
tmplogin/plugins/premium.py:        return
tmplogin/plugins/premium.py:    try:
tmplogin/plugins/premium.py:        target_user_id = int(parts[1])
tmplogin/plugins/premium.py:        duration_value = int(parts[2])
tmplogin/plugins/premium.py:        duration_unit = parts[3].lower()
tmplogin/plugins/premium.py:        valid_units = ['min', 'hours', 'days', 'weeks', 'month', 'year',
tmplogin/plugins/premium.py:            'decades']
tmplogin/plugins/premium.py:        if duration_unit not in valid_units:
tmplogin/plugins/premium.py:            await event.respond(
tmplogin/plugins/premium.py:                f"Invalid duration unit. Choose from: {', '.join(valid_units)}"
tmplogin/plugins/premium.py:                )
tmplogin/plugins/premium.py:            return
tmplogin/plugins/premium.py:        success, result = await add_premium_user(target_user_id,
tmplogin/plugins/premium.py:            duration_value, duration_unit)
tmplogin/plugins/premium.py:        if success:
tmplogin/plugins/premium.py:            expiry_utc = result
tmplogin/plugins/premium.py:            expiry_ist = expiry_utc + timedelta(hours=5, minutes=30)
tmplogin/plugins/premium.py:            formatted_expiry = expiry_ist.strftime('%d-%b-%Y %I:%M:%S %p')
tmplogin/plugins/premium.py:            await event.respond(
tmplogin/plugins/premium.py:                f"""✅ User {target_user_id} added as premium member
tmplogin/plugins/premium.py:Subscription valid until: {formatted_expiry} (IST)"""
tmplogin/plugins/premium.py:                )
tmplogin/plugins/premium.py:            await bot_client.send_message(target_user_id,
tmplogin/plugins/premium.py:                f"""✅ Your have been added as premium member
tmplogin/plugins/premium.py:**Validity upto**: {formatted_expiry} (IST)"""
tmplogin/plugins/premium.py:                )
tmplogin/plugins/premium.py:        else:
tmplogin/plugins/premium.py:            await event.respond(f'❌ Failed to add premium user: {result}')
tmplogin/plugins/premium.py:    except ValueError:
tmplogin/plugins/premium.py:        await event.respond(
tmplogin/plugins/premium.py:            'Invalid user ID or duration value. Both must be integers.')
tmplogin/plugins/premium.py:    except Exception as e:
tmplogin/plugins/premium.py:        await event.respond(f'Error: {str(e)}')

tmplogin/plugins/batch.py:async def prog(c, t, C, h, m, st):
tmplogin/plugins/batch.py:    global P
tmplogin/plugins/batch.py:    p = c / t * 100
tmplogin/plugins/batch.py:    interval = 10 if t >= 100 * 1024 * 1024 else 20 if t >= 50 * 1024 * 1024 else 30 if t >= 10 * 1024 * 1024 else 50
tmplogin/plugins/batch.py:    step = int(p // interval) * interval
tmplogin/plugins/batch.py:    if m not in P or P[m] != step or p >= 100:
tmplogin/plugins/batch.py:        P[m] = step
tmplogin/plugins/batch.py:        c_mb = c / (1024 * 1024)
tmplogin/plugins/batch.py:        t_mb = t / (1024 * 1024)
tmplogin/plugins/batch.py:        bar = '🟢' * int(p / 10) + '🔴' * (10 - int(p / 10))
tmplogin/plugins/batch.py:        speed = c / (time.time() - st) / (1024 * 1024) if time.time() > st else 0
tmplogin/plugins/batch.py:        eta = time.strftime('%M:%S', time.gmtime((t - c) / (speed * 1024 * 1024))) if speed > 0 else '00:00'
tmplogin/plugins/batch.py:        await C.edit_message_text(h, m, f"__**Pyro Handler...**__\n\n{bar}\n\n⚡**__Completed__**: {c_mb:.2f} MB / {t_mb:.2f} MB\n📊 **__Done__**: {p:.2f}%\n🚀 **__Speed__**: {speed:.2f} MB/s\n⏳ **__ETA__**: {eta}\n\n**__Powered by Team SPY__**")
tmplogin/plugins/batch.py:        if p >= 100: P.pop(m, None)
tmplogin/plugins/batch.py:
tmplogin/plugins/batch.py:async def send_direct(c, m, tcid, ft=None, rtmid=None):
tmplogin/plugins/batch.py:    try:
tmplogin/plugins/batch.py:        if m.video:
tmplogin/plugins/batch.py:            await c.send_video(tcid, m.video.file_id, caption=ft, duration=m.video.duration, width=m.video.width, height=m.video.height, reply_to_message_id=rtmid)
tmplogin/plugins/batch.py:        elif m.video_note:
tmplogin/plugins/batch.py:            await c.send_video_note(tcid, m.video_note.file_id, reply_to_message_id=rtmid)
tmplogin/plugins/batch.py:        elif m.voice:
tmplogin/plugins/batch.py:            await c.send_voice(tcid, m.voice.file_id, reply_to_message_id=rtmid)
tmplogin/plugins/batch.py:        elif m.sticker:
tmplogin/plugins/batch.py:            await c.send_sticker(tcid, m.sticker.file_id, reply_to_message_id=rtmid)
tmplogin/plugins/batch.py:        elif m.audio:
tmplogin/plugins/batch.py:            await c.send_audio(tcid, m.audio.file_id, caption=ft, duration=m.audio.duration, performer=m.audio.performer, title=m.audio.title, reply_to_message_id=rtmid)
tmplogin/plugins/batch.py:        elif m.photo:
tmplogin/plugins/batch.py:            photo_id = m.photo.file_id if hasattr(m.photo, 'file_id') else m.photo[-1].file_id
tmplogin/plugins/batch.py:            await c.send_photo(tcid, photo_id, caption=ft, reply_to_message_id=rtmid)
tmplogin/plugins/batch.py:        elif m.document:
tmplogin/plugins/batch.py:            await c.send_document(tcid, m.document.file_id, caption=ft, file_name=m.document.file_name, reply_to_message_id=rtmid)
tmplogin/plugins/batch.py:        else:
tmplogin/plugins/batch.py:            return False
tmplogin/plugins/batch.py:        return True
tmplogin/plugins/batch.py:    except Exception as e:
tmplogin/plugins/batch.py:        print(f'Direct send error: {e}')
tmplogin/plugins/batch.py:        return False

tmplogin/plugins/batch.py:async def process_msg(c, u, m, d, lt, uid, i):
tmplogin/plugins/batch.py:    try:
tmplogin/plugins/batch.py:        cfg_chat = await get_user_data_key(d, 'chat_id', None)
tmplogin/plugins/batch.py:        tcid = d
tmplogin/plugins/batch.py:        rtmid = None
tmplogin/plugins/batch.py:        if cfg_chat:
tmplogin/plugins/batch.py:            if '/' in cfg_chat:
tmplogin/plugins/batch.py:                parts = cfg_chat.split('/', 1)
tmplogin/plugins/batch.py:                tcid = int(parts[0])
tmplogin/plugins/batch.py:                rtmid = int(parts[1]) if len(parts) > 1 else None
tmplogin/plugins/batch.py:            else:
tmplogin/plugins/batch.py:                tcid = int(cfg_chat)
tmplogin/plugins/batch.py:        
tmplogin/plugins/batch.py:        if m.media:
tmplogin/plugins/batch.py:            orig_text = m.caption.markdown if m.caption else ''
tmplogin/plugins/batch.py:            proc_text = await process_text_with_rules(d, orig_text)
tmplogin/plugins/batch.py:            user_cap = await get_user_data_key(d, 'caption', '')
tmplogin/plugins/batch.py:            ft = f'{proc_text}\n\n{user_cap}' if proc_text and user_cap else user_cap if user_cap else proc_text
tmplogin/plugins/batch.py:            
tmplogin/plugins/batch.py:            if lt == 'public' and not emp.get(i, False):
tmplogin/plugins/batch.py:                await send_direct(c, m, tcid, ft, rtmid)

tmplogin/plugins/batch.py:                            success += 1

tmplogin/plugins/batch.py:                        pass
tmplogin/plugins/batch.py:                except Exception as e:

tmplogin/plugins/batch.py:                    except: pass

tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:def d_thumbnail(thumbnail_url, save_path):
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:    try:
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:        response = requests.get(thumbnail_url, stream=True)
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:        response.raise_for_status()
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:        with open(save_path, 'wb') as f:
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:            for chunk in response.iter_content(chunk_size=8192):
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:                f.write(chunk)
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:        return save_path
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:    except requests.exceptions.RequestException as e:
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:        logger.error(f"Failed to download thumbnail: {e}")
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:        return None

tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:    async with aiohttp.ClientSession() as session:
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:        async with session.get(url) as response:
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:            if response.status == 200:
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:                with open(path, 'wb') as f:
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:                    f.write(await response.read())

tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:    characters = string.ascii_letters + string.digits
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:    return ''.join(random.choice(characters) for _ in range(length))

tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:            temp_cookie_file.write(cookies)
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:            temp_cookie_path = temp_cookie_file.name
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py: 
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:    start_time = time.time()
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:    random_filename = f"@team_spy_pro_{event.sender_id}"

tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:    ydl_opts = {
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:        'format': 'bestaudio/best',
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:        'outtmpl': f"{random_filename}.%(ext)s",
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:        'cookiefile': temp_cookie_path,
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:        'postprocessors': [{'key': 'FFmpegExtractAudio', 'preferredcodec': 'mp3', 'preferredquality': '192'}],
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:        'quiet': False,
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:        'noplaylist': True,
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:    }
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:    prog = None
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py: 
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:    progress_message = await event.reply("**__Starting audio extraction...__**")
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py: 
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:    try:
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:         
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:        info_dict = await extract_audio_async(ydl_opts, url)
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:        title = info_dict.get('title', 'Extracted Audio')
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py: 
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:        await progress_message.edit("**__Editing metadata...__**")
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py: 
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:         
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:        if os.path.exists(download_path):
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:            def edit_metadata():
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:                audio_file = MP3(download_path, ID3=ID3)
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:                try:
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:                    audio_file.add_tags()
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:                except Exception:
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:                    pass
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:                audio_file.tags["TIT2"] = TIT2(encoding=3, text=title)
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:                audio_file.tags["TPE1"] = TPE1(encoding=3, text="Team SPY")
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:                audio_file.tags["COMM"] = COMM(encoding=3, lang="eng", desc="Comment", text="Processed by Team SPY")
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py: 
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:                thumbnail_url = info_dict.get('thumbnail')
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:                if thumbnail_url:
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:                    thumbnail_path = os.path.join(tempfile.gettempdir(), "thumb.jpg")

tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:                        audio_file.tags["APIC"] = APIC(
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:                            encoding=3, mime='image/jpeg', type=3, desc='Cover', data=img.read()
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:                        )
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:                    os.remove(thumbnail_path)
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:                audio_file.save()
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py: 
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:            await asyncio.to_thread(edit_metadata)

tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:

tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:

tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:        if os.path.exists(download_path):
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:            await progress_message.delete()

tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:            )

tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:    except Exception as e:
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:        logger.exception("Error during audio extraction or upload")
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:        await event.reply(f"**__An error occurred: {e}__**")

tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:            os.remove(download_path)
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:        if temp_cookie_path and os.path.exists(temp_cookie_path):
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:            os.remove(temp_cookie_path)

tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:@client.on(events.NewMessage(pattern="/adl"))
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:async def handler(event):
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:    user_id = event.sender_id
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:    if user_id in ongoing_downloads:
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:        await event.reply("**You already have an ongoing download. Please wait until it completes!**")
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:        return
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py: 
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:    if len(event.message.text.split()) < 2:
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:        await event.reply("**Usage:** `/adl <video-link>`\n\nPlease provide a valid video link!")
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:        return    
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py: 
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:    url = event.message.text.split()[1]
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:    ongoing_downloads[user_id] = True
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py: 
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:    try:
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:        if "instagram.com" in url:
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:            await process_audio(client, event, url, cookies_env_var="INSTA_COOKIES")
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:        elif "youtube.com" in url or "youtu.be" in url:
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:            await process_audio(client, event, url, cookies_env_var="YT_COOKIES")
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:        else:
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:            await process_audio(client, event, url)
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:    except Exception as e:
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:        await event.reply(f"**An error occurred:** `{e}`")
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:    finally:
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:        ongoing_downloads.pop(user_id, None)

tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:async def fetch_video_info(url, ydl_opts, progress_message, check_duration_and_size):
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:    with yt_dlp.YoutubeDL(ydl_opts) as ydl:
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:        info_dict = ydl.extract_info(url, download=False)
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py: 
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:        if check_duration_and_size:
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:             
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:            duration = info_dict.get('duration', 0)
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:            if duration and duration > 3 * 3600:   
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:                await progress_message.edit("**❌ __Video is longer than 3 hours. Download aborted...__**")
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:                return None
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py: 
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:             
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:            estimated_size = info_dict.get('filesize_approx', 0)
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:            if estimated_size and estimated_size > 2 * 1024 * 1024 * 1024:   
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:                await progress_message.edit("**🤞 __Video size is larger than 2GB. Aborting download.__**")
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:                return None
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py: 
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:        return info_dict

tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:        return

tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:        elif "youtube.com" in url or "youtu.be" in url:

tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py: 
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:user_progress = {}
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py: 
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:def progress_callback(done, total, user_id):
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:     
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:    if user_id not in user_progress:
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:        user_progress[user_id] = {
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:            'previous_done': 0,
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:            'previous_time': time.time()
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:        }
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py: 
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:     
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:    user_data = user_progress[user_id]
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py: 
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:     
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:    percent = (done / total) * 100
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py: 
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:     
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:    completed_blocks = int(percent // 10)
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:    remaining_blocks = 10 - completed_blocks
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:    progress_bar = "♦" * completed_blocks + "◇" * remaining_blocks
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py: 
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:     
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:    done_mb = done / (1024 * 1024)   
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:    total_mb = total / (1024 * 1024)
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py: 
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:     
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:    speed = done - user_data['previous_done']
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:    elapsed_time = time.time() - user_data['previous_time']
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py: 
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:    if elapsed_time > 0:
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:        speed_bps = speed / elapsed_time   
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:        speed_mbps = (speed_bps * 8) / (1024 * 1024)   
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:    else:
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:        speed_mbps = 0
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py: 
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:     
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:    if speed_bps > 0:
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:        remaining_time = (total - done) / speed_bps
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:    else:
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:        remaining_time = 0
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py: 
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:     
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:    remaining_time_min = remaining_time / 60
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:

tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:async def split_and_upload_file(app, sender, file_path, caption):
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:    if not os.path.exists(file_path):
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:        await app.send_message(sender, "❌ File not found!")
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:        return
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:    file_size = os.path.getsize(file_path)
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:    start = await app.send_message(sender, f"ℹ️ File size: {file_size / (1024 * 1024):.2f} MB")
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:    PART_SIZE =  1.9 * 1024 * 1024 * 1024
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:    part_number = 0
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:    async with aiofiles.open(file_path, mode="rb") as f:
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:        while True:
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:            chunk = await f.read(PART_SIZE)
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:            if not chunk:
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:                break
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:            # Create part filename
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:            base_name, file_ext = os.path.splitext(file_path)
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:            part_file = f"{base_name}.part{str(part_number).zfill(3)}{file_ext}"
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:            # Write part to file
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:            async with aiofiles.open(part_file, mode="wb") as part_f:
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:                await part_f.write(chunk)
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:            # Uploading part
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:            edit = await app.send_message(sender, f"⬆️ Uploading part {part_number + 1}...")
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:            part_caption = f"{caption} \n\n**Part : {part_number + 1}**"
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:            await app.send_document(sender, document=part_file, caption=part_caption,
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:                progress=progress_bar,
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:                progress_args=("╭─────────────────────╮\n│      **__Pyro Uploader__**\n├─────────────────────", edit, time.time())
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:            )
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:            await edit.delete()
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:            os.remove(part_file)
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:            part_number += 1
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:    await start.delete()
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:    os.remove(file_path)

tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:│ **__Speed:__** {3}/s

tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:async def get_seconds(time_string: str) -> int:
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:    """
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:    Converts a time string (e.g., '5min', '2hour') into seconds.
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:    """
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:    def extract_value_and_unit(ts: str):
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:        value = ''.join(filter(str.isdigit, ts))
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:        unit = ts[len(value):].strip()
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:        return int(value) if value else 0, unit
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:    
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:    value, unit = extract_value_and_unit(time_string)
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:    time_units = {
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:        's': 1,
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:        'min': 60,
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:        'hour': 3600,
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:        'day': 86400,
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:        'month': 86400 * 30,
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:        'year': 86400 * 365
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:    }
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:    
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:    return value * time_units.get(unit, 0)
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:async def progress_bar(current: int, total: int, ud_type: str, message, start: float):
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:    """
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:    Updates the progress bar for an ongoing process.
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:    """
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:    now = time.time()
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:    diff = now - start
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:    
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:    if round(diff % 10) == 0 or current == total:
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:        percentage = (current * 100) / total
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:        speed = current / diff if diff else 0
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:        elapsed_time = round(diff * 1000)
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:        time_to_completion = round((total - current) / speed) * 1000 if speed else 0
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:        estimated_total_time = elapsed_time + time_to_completion
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:        elapsed_time_str = TimeFormatter(elapsed_time)
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:        estimated_total_time_str = TimeFormatter(estimated_total_time)
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:        progress = "".join(["♦" for _ in range(math.floor(percentage / 10))]) + \
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:                   "".join(["◇" for _ in range(10 - math.floor(percentage / 10))])
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:        
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:        progress_text = progress + PROGRESS_BAR.format(
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:            round(percentage, 2),
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:            humanbytes(current),
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:            humanbytes(total),
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:            humanbytes(speed),
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:            estimated_total_time_str if estimated_total_time_str else "0 s"
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:        )
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:        try:
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:            await message.edit(text=f"{ud_type}\n│ {progress_text}")
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:        except:
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:            pass
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:def humanbytes(size: int) -> str:
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:    """
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:    Converts bytes into a human-readable format.
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:    """
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:    if not size:
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:        return ""
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:    
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:    power = 2**10
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:    units = ['B', 'KB', 'MB', 'GB', 'TB']
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:    n = 0
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:    while size > power and n < len(units) - 1:
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:        size /= power
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:        n += 1
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:    
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:    return f"{round(size, 2)} {units[n]}"
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:def TimeFormatter(milliseconds: int) -> str:
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:    """
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:    Formats milliseconds into a human-readable duration.
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:    """
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:    seconds, milliseconds = divmod(milliseconds, 1000)
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:    minutes, seconds = divmod(seconds, 60)
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:    hours, minutes = divmod(minutes, 60)
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:    days, hours = divmod(hours, 24)
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:    
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:    parts = []
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:    if days: parts.append(f"{days}d")
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:    if hours: parts.append(f"{hours}h")
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:    if minutes: parts.append(f"{minutes}m")
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:    if seconds: parts.append(f"{seconds}s")
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:    if milliseconds: parts.append(f"{milliseconds}ms")
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:    
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:    return ', '.join(parts)
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:def convert(seconds: int) -> str:
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:    """
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:    Converts seconds into HH:MM:SS format.
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:    """
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:    hours, remainder = divmod(seconds, 3600)
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:    minutes, seconds = divmod(remainder, 60)
tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:    return f"{hours}:{minutes:02d}:{seconds:02d}"

tmplogin/plugins/start.py:async def send_or_edit_help_page(_, message, page_number):
tmplogin/plugins/start.py:    if page_number < 0 or page_number >= len(help_pages):
tmplogin/plugins/start.py:        return
tmplogin/plugins/start.py: 
tmplogin/plugins/start.py:     
tmplogin/plugins/start.py:    prev_button = InlineKeyboardButton("◀️ Previous", callback_data=f"help_prev_{page_number}")
tmplogin/plugins/start.py:    next_button = InlineKeyboardButton("Next ▶️", callback_data=f"help_next_{page_number}")
tmplogin/plugins/start.py: 
tmplogin/plugins/start.py:     
tmplogin/plugins/start.py:    buttons = []
tmplogin/plugins/start.py:    if page_number > 0:
tmplogin/plugins/start.py:        buttons.append(prev_button)
tmplogin/plugins/start.py:    if page_number < len(help_pages) - 1:
tmplogin/plugins/start.py:        buttons.append(next_button)
tmplogin/plugins/start.py: 
tmplogin/plugins/start.py:     
tmplogin/plugins/start.py:    keyboard = InlineKeyboardMarkup([buttons])
tmplogin/plugins/start.py: 
tmplogin/plugins/start.py:     
tmplogin/plugins/start.py:    await message.delete()
tmplogin/plugins/start.py: 
tmplogin/plugins/start.py:     
tmplogin/plugins/start.py:    await message.reply(
tmplogin/plugins/start.py:        help_pages[page_number],
tmplogin/plugins/start.py:        reply_markup=keyboard
tmplogin/plugins/start.py:    )

tmplogin/plugins/start.py:async def on_help_navigation(client, callback_query):

tmplogin/plugins/start.py: 
tmplogin/plugins/start.py:    if action == "prev":
tmplogin/plugins/start.py:        page_number -= 1
tmplogin/plugins/start.py:    elif action == "next":
tmplogin/plugins/start.py:        page_number += 1
tmplogin/plugins/start.py:
tmplogin/plugins/start.py:    await send_or_edit_help_page(client, callback_query.message, page_number)

tmplogin/plugins/settings.py:    
tmplogin/plugins/settings.py:    callback_actions = {

tmplogin/plugins/settings.py:            'type': 'setchat',

tmplogin/plugins/settings.py:    }

tmplogin/plugins/settings.py:    if event.data in callback_actions:
tmplogin/plugins/settings.py:        action = callback_actions[event.data]
tmplogin/plugins/settings.py:        await start_conversation(event, user_id, action['type'], action['message'])
tmplogin/plugins/settings.py:    elif event.data == b'logout':
tmplogin/plugins/settings.py:        result = await users_collection.update_one(
tmplogin/plugins/settings.py:            {'user_id': user_id},
tmplogin/plugins/settings.py:            {'$unset': {'session_string': ''}}
tmplogin/plugins/settings.py:        )
tmplogin/plugins/settings.py:        if result.modified_count > 0:
tmplogin/plugins/settings.py:            await event.respond('Logged out and deleted session successfully.')
tmplogin/plugins/settings.py:        else:
tmplogin/plugins/settings.py:            await event.respond('You are not logged in.')

tmplogin/plugins/settings.py:        try:
tmplogin/plugins/settings.py:            await users_collection.update_one(
tmplogin/plugins/settings.py:                {'user_id': user_id},

tmplogin/plugins/settings.py:                    'delete_words': '',
tmplogin/plugins/settings.py:                    'replacement_words': '',
tmplogin/plugins/settings.py:                    'rename_tag': '',
tmplogin/plugins/settings.py:                    'caption': '',
tmplogin/plugins/settings.py:                    'chat_id': ''
tmplogin/plugins/settings.py:                }}
tmplogin/plugins/settings.py:            )
tmplogin/plugins/settings.py:            thumbnail_path = f'{user_id}.jpg'
tmplogin/plugins/settings.py:            if os.path.exists(thumbnail_path):
tmplogin/plugins/settings.py:                os.remove(thumbnail_path)
tmplogin/plugins/settings.py:            await event.respond('✅ All settings reset successfully. To logout, click /logout')
tmplogin/plugins/settings.py:        except Exception as e:

tmplogin/plugins/settings.py:    elif event.data == b'remthumb':
tmplogin/plugins/settings.py:        try:

tmplogin/plugins/settings.py:        except FileNotFoundError:
tmplogin/plugins/settings.py:            await event.respond('No thumbnail found to remove.')

tmplogin/plugins/settings.py:async def start_conversation(event, user_id, conv_type, prompt_message):
tmplogin/plugins/settings.py:    if user_id in active_conversations:
tmplogin/plugins/settings.py:        await event.respond('Previous conversation cancelled. Starting new one.')
tmplogin/plugins/settings.py:    
tmplogin/plugins/settings.py:    msg = await event.respond(f'{prompt_message}\n\n(Send /cancel to cancel this operation)')
tmplogin/plugins/settings.py:    active_conversations[user_id] = {'type': conv_type, 'message_id': msg.id}

tmplogin/plugins/settings.py:@gf.on(events.NewMessage(pattern='/cancel'))
tmplogin/plugins/settings.py:async def cancel_conversation(event):

tmplogin/plugins/settings.py:    if user_id in active_conversations:
tmplogin/plugins/settings.py:        await event.respond('Cancelled enjoy baby...')
tmplogin/plugins/settings.py:        del active_conversations[user_id]

tmplogin/plugins/settings.py:@gf.on(events.NewMessage())
tmplogin/plugins/settings.py:async def handle_conversation_input(event):
tmplogin/plugins/settings.py:    user_id = event.sender_id
tmplogin/plugins/settings.py:    if user_id not in active_conversations or event.message.text.startswith('/'):
tmplogin/plugins/settings.py:        return
tmplogin/plugins/settings.py:        
tmplogin/plugins/settings.py:    conv_type = active_conversations[user_id]['type']
tmplogin/plugins/settings.py:    
tmplogin/plugins/settings.py:    handlers = {
tmplogin/plugins/settings.py:        'setchat': handle_setchat,
tmplogin/plugins/settings.py:        'setrename': handle_setrename,
tmplogin/plugins/settings.py:        'setcaption': handle_setcaption,
tmplogin/plugins/settings.py:        'setreplacement': handle_setreplacement,
tmplogin/plugins/settings.py:        'addsession': handle_addsession,
tmplogin/plugins/settings.py:        'deleteword': handle_deleteword,
tmplogin/plugins/settings.py:        'setthumb': handle_setthumb
tmplogin/plugins/settings.py:    }
tmplogin/plugins/settings.py:    
tmplogin/plugins/settings.py:    if conv_type in handlers:
tmplogin/plugins/settings.py:        await handlers[conv_type](event, user_id)
tmplogin/plugins/settings.py:    
tmplogin/plugins/settings.py:    if user_id in active_conversations:

tmplogin/plugins/settings.py:async def handle_setreplacement(event, user_id):
tmplogin/plugins/settings.py:    match = re.match("'(.+)' '(.+)'", event.text)
tmplogin/plugins/settings.py:    if not match:
tmplogin/plugins/settings.py:        await event.respond("❌ Invalid format. Usage: 'WORD(s)' 'REPLACEWORD'")
tmplogin/plugins/settings.py:    else:
tmplogin/plugins/settings.py:        word, replace_word = match.groups()
tmplogin/plugins/settings.py:        delete_words = await get_user_data_key(user_id, 'delete_words', [])
tmplogin/plugins/settings.py:        if word in delete_words:
tmplogin/plugins/settings.py:            await event.respond(f"❌ The word '{word}' is in the delete list and cannot be replaced.")
tmplogin/plugins/settings.py:        else:
tmplogin/plugins/settings.py:            replacements = await get_user_data_key(user_id, 'replacement_words', {})
tmplogin/plugins/settings.py:            replacements[word] = replace_word
tmplogin/plugins/settings.py:            await save_user_data(user_id, 'replacement_words', replacements)
tmplogin/plugins/settings.py:            await event.respond(f"✅ Replacement saved: '{word}' will be replaced with '{replace_word}'")
tmplogin/plugins/settings.py:

tmplogin/plugins/settings.py:def generate_random_name(length=7):
tmplogin/plugins/settings.py:    characters = string.ascii_letters + string.digits
tmplogin/plugins/settings.py:    return ''.join(random.choice(characters) for _ in range(length))

tmplogin/plugins/settings.py:async def rename_file(file, sender, edit):
tmplogin/plugins/settings.py:    try:
tmplogin/plugins/settings.py:        delete_words = await get_user_data_key(sender, 'delete_words', [])
tmplogin/plugins/settings.py:        custom_rename_tag = await get_user_data_key(sender, 'rename_tag', '')
tmplogin/plugins/settings.py:        replacements = await get_user_data_key(sender, 'replacement_words', {})
tmplogin/plugins/settings.py:        
tmplogin/plugins/settings.py:        last_dot_index = str(file).rfind('.')
tmplogin/plugins/settings.py:        if last_dot_index != -1 and last_dot_index != 0:
tmplogin/plugins/settings.py:            ggn_ext = str(file)[last_dot_index + 1:]
tmplogin/plugins/settings.py:            if ggn_ext.isalpha() and len(ggn_ext) <= 9:
tmplogin/plugins/settings.py:                if ggn_ext.lower() in VIDEO_EXTENSIONS:
tmplogin/plugins/settings.py:                    original_file_name = str(file)[:last_dot_index]
tmplogin/plugins/settings.py:                    file_extension = 'mp4'
tmplogin/plugins/settings.py:                else:
tmplogin/plugins/settings.py:                    original_file_name = str(file)[:last_dot_index]
tmplogin/plugins/settings.py:                    file_extension = ggn_ext
tmplogin/plugins/settings.py:            else:
tmplogin/plugins/settings.py:                original_file_name = str(file)[:last_dot_index]
tmplogin/plugins/settings.py:                file_extension = 'mp4'
tmplogin/plugins/settings.py:        else:
tmplogin/plugins/settings.py:            original_file_name = str(file)
tmplogin/plugins/settings.py:            file_extension = 'mp4'
tmplogin/plugins/settings.py:        
tmplogin/plugins/settings.py:        for word in delete_words:
tmplogin/plugins/settings.py:            original_file_name = original_file_name.replace(word, '')
tmplogin/plugins/settings.py:        
tmplogin/plugins/settings.py:        for word, replace_word in replacements.items():
tmplogin/plugins/settings.py:            original_file_name = original_file_name.replace(word, replace_word)
tmplogin/plugins/settings.py:        
tmplogin/plugins/settings.py:        new_file_name = f'{original_file_name} {custom_rename_tag}.{file_extension}'
tmplogin/plugins/settings.py:        
tmplogin/plugins/settings.py:        os.rename(file, new_file_name)
tmplogin/plugins/settings.py:        return new_file_name
tmplogin/plugins/settings.py:    except Exception as e:
tmplogin/plugins/settings.py:        print(f"Rename error: {e}")
tmplogin/plugins/settings.py:        return file

tmplogin/plugins/stats.py:        return

tmplogin/plugins/stats.py:        target_user_id = int(args[1])
tmplogin/plugins/stats.py:    except ValueError:
tmplogin/plugins/stats.py:        await event.respond(
tmplogin/plugins/stats.py:            '❌ Invalid user ID. Please provide a valid numeric user ID.')

tmplogin/plugins/stats.py:        await event.respond('❌ You cannot transfer premium to yourself.')

tmplogin/plugins/stats.py:        await event.respond(

tmplogin/plugins/stats.py:        return

tmplogin/plugins/stats.py:            return

tmplogin/plugins/stats.py:        except Exception as e:
tmplogin/plugins/stats.py:            logger.warning(f'Could not get target user name: {e}')

tmplogin/plugins/stats.py:            target_user_id}, {'$set': {'user_id': target_user_id,
tmplogin/plugins/stats.py:            'subscription_start': now, 'subscription_end': expiry_date,
tmplogin/plugins/stats.py:            'expireAt': expiry_date, 'transferred_from': user_id,
tmplogin/plugins/stats.py:            'transferred_from_name': sender_name}}, upsert=True)
tmplogin/plugins/stats.py:        await premium_users_collection.delete_one({'user_id': user_id})
tmplogin/plugins/stats.py:        expiry_ist = expiry_date + timedelta(hours=5, minutes=30)
tmplogin/plugins/stats.py:        formatted_expiry = expiry_ist.strftime('%d-%b-%Y %I:%M:%S %p')

tmplogin/plugins/stats.py:                )

tmplogin/plugins/stats.py:            owner_id = int(OWNER_ID) if isinstance(OWNER_ID, str
tmplogin/plugins/stats.py:                ) else OWNER_ID[0] if isinstance(OWNER_ID, list) else OWNER_ID
tmplogin/plugins/stats.py:            await bot_client.send_message(owner_id,
tmplogin/plugins/stats.py:                f'♻️ Premium Transfer: {sender_name} ({user_id}) has transferred their premium to {target_name} ({target_user_id}). Expiry: {formatted_expiry}'

tmplogin/README.md:<h1 align="center">
tmplogin/README.md:  Save Restricted Content Bot v3
tmplogin/README.md:</h1>
tmplogin/README.md:
tmplogin/README.md:The Save Restricted Content Bot is a stable Telegram bot developed by devgagan and TEAM SPY. It enables users to retrieve restricted messages from Telegram channels and groups, offering features such as custom thumbnail support and the ability to upload files up to 4GB. Additionally, the bot supports downloading videos from platforms like YouTube, Instagram, and Facebook, along with over 100 other sites
tmplogin/README.md:
tmplogin/README.md:[Telegram](https://t.me/save_restricted_content_bots) | [See Recent Updates](https://github.com/devgaganin/Save-Restricted-Content-Bot-V2/tree/v3#updates)

tmplogin/README.md:
tmplogin/README.md:## 📚 About This Branch
tmplogin/README.md:- This branch is based on `Pyrogram V2` offering enhanced stability and a forced login feature. User are not forced to login in bot for public channels but for public groups and private channel they have to do login.
tmplogin/README.md:- for detailed features scroll down to features section
tmplogin/README.md:
tmplogin/README.md:---
tmplogin/README.md:
tmplogin/README.md:## 🔧 Features
tmplogin/README.md:- Extract content from both public and private channels/groups.
tmplogin/README.md:- Custom bot functionality added use `/setbot`
tmplogin/README.md:- 128 bit encryption for data saving use @v3saverbot on telegram to generate `MASTER_KEY`, `IV_KEY`
tmplogin/README.md:- Rename and forward content to other channels or users.
tmplogin/README.md:- extract restricted content from other bots how to use format link like `https://botusername(without @)/message_id(get it from plus messenger)`
tmplogin/README.md:- `/login` method along with `session` based login
tmplogin/README.md:- Custom captions and thumbnails.
tmplogin/README.md:- Auto-remove default video thumbnails.
tmplogin/README.md:- Delete or replace words in filenames and captions.
tmplogin/README.md:- Auto-pin messages if enabled.
tmplogin/README.md:- download yt/insta/Twitter/fb ect normal ytdlp supported sites that supports best format
tmplogin/README.md:- Login via phone number.
tmplogin/README.md:- **Supports 4GB file uploads**: The bot can handle large file uploads, up to 4GB in size.
tmplogin/README.md:- file splitter if not premium string
tmplogin/README.md:- **Enhanced Timer**: Distinct timers for free and paid users to limit usage and improve service.
tmplogin/README.md:- **Improved Looping**: Optimized looping for processing multiple files or links, reducing delays and enhancing performance.
tmplogin/README.md:- **Premium Access**: Premium users enjoy faster processing speeds and priority queue management.
tmplogin/README.md:- ~~ads setup shorlink ads token system~~
tmplogin/README.md:- ~~fast uploader via `SpyLib` using Telethon modules and `mautrix bridge repo`~~ 
tmplogin/README.md:- Directly upload to `topic` in any topic enabled group
tmplogin/README.md:- real time download and uplaod progress, support chats, text , audio, video , video note sticker everything
tmplogin/README.md:
tmplogin/README.md:  
tmplogin/README.md:## ⚡ Commands
tmplogin/README.md:
tmplogin/README.md:- **`start`**: 🚀 Start the bot.
tmplogin/README.md:- **`batch`**: 🫠 Extract in bulk.
tmplogin/README.md:- **`login`**: 🔑 Get into the bot.
tmplogin/README.md:- **`single`**: Process single link.
tmplogin/README.md:- **`setbot`**: add your custome bot.
tmplogin/README.md:- **`logout`**: 🚪 Get out of the bot.
tmplogin/README.md:- **`adl`**: 👻 Download audio from 30+ sites.
tmplogin/README.md:- **`dl`**: 💀 Download videos from 30+ sites.
tmplogin/README.md:- **`transfer`**: 💘 Gift premium to others.
tmplogin/README.md:- **`status`**: ⌛ Get your plan details.
tmplogin/README.md:- **`add`**: ➕ Add user to premium.
tmplogin/README.md:- **`rem`**: ➖ Remove user from premium.
tmplogin/README.md:- **`rembot`**: remove your custome bot.
tmplogin/README.md:- **`session`**: 🧵 Generate Pyrogramv2 session.
tmplogin/README.md:- **`settings`**: ⚙️ Personalize settings.
tmplogin/README.md:- **`stats`**: 📊 Get stats of the bot.
tmplogin/README.md:- **`plan`**: 🗓️ Check our premium plans.
tmplogin/README.md:- **`terms`**: 🥺 Terms and conditions.
tmplogin/README.md:- **`help`**: ❓ Help if you're new.
tmplogin/README.md:- **`cancel`**: 🚫 Cancel batch process.
tmplogin/README.md:
tmplogin/README.md:
tmplogin/README.md:## ⚙️ Required Variables
tmplogin/README.md:
tmplogin/README.md:<details>
tmplogin/README.md:<summary><b>Click to view required variables</b></summary>
tmplogin/README.md:
tmplogin/README.md:To run the bot, you'll need to configure a few sensitive variables. Here's how to set them up securely:
tmplogin/README.md:
tmplogin/README.md:- **`API_ID`**: Your API ID from [telegram.org](https://my.telegram.org/auth).
tmplogin/README.md:- **`API_HASH`**: Your API Hash from [telegram.org](https://my.telegram.org/auth).
tmplogin/README.md:- **`BOT_TOKEN`**: Get your bot token from [@BotFather](https://t.me/botfather).
tmplogin/README.md:- **`OWNER_ID`**: Use [@missrose_bot](https://t.me/missrose_bot) to get your user ID by sending `/info`.
tmplogin/README.md:- **`CHANNEL_ID`**: The ID of the channel for forced subscription.
tmplogin/README.md:- **`LOG_GROUP`**: A group or channel where the bot logs messages. Forward a message to [@userinfobot](https://t.me/userinfobot) to get your channel/group ID.
tmplogin/README.md:- **`MONGO_DB`**: A MongoDB URL for storing session data (recommended for security).
tmplogin/README.md:  
tmplogin/README.md:### Additional Configuration Options:
tmplogin/README.md:- **`STRING`**: (Optional) Add your **premium account session string** here to allow 4GB file uploads. This is **optional** and can be left empty if not used.
tmplogin/README.md:- **`FREEMIUM_LIMIT`**: Default is `0`. Set this to any value you want to allow free users to extract content. If set to `0`, free users will not have access to any extraction features.
tmplogin/README.md:- **`PREMIUM_LIMIT`**: Default is `500`. This is the batch limit for premium users. You can customize this to allow premium users to process more links/files in one batch.
tmplogin/README.md:- **`YT_COOKIES`**: Yt cookies for downloading yt videos 
tmplogin/README.md:- **`INSTA_COOKIES`**: If you want to enable instagram downloading fill cookiesn
tmplogin/README.md:
tmplogin/README.md:**How to get cookies ??** : use mozila firfox if on android or use chrome on desktop and download extension get this cookie or any Netscape Cookies (HTTP Cookies) extractor and use that 
tmplogin/README.md:
tmplogin/README.md:### Monetization (Optional):
tmplogin/README.md:- **`WEBSITE_URL`**: (Optional) This is the domain for your monetization short link service. Provide the shortener's domain name, for example: `upshrink.com`. Do **not** include `www` or `https://`. The default link shortener is already set.
tmplogin/README.md:- **`AD_API`**: (Optional) The API key from your link shortener service (e.g., **Upshrink**, **AdFly**, etc.) to monetize links. Enter the API provided by your shortener.
tmplogin/README.md:
tmplogin/README.md:> **Important:** Always keep your credentials secure! Never hard-code them in the repository. Use environment variables or a `.env` file.
tmplogin/README.md:
tmplogin/README.md:</details>
tmplogin/README.md:
tmplogin/README.md:---

tmplogin/README.md:## 🚀 Deployment Guide
tmplogin/README.md:
tmplogin/README.md:<details>
tmplogin/README.md:<summary><b>Deploy on VPS</b></summary>
tmplogin/README.md:
tmplogin/README.md:1. Fork the repo.
tmplogin/README.md:2. Update `config.py` with your values.
tmplogin/README.md:3. Run the following:
tmplogin/README.md:   ```bash
tmplogin/README.md:   sudo apt update
tmplogin/README.md:   sudo apt install ffmpeg git python3-pip
tmplogin/README.md:   git clone your_repo_link
tmplogin/README.md:   cd your_repo_name
tmplogin/README.md:   pip3 install -r requirements.txt
tmplogin/README.md:   python3 main.py
tmplogin/README.md:   ```
tmplogin/README.md:
tmplogin/README.md:- To run the bot in the background:
tmplogin/README.md:  ```bash
tmplogin/README.md:  screen -S gagan
tmplogin/README.md:  python3 main.py
tmplogin/README.md:  ```
tmplogin/README.md:  - Detach: `Ctrl + A`, then `Ctrl + D`
tmplogin/README.md:  - To stop: `screen -r gagan` and `screen -S gagan -X quit`
tmplogin/README.md:
tmplogin/README.md:</details>

tmplogin/README.md:2. Click [![Deploy](https://www.herokucdn.com/deploy/button.svg)](https://www.heroku.com/deploy).

tmplogin/README.md:### ⚠️ Must Do: Secure Your Sensitive Variables
tmplogin/README.md:
tmplogin/README.md:**Do not expose sensitive variables (e.g., `API_ID`, `API_HASH`, `BOT_TOKEN`) on GitHub. Use environment variables to keep them secure.**
tmplogin/README.md:
tmplogin/README.md:### Configuring Variables Securely:
tmplogin/README.md:
tmplogin/README.md:- **On VPS or Local Machine:**
tmplogin/README.md:  - Use a text editor to edit `config.py`:
tmplogin/README.md:    ```bash
tmplogin/README.md:    nano config.py
tmplogin/README.md:    ```
tmplogin/README.md:  - Alternatively, export as environment variables:
tmplogin/README.md:    ```bash
tmplogin/README.md:    export API_ID=your_api_id
tmplogin/README.md:    export API_HASH=your_api_hash
tmplogin/README.md:    export BOT_TOKEN=your_bot_token
tmplogin/README.md:    ```
tmplogin/README.md:
tmplogin/README.md:- **For Cloud Platforms (Heroku, Railway, etc.):**
tmplogin/README.md:  - Set environment variables directly in your platform’s dashboard.
tmplogin/README.md:
tmplogin/README.md:- **Using `.env` File:**
tmplogin/README.md:  - Create a `.env` file and add your credentials:
tmplogin/README.md:    ```
tmplogin/README.md:    API_ID=your_api_id
tmplogin/README.md:    API_HASH=your_api_hash
tmplogin/README.md:    BOT_TOKEN=your_bot_token
tmplogin/README.md:    ```
tmplogin/README.md:  - Make sure to add `.env` to `.gitignore` to prevent it from being pushed to GitHub.
tmplogin/README.md:
tmplogin/README.md:**Why This is Important?**
tmplogin/README.md:Your credentials can be stolen if pushed to a public repository. Always keep them secure by using environment variables or local configuration files.
tmplogin/README.md:

tmplogin/utils/func.py:
tmplogin/utils/func.py:def E(L):   
tmplogin/utils/func.py:    private_match = re.match(r'https://t\.me/c/(\d+)/(?:\d+/)?(\d+)', L)
tmplogin/utils/func.py:    public_match = re.match(r'https://t\.me/([^/]+)/(?:\d+/)?(\d+)', L)
tmplogin/utils/func.py:    
tmplogin/utils/func.py:    if private_match:
tmplogin/utils/func.py:        return f'-100{private_match.group(1)}', int(private_match.group(2)), 'private'
tmplogin/utils/func.py:    elif public_match:
tmplogin/utils/func.py:        return public_match.group(1), int(public_match.group(2)), 'public'
tmplogin/utils/func.py:    
tmplogin/utils/func.py:    return None, None, None
tmplogin/utils/func.py:
tmplogin/utils/func.py:
tmplogin/utils/func.py:def get_display_name(user):
tmplogin/utils/func.py:    if user.first_name and user.last_name:
tmplogin/utils/func.py:        return f"{user.first_name} {user.last_name}"
tmplogin/utils/func.py:    elif user.first_name:
tmplogin/utils/func.py:        return user.first_name
tmplogin/utils/func.py:    elif user.last_name:
tmplogin/utils/func.py:        return user.last_name
tmplogin/utils/func.py:    elif user.username:
tmplogin/utils/func.py:        return user.username
tmplogin/utils/func.py:    else:
tmplogin/utils/func.py:        return "Unknown User"

tmplogin/utils/func.py:    return re.sub(r'[<>:"/\\|?*]', '_', filename)

tmplogin/utils/func.py:def get_dummy_filename(info):
tmplogin/utils/func.py:    file_type = info.get("type", "file")
tmplogin/utils/func.py:    extension = {
tmplogin/utils/func.py:        "video": "mp4",
tmplogin/utils/func.py:        "photo": "jpg",
tmplogin/utils/func.py:        "document": "pdf",
tmplogin/utils/func.py:        "audio": "mp3"
tmplogin/utils/func.py:    }.get(file_type, "bin")
tmplogin/utils/func.py:    
tmplogin/utils/func.py:    return f"downloaded_file_{int(time.time())}.{extension}"

tmplogin/utils/func.py:        {"user_id": user_id},
tmplogin/utils/func.py:        {"$set": {key: value}},

tmplogin/utils/func.py:    )

tmplogin/utils/func.py:    user_data = await users_collection.find_one({"user_id": int(user_id)})
tmplogin/utils/func.py:  #  print(f"Fetching key '{key}' for user {user_id}: {user_data}")
tmplogin/utils/func.py:    return user_data.get(key, default) if user_data else default

tmplogin/utils/func.py:async def get_user_data(user_id):
tmplogin/utils/func.py:    try:
tmplogin/utils/func.py:        user_data = await users_collection.find_one({"user_id": user_id})
tmplogin/utils/func.py:        return user_data
tmplogin/utils/func.py:    except Exception as e:
tmplogin/utils/func.py:   #     logger.error(f"Error retrieving user data for {user_id}: {e}")
tmplogin/utils/func.py:        return None

tmplogin/utils/func.py:async def save_user_session(user_id, session_string):
tmplogin/utils/func.py:    try:
tmplogin/utils/func.py:        await users_collection.update_one(
tmplogin/utils/func.py:            {"user_id": user_id},
tmplogin/utils/func.py:            {"$set": {
tmplogin/utils/func.py:                "session_string": session_string,
tmplogin/utils/func.py:                "updated_at": datetime.now()
tmplogin/utils/func.py:            }},
tmplogin/utils/func.py:            upsert=True
tmplogin/utils/func.py:        )
tmplogin/utils/func.py:        logger.info(f"Saved session for user {user_id}")
tmplogin/utils/func.py:        return True
tmplogin/utils/func.py:    except Exception as e:
tmplogin/utils/func.py:        logger.error(f"Error saving session for user {user_id}: {e}")
tmplogin/utils/func.py:        return False
tmplogin/utils/func.py:
tmplogin/utils/func.py:

tmplogin/utils/func.py:        )

tmplogin/utils/func.py:        logger.error(f"Error removing session for user {user_id}: {e}")

tmplogin/utils/func.py:        return False
tmplogin/utils/func.py:
tmplogin/utils/func.py:
tmplogin/utils/func.py:async def process_text_with_rules(user_id, text):
tmplogin/utils/func.py:    if not text:
tmplogin/utils/func.py:        return ""
tmplogin/utils/func.py:    
tmplogin/utils/func.py:    try:
tmplogin/utils/func.py:        replacements = await get_user_data_key(user_id, "replacement_words", {})
tmplogin/utils/func.py:        delete_words = await get_user_data_key(user_id, "delete_words", [])
tmplogin/utils/func.py:        
tmplogin/utils/func.py:        processed_text = text
tmplogin/utils/func.py:        for word, replacement in replacements.items():
tmplogin/utils/func.py:            processed_text = processed_text.replace(word, replacement)
tmplogin/utils/func.py:        
tmplogin/utils/func.py:        if delete_words:
tmplogin/utils/func.py:            words = processed_text.split()
tmplogin/utils/func.py:            filtered_words = [w for w in words if w not in delete_words]
tmplogin/utils/func.py:            processed_text = " ".join(filtered_words)
tmplogin/utils/func.py:        
tmplogin/utils/func.py:        return processed_text
tmplogin/utils/func.py:    except Exception as e:
tmplogin/utils/func.py:        logger.error(f"Error processing text with rules: {e}")
tmplogin/utils/func.py:        return text
tmplogin/utils/func.py:
tmplogin/utils/func.py:
tmplogin/utils/func.py:async def screenshot(video: str, duration: int, sender: str) -> str | None:
tmplogin/utils/func.py:    existing_screenshot = f"{sender}.jpg"
tmplogin/utils/func.py:    if os.path.exists(existing_screenshot):
tmplogin/utils/func.py:        return existing_screenshot
tmplogin/utils/func.py:
tmplogin/utils/func.py:    time_stamp = hhmmss(duration // 2)
tmplogin/utils/func.py:    output_file = datetime.now().isoformat("_", "seconds") + ".jpg"
tmplogin/utils/func.py:
tmplogin/utils/func.py:    cmd = [
tmplogin/utils/func.py:        "ffmpeg",
tmplogin/utils/func.py:        "-ss", time_stamp,
tmplogin/utils/func.py:        "-i", video,
tmplogin/utils/func.py:        "-frames:v", "1",
tmplogin/utils/func.py:        output_file,
tmplogin/utils/func.py:        "-y"
tmplogin/utils/func.py:    ]
tmplogin/utils/func.py:
tmplogin/utils/func.py:    process = await asyncio.create_subprocess_exec(
tmplogin/utils/func.py:        *cmd,
tmplogin/utils/func.py:        stdout=asyncio.subprocess.PIPE,
tmplogin/utils/func.py:        stderr=asyncio.subprocess.PIPE
tmplogin/utils/func.py:    )
tmplogin/utils/func.py:    
tmplogin/utils/func.py:    stdout, stderr = await process.communicate()
tmplogin/utils/func.py:
tmplogin/utils/func.py:    if os.path.isfile(output_file):
tmplogin/utils/func.py:        return output_file
tmplogin/utils/func.py:    else:
tmplogin/utils/func.py:        print(f"FFmpeg Error: {stderr.decode().strip()}")
tmplogin/utils/func.py:        return None
tmplogin/utils/func.py:
tmplogin/utils/func.py:
tmplogin/utils/func.py:async def get_video_metadata(file_path):
tmplogin/utils/func.py:    default_values = {'width': 1, 'height': 1, 'duration': 1}
tmplogin/utils/func.py:    loop = asyncio.get_event_loop()
tmplogin/utils/func.py:    executor = concurrent.futures.ThreadPoolExecutor(max_workers=4)
tmplogin/utils/func.py:    
tmplogin/utils/func.py:    try:
tmplogin/utils/func.py:        def _extract_metadata():
tmplogin/utils/func.py:            try:
tmplogin/utils/func.py:                vcap = cv2.VideoCapture(file_path)
tmplogin/utils/func.py:                if not vcap.isOpened():
tmplogin/utils/func.py:                    return default_values
tmplogin/utils/func.py:
tmplogin/utils/func.py:                width = round(vcap.get(cv2.CAP_PROP_FRAME_WIDTH))
tmplogin/utils/func.py:                height = round(vcap.get(cv2.CAP_PROP_FRAME_HEIGHT))
tmplogin/utils/func.py:                fps = vcap.get(cv2.CAP_PROP_FPS)
tmplogin/utils/func.py:                frame_count = vcap.get(cv2.CAP_PROP_FRAME_COUNT)
tmplogin/utils/func.py:
tmplogin/utils/func.py:                if fps <= 0:
tmplogin/utils/func.py:                    return default_values
tmplogin/utils/func.py:
tmplogin/utils/func.py:                duration = round(frame_count / fps)
tmplogin/utils/func.py:                if duration <= 0:
tmplogin/utils/func.py:                    return default_values
tmplogin/utils/func.py:
tmplogin/utils/func.py:                vcap.release()
tmplogin/utils/func.py:                return {'width': width, 'height': height, 'duration': duration}
tmplogin/utils/func.py:            except Exception as e:
tmplogin/utils/func.py:                logger.error(f"Error in video_metadata: {e}")
tmplogin/utils/func.py:                return default_values
tmplogin/utils/func.py:        
tmplogin/utils/func.py:        return await loop.run_in_executor(executor, _extract_metadata)
tmplogin/utils/func.py:        
tmplogin/utils/func.py:    except Exception as e:
tmplogin/utils/func.py:        logger.error(f"Error in get_video_metadata: {e}")
tmplogin/utils/func.py:        return default_values
tmplogin/utils/func.py:
tmplogin/utils/func.py:
tmplogin/utils/func.py:async def add_premium_user(user_id, duration_value, duration_unit):
tmplogin/utils/func.py:    try:
tmplogin/utils/func.py:        now = datetime.now()
tmplogin/utils/func.py:        expiry_date = None
tmplogin/utils/func.py:        
tmplogin/utils/func.py:        if duration_unit == "min":
tmplogin/utils/func.py:            expiry_date = now + timedelta(minutes=duration_value)
tmplogin/utils/func.py:        elif duration_unit == "hours":
tmplogin/utils/func.py:            expiry_date = now + timedelta(hours=duration_value)
tmplogin/utils/func.py:        elif duration_unit == "days":
tmplogin/utils/func.py:            expiry_date = now + timedelta(days=duration_value)
tmplogin/utils/func.py:        elif duration_unit == "weeks":
tmplogin/utils/func.py:            expiry_date = now + timedelta(weeks=duration_value)
tmplogin/utils/func.py:        elif duration_unit == "month":
tmplogin/utils/func.py:            expiry_date = now + timedelta(days=30 * duration_value)
tmplogin/utils/func.py:        elif duration_unit == "year":
tmplogin/utils/func.py:            expiry_date = now + timedelta(days=365 * duration_value)
tmplogin/utils/func.py:        elif duration_unit == "decades":
tmplogin/utils/func.py:            expiry_date = now + timedelta(days=3650 * duration_value)
tmplogin/utils/func.py:        else:
tmplogin/utils/func.py:            return False, "Invalid duration unit"
tmplogin/utils/func.py:            
tmplogin/utils/func.py:        await premium_users_collection.update_one(
tmplogin/utils/func.py:            {"user_id": user_id},
tmplogin/utils/func.py:            {"$set": {
tmplogin/utils/func.py:                "user_id": user_id,
tmplogin/utils/func.py:                "subscription_start": now,
tmplogin/utils/func.py:                "subscription_end": expiry_date,
tmplogin/utils/func.py:                "expireAt": expiry_date
tmplogin/utils/func.py:            }},
tmplogin/utils/func.py:            upsert=True
tmplogin/utils/func.py:        )
tmplogin/utils/func.py:        
tmplogin/utils/func.py:        await premium_users_collection.create_index("expireAt", expireAfterSeconds=0)
tmplogin/utils/func.py:        
tmplogin/utils/func.py:        return True, expiry_date
tmplogin/utils/func.py:    except Exception as e:
tmplogin/utils/func.py:        logger.error(f"Error adding premium user {user_id}: {e}")
tmplogin/utils/func.py:        return False, str(e)
tmplogin/utils/func.py:
tmplogin/utils/func.py:
tmplogin/utils/func.py:async def is_premium_user(user_id):
tmplogin/utils/func.py:    try:
tmplogin/utils/func.py:        user = await premium_users_collection.find_one({"user_id": user_id})
tmplogin/utils/func.py:        if user and "subscription_end" in user:
tmplogin/utils/func.py:            now = datetime.now()
tmplogin/utils/func.py:            return now < user["subscription_end"]
tmplogin/utils/func.py:        return False
tmplogin/utils/func.py:    except Exception as e:
tmplogin/utils/func.py:        logger.error(f"Error checking premium status for {user_id}: {e}")
tmplogin/utils/func.py:        return False
tmplogin/utils/func.py:
tmplogin/utils/func.py:
tmplogin/utils/func.py:async def get_premium_details(user_id):
tmplogin/utils/func.py:    try:
tmplogin/utils/func.py:        user = await premium_users_collection.find_one({"user_id": user_id})
tmplogin/utils/func.py:        if user and "subscription_end" in user:
tmplogin/utils/func.py:            return user
tmplogin/utils/func.py:        return None
tmplogin/utils/func.py:    except Exception as e:
tmplogin/utils/func.py:        logger.error(f"Error getting premium details for {user_id}: {e}")
tmplogin/utils/func.py:        return None
tmplogin/utils/encrypt.py:# crypto_ops.py
tmplogin/utils/encrypt.py:from cryptography.hazmat.primitives import hashes as hsh
tmplogin/utils/encrypt.py:from cryptography.hazmat.primitives.kdf.pbkdf2 import PBKDF2HMAC as PBK
tmplogin/utils/encrypt.py:from cryptography.hazmat.primitives.ciphers import Cipher as Cp, algorithms as alg, modes as md
tmplogin/utils/encrypt.py:import base64 as b64
tmplogin/utils/encrypt.py:import os as osy
tmplogin/utils/encrypt.py:from config import MASTER_KEY as M1, IV_KEY as I1
tmplogin/utils/encrypt.py:
tmplogin/utils/encrypt.py:def dyk(pwd=M1, slt=I1, l=16):
tmplogin/utils/encrypt.py:    pw = pwd.encode()
tmplogin/utils/encrypt.py:    sl = slt.encode()
tmplogin/utils/encrypt.py:    kdf = PBK(
tmplogin/utils/encrypt.py:        algorithm=hsh.SHA256(),
tmplogin/utils/encrypt.py:        length=l,
tmplogin/utils/encrypt.py:        salt=sl,
tmplogin/utils/encrypt.py:        iterations=100000,
tmplogin/utils/encrypt.py:    )
tmplogin/utils/encrypt.py:    return kdf.derive(pw)
tmplogin/utils/encrypt.py:
tmplogin/utils/encrypt.py:def ecs(s):
tmplogin/utils/encrypt.py:    k = dyk()
tmplogin/utils/encrypt.py:    n = osy.urandom(12) 
tmplogin/utils/encrypt.py:    cp = Cp(alg.AES(k), md.GCM(n))
tmplogin/utils/encrypt.py:    enc = cp.encryptor()
tmplogin/utils/encrypt.py:    p = s.encode()
tmplogin/utils/encrypt.py:    ct = enc.update(p) + enc.finalize()
tmplogin/utils/encrypt.py:    tg = enc.tag
tmplogin/utils/encrypt.py:    encd = b64.b64encode(n + tg + ct).decode()
tmplogin/utils/encrypt.py:    return encd
tmplogin/utils/encrypt.py:
tmplogin/utils/encrypt.py:def dcs(ed):
tmplogin/utils/encrypt.py:    k = dyk()
tmplogin/utils/encrypt.py:    dat = b64.b64decode(ed.encode())
tmplogin/utils/encrypt.py:    n = dat[:12]
tmplogin/utils/encrypt.py:    tg = dat[12:28]
tmplogin/utils/encrypt.py:    ct = dat[28:]
tmplogin/utils/encrypt.py:    cp = Cp(alg.AES(k), md.GCM(n, tg))
tmplogin/utils/encrypt.py:    dec = cp.decryptor()
tmplogin/utils/encrypt.py:    res = dec.update(ct) + dec.finalize()
tmplogin/utils/encrypt.py:    return res.decode()

tmplogin/utils/custom_filters.py:    if step:
tmplogin/utils/custom_filters.py:        user_steps[user_id] = step
tmplogin/utils/custom_filters.py:    else:
tmplogin/utils/custom_filters.py:        user_steps.pop(user_id, None)

tmplogin/utils/custom_filters.py:    return user_steps.get(user_id)

tmplogin/shared_client.py:
tmplogin/shared_client.py:from telethon import TelegramClient
tmplogin/shared_client.py:from config import API_ID, API_HASH, BOT_TOKEN, STRING
tmplogin/shared_client.py:from pyrogram import Client
tmplogin/shared_client.py:import sys
tmplogin/shared_client.py:
tmplogin/shared_client.py:client = TelegramClient("telethonbot", API_ID, API_HASH)
tmplogin/shared_client.py:app = Client("pyrogrambot", api_id=API_ID, api_hash=API_HASH, bot_token=BOT_TOKEN)
tmplogin/shared_client.py:userbot = Client("4gbbot", api_id=API_ID, api_hash=API_HASH, session_string=STRING)
tmplogin/shared_client.py:
tmplogin/shared_client.py:async def start_client():
tmplogin/shared_client.py:    if not client.is_connected():
tmplogin/shared_client.py:        await client.start(bot_token=BOT_TOKEN)
tmplogin/shared_client.py:        print("SpyLib started...")
tmplogin/shared_client.py:    if STRING:
tmplogin/shared_client.py:        try:
tmplogin/shared_client.py:            await userbot.start()
tmplogin/shared_client.py:            print("Userbot started...")
tmplogin/shared_client.py:        except Exception as e:
tmplogin/shared_client.py:            print(f"Hey honey!! check your premium string session, it may be invalid of expire {e}")
tmplogin/shared_client.py:            sys.exit(1)
tmplogin/shared_client.py:    await app.start()
tmplogin/shared_client.py:    print("Pyro App Started...")
tmplogin/shared_client.py:    return client, app, userbot
