tmplogin/LICENSE:  A "covered work" means either the unmodified Program or a work based
tmplogin/LICENSE:on the Program.
tmplogin/LICENSE:
tmplogin/LICENSE:  To "propagate" a work means to do anything with it that, without
tmplogin/LICENSE:permission, would make you directly or secondarily liable for
tmplogin/LICENSE:infringement under applicable copyright law, except executing it on a
tmplogin/LICENSE:computer or modifying a private copy.  Propagation includes copying,
tmplogin/LICENSE:distribution (with or without modification), making available to the
tmplogin/LICENSE:public, and in some countries other activities as well.
tmplogin/LICENSE:
tmplogin/LICENSE:  To "convey" a work means any kind of propagation that enables other
tmplogin/LICENSE:parties to make or receive copies.  Mere interaction with a user through
tmplogin/LICENSE:a computer network, with no transfer of a copy, is not conveying.
tmplogin/LICENSE:
tmplogin/LICENSE:  An interactive user interface displays "Appropriate Legal Notices"
tmplogin/LICENSE:to the extent that it includes a convenient and prominently visible
tmplogin/LICENSE:feature that (1) displays an appropriate copyright notice, and (2)
tmplogin/LICENSE:tells the user that there is no warranty for the work (except to the
tmplogin/LICENSE:extent that warranties are provided), that licensees may convey the
tmplogin/LICENSE:work under this License, and how to view a copy of this License.  If
tmplogin/LICENSE:the interface presents a list of user commands or options, such as a
tmplogin/LICENSE:menu, a prominent item in the list meets this criterion.

tmplogin/LICENSE:  1. Source Code.
tmplogin/LICENSE:
tmplogin/LICENSE:  The "source code" for a work means the preferred form of the work
tmplogin/LICENSE:for making modifications to it.  "Object code" means any non-source
tmplogin/LICENSE:form of a work.
tmplogin/LICENSE:
tmplogin/LICENSE:  A "Standard Interface" means an interface that either is an official
tmplogin/LICENSE:standard defined by a recognized standards body, or, in the case of
tmplogin/LICENSE:interfaces specified for a particular programming language, one that
tmplogin/LICENSE:is widely used among developers working in that language.
tmplogin/LICENSE:
tmplogin/LICENSE:  The "System Libraries" of an executable work include anything, other
tmplogin/LICENSE:than the work as a whole, that (a) is included in the normal form of
tmplogin/LICENSE:packaging a Major Component, but which is not part of that Major
tmplogin/LICENSE:Component, and (b) serves only to enable use of the work with that
tmplogin/LICENSE:Major Component, or to implement a Standard Interface for which an
tmplogin/LICENSE:implementation is available to the public in source code form.  A
tmplogin/LICENSE:"Major Component", in this context, means a major essential component
tmplogin/LICENSE:(kernel, window system, and so on) of the specific operating system
tmplogin/LICENSE:(if any) on which the executable work runs, or a compiler used to
tmplogin/LICENSE:produce the work, or an object code interpreter used to run it.
tmplogin/LICENSE:
tmplogin/LICENSE:  The "Corresponding Source" for a work in object code form means all
tmplogin/LICENSE:the source code needed to generate, install, and (for an executable
tmplogin/LICENSE:work) run the object code and to modify the work, including scripts to
tmplogin/LICENSE:control those activities.  However, it does not include the work's
tmplogin/LICENSE:System Libraries, or general-purpose tools or generally available free
tmplogin/LICENSE:programs which are used unmodified in performing those activities but
tmplogin/LICENSE:which are not part of the work.  For example, Corresponding Source
tmplogin/LICENSE:includes interface definition files associated with source files for
tmplogin/LICENSE:the work, and the source code for shared libraries and dynamically
tmplogin/LICENSE:linked subprograms that the work is specifically designed to require,
tmplogin/LICENSE:such as by intimate data communication or control flow between those
tmplogin/LICENSE:subprograms and other parts of the work.
tmplogin/LICENSE:
tmplogin/LICENSE:  The Corresponding Source need not include anything that users
tmplogin/LICENSE:can regenerate automatically from other parts of the Corresponding
tmplogin/LICENSE:Source.
tmplogin/LICENSE:
tmplogin/LICENSE:  The Corresponding Source for a work in source code form is that
tmplogin/LICENSE:same work.

tmplogin/LICENSE:propagate the contents of its contributor version.

tmplogin/LICENSE:sue for patent infringement).  To "grant" such a patent license to a
tmplogin/LICENSE:party means to make such an agreement or commitment not to enforce a

tmplogin/main.py:import asyncio
tmplogin/main.py:from shared_client import start_client
tmplogin/main.py:import importlib
tmplogin/main.py:import os
tmplogin/main.py:import sys
tmplogin/main.py:
tmplogin/main.py:async def load_and_run_plugins():
tmplogin/main.py:    await start_client()
tmplogin/main.py:    plugin_dir = "plugins"
tmplogin/main.py:    plugins = [f[:-3] for f in os.listdir(plugin_dir) if f.endswith(".py") and f != "__init__.py"]
tmplogin/main.py:
tmplogin/main.py:    for plugin in plugins:
tmplogin/main.py:        module = importlib.import_module(f"plugins.{plugin}")
tmplogin/main.py:        if hasattr(module, f"run_{plugin}_plugin"):
tmplogin/main.py:            print(f"Running {plugin} plugin...")
tmplogin/main.py:            await getattr(module, f"run_{plugin}_plugin")()  
tmplogin/main.py:
tmplogin/main.py:async def main():
tmplogin/main.py:    await load_and_run_plugins()
tmplogin/main.py:    while True:
tmplogin/main.py:        await asyncio.sleep(1)  
tmplogin/main.py:
tmplogin/main.py:if __name__ == "__main__":
tmplogin/main.py:    loop = asyncio.get_event_loop()
tmplogin/main.py:    print("Starting clients ...")
tmplogin/main.py:    try:
tmplogin/main.py:        loop.run_until_complete(main())
tmplogin/main.py:    except KeyboardInterrupt:
tmplogin/main.py:        print("Shutting down...")
tmplogin/main.py:    except Exception as e:
tmplogin/main.py:        print(e)
tmplogin/main.py:        sys.exit(1)
tmplogin/main.py:    finally:
tmplogin/main.py:        try:
tmplogin/main.py:            loop.close()
tmplogin/main.py:        except Exception:
tmplogin/main.py:            pass

src/App.tsx:                    placeholder="e.g., @MyBot"

src/App.tsx:                  />

src/App.tsx:                    type="button"

src/App.tsx:             <div className="flex justify-between items-center px-2">

src/App.tsx:                     </motion.div>
src/App.tsx:                   ))}
src/App.tsx:               </div>
src/App.tsx:             )}
src/App.tsx:          </div>
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:          {renameRules.length > 0 && (
src/App.tsx:             <button 
src/App.tsx:               onClick={() => saveSettings()}

src/App.tsx:               Sync Rules to Cloud

src/App.tsx:  );
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  const handleDeleteMirrorPath = async (idx: number) => {
src/App.tsx:    if (!confirm('Delete this mirror path?')) return;
src/App.tsx:    try {
src/App.tsx:      const resp = await fetch('/api/mirror/delete-path', {
src/App.tsx:        method: 'POST',
src/App.tsx:        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
src/App.tsx:        body: JSON.stringify({ index: idx })
src/App.tsx:      });
src/App.tsx:      if (!resp.ok) throw new Error('API Error');
src/App.tsx:      alert('Mirror path deleted');
src/App.tsx:      // trigger refresh handled by interval
src/App.tsx:    } catch(err: any) {
src/App.tsx:      alert(err.message);
src/App.tsx:    }
src/App.tsx:  };
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  const handleAddMirrorPath = async (e: React.FormEvent) => {
src/App.tsx:    e.preventDefault();
src/App.tsx:    if (!newMirrorSourceId || !newMirrorDestId) return;
src/App.tsx:    setAddingMirrorPath(true);
src/App.tsx:    try {
src/App.tsx:      const resp = await fetch('/api/mirror/add-path', {
src/App.tsx:        method: 'POST',
src/App.tsx:        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
src/App.tsx:        body: JSON.stringify({
src/App.tsx:          sourceId: newMirrorSourceId,
src/App.tsx:          destId: newMirrorDestId,
src/App.tsx:          destThreadId: newMirrorTopicId,
src/App.tsx:          groupName: `Added from App UI`
src/App.tsx:        })
src/App.tsx:      });
src/App.tsx:      if (!resp.ok) throw new Error('API request failed');
src/App.tsx:      setNewMirrorSourceId('');
src/App.tsx:      setNewMirrorDestId('');
src/App.tsx:      setNewMirrorTopicId('');
src/App.tsx:      alert('Mirror path added');
src/App.tsx:    } catch(err: any) {
src/App.tsx:      alert(err.message);
src/App.tsx:    } finally {
src/App.tsx:      setAddingMirrorPath(false);
src/App.tsx:    }
src/App.tsx:  };
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  const renderMirror = () => {
src/App.tsx:    const formatISTTime = (isoString?: string) => {
src/App.tsx:      if (!isoString) return 'Never checked';
src/App.tsx:      const d = new Date(isoString);
src/App.tsx:      if (isNaN(d.getTime())) return 'Never checked';
src/App.tsx:      
src/App.tsx:      // Convert UTC to IST (+5:30)
src/App.tsx:      const istTime = new Date(d.getTime() + (5.5 * 60 * 60 * 1000));
src/App.tsx:      
src/App.tsx:      const pad = (num: number) => num.toString().padStart(2, '0');
src/App.tsx:      const months = ['Jan', 'Feb', 'Mar', 'Apr', 'May', 'Jun', 'Jul', 'Aug', 'Sep', 'Oct', 'Nov', 'Dec'];
src/App.tsx:      
src/App.tsx:      const day = pad(istTime.getUTCDate());
src/App.tsx:      const month = months[istTime.getUTCMonth()];
src/App.tsx:      const year = istTime.getUTCFullYear();
src/App.tsx:      
src/App.tsx:      let hours = istTime.getUTCHours();
src/App.tsx:      const minutes = pad(istTime.getUTCMinutes());
src/App.tsx:      const seconds = pad(istTime.getUTCSeconds());
src/App.tsx:      const ampm = hours >= 12 ? 'PM' : 'AM';
src/App.tsx:      hours = hours % 12;
src/App.tsx:      hours = hours ? hours : 12; // 0 should be 12
src/App.tsx:      const strHours = pad(hours);
src/App.tsx:      
src/App.tsx:      return `${day} ${month} ${year}, ${strHours}:${minutes}:${seconds} ${ampm} (IST)`;
src/App.tsx:    };
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:    const handleSetPath = async () => {
src/App.tsx:      setSettingPath(true);
src/App.tsx:      try {
src/App.tsx:        const response = await fetch('/api/setpath', {
src/App.tsx:          method: 'POST',
src/App.tsx:          headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
src/App.tsx:          body: JSON.stringify({
src/App.tsx:            chatId: pathChatId,
src/App.tsx:            topicId: pathTopicId || null,
src/App.tsx:            groupTitle: 'Group from UI',
src/App.tsx:            topicName: pathTopicId ? `Topic ${pathTopicId}` : '',
src/App.tsx:            userId: data?.settings?.adminId || '6431447408'
src/App.tsx:          })
src/App.tsx:        });
src/App.tsx:        if (!response.ok) throw new Error('Failed to set path');
src/App.tsx:        alert('Mirroring configuration updated correctly!');
src/App.tsx:      } catch (err) {
src/App.tsx:        alert(err instanceof Error ? err.message : 'Error setting path');
src/App.tsx:      } finally {
src/App.tsx:        setSettingPath(false);
src/App.tsx:      }
src/App.tsx:    };
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:    return (
src/App.tsx:      <div className="space-y-6 animate-in fade-in slide-in-from-bottom-4 duration-500 pb-24">
src/App.tsx:        
src/App.tsx:        {/* Global Mirror Fallback Target */}
src/App.tsx:        <div className="bg-white dark:bg-slate-900 border border-slate-200 dark:border-slate-800 p-6 sm:p-8 rounded-3xl shadow-lg">

src/App.tsx:          <div className="space-y-4">
src/App.tsx:            <div>
src/App.tsx:              <label className="block text-[10px] font-bold text-slate-500 uppercase tracking-widest mb-2">Destination Chat ID</label>
src/App.tsx:              <input 
src/App.tsx:                type="text" 
src/App.tsx:                value={pathChatId}
src/App.tsx:                onChange={(e) => setPathChatId(e.target.value)}
src/App.tsx:                placeholder="e.g., -100XXXXXXX"
src/App.tsx:                className="w-full bg-slate-100 dark:bg-slate-800 border border-slate-200 dark:border-slate-800 rounded-xl px-4 py-3 text-sm focus:outline-none focus:border-sky-500/50 text-slate-900 dark:text-slate-100 placeholder:text-slate-450"
src/App.tsx:              />
src/App.tsx:            </div>
src/App.tsx:            <div>
src/App.tsx:              <label className="block text-[10px] font-bold text-slate-500 uppercase tracking-widest mb-2">Topic ID (Optional)</label>
src/App.tsx:              <input 
src/App.tsx:                type="text" 
src/App.tsx:                value={pathTopicId}
src/App.tsx:                onChange={(e) => setPathTopicId(e.target.value)}
src/App.tsx:                placeholder="e.g., 48"
src/App.tsx:                className="w-full bg-slate-100 dark:bg-slate-800 border border-slate-200 dark:border-slate-800 rounded-xl px-4 py-3 text-sm focus:outline-none focus:border-sky-500/50 text-slate-900 dark:text-slate-100 placeholder:text-slate-450"
src/App.tsx:              />
src/App.tsx:            </div>
src/App.tsx:            <button

server.ts:function formatISTTime(dateInput: Date | string | undefined): string {
server.ts:    if (!dateInput) return 'Never scanned';
server.ts:    const d = new Date(dateInput);
server.ts:    if (isNaN(d.getTime())) return 'Never scanned';
server.ts:    
server.ts:    // Add 5 hours and 30 minutes to get Indian Time (IST)
server.ts:    const istTime = new Date(d.getTime() + (5.5 * 60 * 60 * 1000));
server.ts:    
server.ts:    const pad = (num: number) => num.toString().padStart(2, '0');
server.ts:    const months = ['Jan', 'Feb', 'Mar', 'Apr', 'May', 'Jun', 'Jul', 'Aug', 'Sep', 'Oct', 'Nov', 'Dec'];
server.ts:    
server.ts:    const day = pad(istTime.getUTCDate());
server.ts:    const month = months[istTime.getUTCMonth()];
server.ts:    const year = istTime.getUTCFullYear();
server.ts:    
server.ts:    let hours = istTime.getUTCHours();
server.ts:    const minutes = pad(istTime.getUTCMinutes());
server.ts:    const seconds = pad(istTime.getUTCSeconds());
server.ts:    const ampm = hours >= 12 ? 'PM' : 'AM';
server.ts:    hours = hours % 12;
server.ts:    hours = hours ? hours : 12; // the hour '0' should be '12'
server.ts:    const strHours = pad(hours);
server.ts:    
server.ts:    return `${day} ${month} ${year}, ${strHours}:${minutes}:${seconds} ${ampm} (IST)`;
server.ts:}

server.ts:function addLog(level: string, ...args: any[]) {
server.ts:    try {
server.ts:        const text = args.map(arg => {
server.ts:            if (arg instanceof Error) return arg.message;
server.ts:            return typeof arg === 'object' ? JSON.stringify(arg) : String(arg);
server.ts:        }).join(' ');
server.ts:        const time = new Date().toLocaleTimeString('en-IN', { timeZone: 'Asia/Kolkata', hour12: false });
server.ts:        sysLogs.push(`[${time}] [${level}] ${text}`);
server.ts:        if (sysLogs.length > 500) sysLogs.shift();
server.ts:    } catch (e) {
server.ts:        // Safe fallback
server.ts:    }
server.ts:}

server.ts:async function getConnectedBotClient(): Promise<TelegramClient | null> {
server.ts:    if (botFloodWaitEnd > Date.now()) {
server.ts:        console.warn(`[Bot GramJS Client] Skipping connection, still in flood wait until ${new Date(botFloodWaitEnd).toISOString()}`);
server.ts:        return null;
server.ts:    }
server.ts:    if (!token) return null;
server.ts:    if (!apiIdValue || !apiHashValue) {
server.ts:        console.warn("[getConnectedBotClient] apiIdValue or apiHashValue is missing");
server.ts:        return null;
server.ts:    }
server.ts:    if (connectedBotClient && connectedBotClient.connected) {
server.ts:        return connectedBotClient;
server.ts:    }
server.ts:    let client: TelegramClient | null = null;
server.ts:    try {
server.ts:        console.log("[Bot GramJS Client] Connecting...");
server.ts:        client = new TelegramClient(
server.ts:            new StringSession(""),
server.ts:            apiIdValue,
server.ts:            apiHashValue,
server.ts:            {
server.ts:                connectionRetries: 10,
server.ts:                timeout: 120000,
server.ts:                requestRetries: 5,
server.ts:                ...getRandomDeviceProps(),
server.ts:                useWSS: false,
server.ts:                autoReconnect: true,
server.ts:            }
server.ts:        );
server.ts:        // Connect with a fast timeout wrapper to avoid hangs
server.ts:        const startPromise = client.start({
server.ts:            botAuthToken: token
server.ts:        });
server.ts:        let timeoutId: any;
server.ts:        const timeoutPromise = new Promise((_, reject) => {
server.ts:            timeoutId = setTimeout(() => reject(new Error("GramJS bot start timeout after 60000ms")), 60000);
server.ts:        });
server.ts:        await Promise.race([startPromise, timeoutPromise]);
server.ts:        clearTimeout(timeoutId);
server.ts:        (client as any)._isBotInApp = true;
server.ts:        connectedBotClient = client;
server.ts:        console.log("[Bot GramJS Client] Successfully connected!");
server.ts:        return connectedBotClient;
server.ts:    } catch (err: any) {
server.ts:        if (client) {
server.ts:            await client.disconnect().catch(() => {});
server.ts:        }
server.ts:        if (err.name === 'FloodWaitError' || (err.message && err.message.includes('FloodWaitError'))) {
server.ts:            const seconds = err.seconds || 1500;
server.ts:            botFloodWaitEnd = Date.now() + (seconds * 1000);
server.ts:            console.error(`[Bot GramJS Client] FloodWaitError, waiting ${seconds} seconds until ${new Date(botFloodWaitEnd).toISOString()}`);
server.ts:        } else {
server.ts:            console.error("[Bot GramJS Client] Failed to connect:", err);
server.ts:        }
server.ts:        connectedBotClient = null; // Ensure we try afresh next time
server.ts:        return null;
server.ts:    }
server.ts:}

server.ts:function getMsgId(url: string): number {
server.ts:    if (!url) return 0;
server.ts:    const parts = url.trim().split('/');
server.ts:    const last = parts[parts.length - 1];
server.ts:    return parseInt(last || '0');
server.ts:}
server.ts:
server.ts:function applyRenameRules(text: string, customRules?: Array<{ keyword: string; replaceWith: string }>): string {
server.ts:    if (!text) return "";
server.ts:    let result = text;
server.ts:    const rulesToUse = customRules || globalRenameRules || [];
server.ts:    for (const rule of rulesToUse) {
server.ts:        if (rule.keyword) {
server.ts:            try {
server.ts:                const escapedKeyword = rule.keyword.replace(/[-\/\\^$*+?.()|[\]{}]/g, '\\$&');
server.ts:                const regex = new RegExp(escapedKeyword, 'gi');
server.ts:                result = result.replace(regex, rule.replaceWith || "");
server.ts:            } catch (e) {
server.ts:                result = result.split(rule.keyword).join(rule.replaceWith || "");
server.ts:            }
server.ts:        }
server.ts:    }
server.ts:    return result;
server.ts:}
server.ts:
server.ts:const libraryPerfMetrics: Record<string, { totalBytes: number, totalTimeMs: number, count: number }> = {
server.ts:    'GramJS': { totalBytes: 0, totalTimeMs: 0, count: 0 },
server.ts:    'Telethon': { totalBytes: 0, totalTimeMs: 0, count: 0 },
server.ts:    'Pyrogram': { totalBytes: 0, totalTimeMs: 0, count: 0 },
server.ts:    'Hydrogram': { totalBytes: 0, totalTimeMs: 0, count: 0 }
server.ts:};
server.ts:
server.ts:const getAutoEngine = () => {
server.ts:    let bestLib = 'GramJS';
server.ts:    let maxSpeed = -1;
server.ts:    
server.ts:    for (const [lib, data] of Object.entries(libraryPerfMetrics)) {
server.ts:        if (data.count === 0) continue;
server.ts:        const speed = data.totalBytes / data.totalTimeMs; // bytes per ms
server.ts:        if (speed > maxSpeed) {
server.ts:            maxSpeed = speed;
server.ts:            bestLib = lib;
server.ts:        }
server.ts:    }
server.ts:    return bestLib;
server.ts:};
server.ts:
server.ts:const recordSpeed = (lib: string, bytes: number, timeMs: number) => {
server.ts:    if (!libraryPerfMetrics[lib]) return;
server.ts:    if (timeMs <= 0) return;
server.ts:    libraryPerfMetrics[lib].totalBytes += bytes;
server.ts:    libraryPerfMetrics[lib].totalTimeMs += timeMs;
server.ts:    libraryPerfMetrics[lib].count += 1;
server.ts:};
server.ts:
server.ts:const getEffectiveEngine = () => {
server.ts:    if (currentUploadEngine === 'Auto') return getAutoEngine();
server.ts:    return currentUploadEngine || 'GramJS';
server.ts:};

server.ts:const getLoginErrorSolution = (error: string) => {
server.ts:    if (error.includes('TIMEOUT')) return "Telegram servers are taking too long to respond. \n\n✅ **Solutions:** \n1. Check your **Proxy** settings in /settings.\n2. Try again in a few minutes.\n3. Make sure your account isn't restricted by Telegram.";
server.ts:    if (error.includes('429') || error.includes('Too Many Requests')) {
server.ts:        const match = error.match(/retry after (\d+)/);
server.ts:        const seconds = match ? parseInt(match[1]) : 3600;
server.ts:        const minutes = Math.ceil(seconds / 60);
server.ts:        return `Telegram ने सुरक्षा कारणों से बहुत अधिक requests के कारण ब्लॉक किया है। \n\n✅ **समाधान: कृपया ${minutes} मिनट तक प्रतीक्षा करें और फिर प्रयास करें।**`;
server.ts:    }
server.ts:    if (error.includes('PHONE_CODE_EXPIRED')) return "Telegram ने सुरक्षा कारणों से इस प्रयास को रोक दिया है। \n\n✅ **समाधान:** \n1. अपना **Proxy** बदलें (Magic Auto-fill उपयोग करें)। \n2. 15-20 मिनट इंतज़ार करें, फिर /login करें। \n3. OTP आने के बाद तुरंत न भेजें, 3-5 सेकंड रुकें।";
server.ts:    if (error.includes('AUTH_KEY_UNREGISTERED')) return "आपका Session String वैध नहीं है। कृपया नया String Session बनाएंगे।";
server.ts:    if (error.includes('FLOOD_WAIT')) return "Telegram ने आपको ब्लॉक किया है। कृपया 24-48 घंटे इंतज़ार करें।";
server.ts:    if (error.includes('PHONE_NUMBER_INVALID')) return "आपने गलत फोन नंबर डाला है। कृपया सही नंबर (जैसे +91...) उपयोग करें।";

server.ts:    if (error.includes('api_id_invalid')) return "आपका API ID या API Hash गलत है। इसे my.telegram.org से दोबारा चेक करें।";
server.ts:    return "अज्ञात त्रुटि। कृपया अपने API Creds और Network (Proxy) की जांच करें।";

server.ts:function getSecureHashedFileKey(msg: any): string | null {
server.ts:    if (!msg || !msg.media) return null;
server.ts:    let docId: string | null = null;
server.ts:    let size = 0;
server.ts:    let name = "file";
server.ts:    
server.ts:    if (msg.media instanceof Api.MessageMediaDocument && msg.media.document instanceof Api.Document) {
server.ts:        const doc = msg.media.document;
server.ts:        docId = doc.id ? doc.id.toString() : null;
server.ts:        size = Number(doc.size || 0);
server.ts:        const attr = doc.attributes.find((a: any) => a instanceof Api.DocumentAttributeFilename);
server.ts:        if (attr && (attr as any).fileName) {
server.ts:            name = (attr as any).fileName;
server.ts:        }
server.ts:    } else if (msg.media instanceof Api.MessageMediaPhoto && msg.media.photo instanceof Api.Photo) {
server.ts:        const photo = msg.media.photo;
server.ts:        docId = photo.id ? photo.id.toString() : null;
server.ts:        const largest = photo.sizes.reduce((prev: any, current: any) => {
server.ts:            const prevSize = prev.size || (prev.sizes && prev.sizes[0]) || 0;
server.ts:            const curSize = current.size || (current.sizes && current.sizes[0]) || 0;
server.ts:            return (curSize > prevSize) ? current : prev;
server.ts:        });
server.ts:        if (largest && (largest as any).size) size = (largest as any).size;
server.ts:        name = "photo.jpg";
server.ts:    }
server.ts:    
server.ts:    let baseKey = null;
server.ts:    if (docId) baseKey = `doc_id_${docId}`;
server.ts:    else if (size > 0) baseKey = `size_name_${size}_${name}`;
server.ts:    
server.ts:    if (!baseKey) return null;
server.ts:    return crypto.createHash('sha256').update(baseKey).digest('hex');
server.ts:}

server.ts:async function getOrCreateCachedFilesTopicId(client: any): Promise<number | undefined> {
server.ts:    if (globalCachedFilesTopicId !== null) {
server.ts:        return globalCachedFilesTopicId === -1 ? undefined : globalCachedFilesTopicId;
server.ts:    }
server.ts:    
server.ts:    if (settingsCollection) {
server.ts:        try {
server.ts:            const doc = await settingsCollection.findOne({ type: 'cached_files_topic' });
server.ts:            if (doc && doc.topicId !== undefined && doc.topicId !== null) {
server.ts:                globalCachedFilesTopicId = Number(doc.topicId);
server.ts:                return globalCachedFilesTopicId === -1 ? undefined : globalCachedFilesTopicId;
server.ts:            }
server.ts:        } catch (e) {
server.ts:            console.warn("[CacheLog] Error reading cached topic from DB:", e);
server.ts:        }
server.ts:    }
server.ts:    
server.ts:    try {
server.ts:        const logPeer = await safelyResolveEntity(client, DEFAULT_LOG_GROUP);
server.ts:        if (logPeer) {
server.ts:            console.log("[CacheLog] Creating Saved Files Cache topic in DEFAULT_LOG_GROUP...");
server.ts:            const result = await client.invoke(new Api.channels.CreateForumTopic({
server.ts:                channel: logPeer,
server.ts:                title: "📁 Saved Files Cache",
server.ts:                randomId: helpers.generateRandomLong(true)
server.ts:            }));
server.ts:            
server.ts:            let topicId: number | undefined;
server.ts:            if (result && result.updates) {
server.ts:                for (const update of result.updates) {
server.ts:                    if (update instanceof Api.UpdateNewMessage && update.message && (update.message as any).id) {
server.ts:                        topicId = (update.message as any).id;
server.ts:                        break;
server.ts:                    }
server.ts:                }
server.ts:            }
server.ts:            if (!topicId && result && result.updates) {
server.ts:                for (const update of result.updates) {
server.ts:                    if (update instanceof Api.UpdateMessageID && update.id) {
server.ts:                        topicId = update.id;
server.ts:                        break;
server.ts:                    }
server.ts:                }
server.ts:            }
server.ts:            if (topicId) {
server.ts:                globalCachedFilesTopicId = topicId;
server.ts:                if (settingsCollection) {
server.ts:                    await settingsCollection.updateOne(
server.ts:                        { type: 'cached_files_topic' },
server.ts:                        { $set: { topicId } },
server.ts:                        { upsert: true }
server.ts:                    ).catch(() => {});
server.ts:                }
server.ts:                console.log(`[CacheLog] Created new topic "📁 Saved Files Cache" with ThreadID: ${topicId}`);
server.ts:                return topicId;
server.ts:            }
server.ts:        }
server.ts:    } catch (e: any) {
server.ts:        const errStr = String(e?.message || e);
server.ts:        console.log(`[CacheLog] Log Group does not support forum topics (${errStr}). Falling back to main group directly.`);
server.ts:        globalCachedFilesTopicId = -1;
server.ts:        if (settingsCollection) {
server.ts:            await settingsCollection.updateOne(
server.ts:                { type: 'cached_files_topic' },
server.ts:                { $set: { topicId: -1 } },
server.ts:                { upsert: true }
server.ts:            ).catch(() => {});
server.ts:        }
server.ts:    }
server.ts:    return undefined;
server.ts:}

server.ts:async function resumeDownloadFile(
server.ts:    client: any,
server.ts:    msg: any,
server.ts:    tempFilePath: string,
server.ts:    jobKey: string,
server.ts:    onProgress: (chunkLength: number, totalSize: number) => Promise<void>
server.ts:): Promise<void> {
server.ts:    const media = msg.media;
server.ts:    if (!media) throw new Error("No media in message");
server.ts:
server.ts:    let totalSize = 0;
server.ts:    if (media instanceof Api.MessageMediaDocument && media.document instanceof Api.Document) {
server.ts:        totalSize = Number(media.document.size || 0);
server.ts:    } else if (media instanceof Api.MessageMediaPhoto && media.photo instanceof Api.Photo) {
server.ts:        const largest = media.photo.sizes.reduce((prev: any, current: any) => {
server.ts:            const prevSize = prev.size || (prev.sizes && prev.sizes[0]) || 0;
server.ts:            const curSize = current.size || (current.sizes && current.sizes[0]) || 0;
server.ts:            return (curSize > prevSize) ? current : prev;
server.ts:        });
server.ts:        if (largest && (largest as any).size) totalSize = (largest as any).size;
server.ts:    }
server.ts:
server.ts:    // Since we don't do complex byte-level resumption (which causes corruption and GramJS internal socket conflicts),
server.ts:    // we delete any partially downloaded file and start fresh.
server.ts:    if (fs.existsSync(tempFilePath)) {
server.ts:        try {
server.ts:            fs.unlinkSync(tempFilePath);
server.ts:        } catch (e) {}
server.ts:    }
server.ts:
server.ts:    let downloadWorkers = 4;
server.ts:    let partSizeKb = 512;
server.ts:
server.ts:    if (totalSize > 500 * 1024 * 1024) { // > 500 MB
server.ts:        downloadWorkers = 8;
server.ts:    } else if (totalSize > 100 * 1024 * 1024) { // > 100 MB
server.ts:        downloadWorkers = 6;
server.ts:    } else if (totalSize > 10 * 1024 * 1024) { // > 10 MB
server.ts:        downloadWorkers = 4;
server.ts:    } else {
server.ts:        downloadWorkers = 2;
server.ts:    }
server.ts:
server.ts:    let lastProgressTime = Date.now();
server.ts:    const DOWNLOAD_STALL_TIMEOUT = 180000;
server.ts:    let isFinished = false;
server.ts:
server.ts:    let stallInterval: NodeJS.Timeout | null = null;
server.ts:    try {
server.ts:        const downloadPromise = client.downloadMedia(msg, {
server.ts:            outputFile: tempFilePath,
server.ts:            workers: downloadWorkers,
server.ts:            partSizeKb: partSizeKb,
server.ts:            progressCallback: async (downloaded: any, total: any) => {
server.ts:                const taskState = taskControlMap.get(jobKey);
server.ts:                if (taskState && taskState.isPaused) throw new Error("DOWNLOAD_PAUSED");
server.ts:                if (taskState && taskState.isSkipped) throw new Error("DOWNLOAD_SKIPPED");
server.ts:                
server.ts:                lastProgressTime = Date.now();
server.ts:                await onProgress(Number(downloaded), Number(total || totalSize || 0));
server.ts:            }
server.ts:        });
server.ts:
server.ts:        const monitorPromise = new Promise<void>((_, reject) => {
server.ts:            stallInterval = setInterval(() => {
server.ts:                if (isFinished) {
server.ts:                    if (stallInterval) clearInterval(stallInterval);
server.ts:                    return;
server.ts:                }
server.ts:                const taskState = taskControlMap.get(jobKey);
server.ts:                if (taskState && taskState.isSkipped) return reject(new Error("DOWNLOAD_SKIPPED"));
server.ts:                if (taskState && taskState.isPaused) {
server.ts:                    lastProgressTime = Date.now();
server.ts:                    return;
server.ts:                }
server.ts:                if (Date.now() - lastProgressTime > DOWNLOAD_STALL_TIMEOUT) {
server.ts:                    return reject(new Error("DOWNLOAD_TIMEOUT_STALLED"));
server.ts:                }
server.ts:            }, 5000);
server.ts:        });
server.ts:
server.ts:        await Promise.race([downloadPromise, monitorPromise]);
server.ts:        isFinished = true;
server.ts:    } finally {
server.ts:        if (stallInterval) clearInterval(stallInterval);
server.ts:    }
server.ts:}
server.ts:
server.ts:function getDestinationLink(): string {
server.ts:    const defaultLink = 'https://t.me/telegram';
server.ts:    if (!destinationChatId) return defaultLink;
server.ts:    let val = destinationChatId.toString().trim();
server.ts:    if (!val) return defaultLink;
server.ts:
server.ts:    if (val.startsWith('https://') || val.startsWith('http://')) {
server.ts:        return val;
server.ts:    }
server.ts:    if (val.startsWith('t.me/')) {
server.ts:        return 'https://' + val;
server.ts:    }
server.ts:    if (val.startsWith('@')) {
server.ts:        return 'https://t.me/' + val.substring(1);
server.ts:    }
server.ts:
server.ts:    if (/^-?\d+$/.test(val)) {
server.ts:        let cleanId = val;
server.ts:        if (cleanId.startsWith('-100')) {
server.ts:            cleanId = cleanId.substring(4);
server.ts:        } else if (cleanId.startsWith('-')) {
server.ts:            cleanId = cleanId.substring(1);
server.ts:        }
server.ts:        return `https://t.me/c/${cleanId}/999999`;
server.ts:    }
server.ts:
server.ts:    return `https://t.me/${val}`;
server.ts:}

server.ts:const escapeMarkdown = (text: string) => {
server.ts:    return text.replace(/([_*[\]()~`>#+\-=|{}.!])/g, '\\$1');

server.ts:
server.ts:const safeBotCall = async (method: string, ...args: any[]) => {
server.ts:    let retries = 0;
server.ts:    const maxRetries = 5;
server.ts:    while (retries < maxRetries) {
server.ts:        try {
server.ts:            return await (bot as any)?.[method](...args);
server.ts:        } catch (e: any) {
server.ts:            const is429 = e.error_code === 429 || e.message?.includes('429');
server.ts:            const isNetworkError = e.message?.includes('TIMEOUT') || e.message?.includes('ETIMEDOUT') || e.message?.includes('socket hang up') || e.message?.includes('ECONNRESET') || e.message?.includes('ECONNREFUSED');
server.ts:            if ((is429 || isNetworkError) && retries < maxRetries - 1) {
server.ts:                let retryAfter = 15;
server.ts:                if (is429) {
server.ts:                    // Try to get from parameters
server.ts:                    if (e.parameters?.retry_after) {
server.ts:                        retryAfter = e.parameters.retry_after;
server.ts:                    } else {
server.ts:                        // Try to parse from message: "429 Too Many Requests: retry after 1357"
server.ts:                        const match = e.message.match(/retry after (\d+)/);
server.ts:                        if (match) {
server.ts:                            retryAfter = parseInt(match[1], 10);
server.ts:                        }
server.ts:                    }
server.ts:                }
server.ts:                
server.ts:                // Add a small buffer
server.ts:                const waitTime = (is429 ? (retryAfter + 5) : 3) * 1000;
server.ts:                
server.ts:                console.log(`[Bot API] Temporary issue (${e.message}) on ${method}. Waiting ${Math.round(waitTime / 1000)}s (Attempt ${retries + 1}/${maxRetries})...`);
server.ts:                await sleep(waitTime);
server.ts:                retries++;
server.ts:                continue;
server.ts:            }
server.ts:            
server.ts:            // Special handling for common errors
server.ts:            if (e.message?.includes("can't parse entities")) {
server.ts:                console.error(`[Bot API] Parse mode error on ${method}. args: ${JSON.stringify(args)}`);
server.ts:                if (args.length > 0 && typeof args[args.length - 1] === 'object') {
server.ts:                    const options = { ...args[args.length - 1] };
server.ts:                    if (options.parse_mode) {
server.ts:                        console.warn(`[Bot API] Parse mode error on ${method}. Text: ${args[0]}. Retrying without parse_mode.`);
server.ts:                        delete options.parse_mode;
server.ts:                        args[args.length - 1] = options;
server.ts:                        retries++;
server.ts:                        continue;
server.ts:                    }
server.ts:                }
server.ts:            }
server.ts:
server.ts:            if (e.message?.includes('TOPIC_CLOSED') || e.message?.includes('message thread not found')) {
server.ts:                if (args.length > 0 && typeof args[args.length - 1] === 'object') {
server.ts:                    const options = { ...args[args.length - 1] };
server.ts:                    if (options.message_thread_id || options.reply_to_message_id) {
server.ts:                        console.warn(`[Bot API] Topic error on ${method}. Retrying without thread context.`);
server.ts:                        delete options.message_thread_id;
server.ts:                        delete options.reply_to_message_id;
server.ts:                        args[args.length - 1] = options;
server.ts:                        retries++;
server.ts:                        continue;
server.ts:                    }
server.ts:                }
server.ts:            }
server.ts:
server.ts:            if (is429) throw e; // RETHROW if max retries reached
server.ts:            
server.ts:            if (e.message?.includes('message is not modified')) {
server.ts:                return true;
server.ts:            }
server.ts:            
server.ts:            // For other errors, log and potentially return null if it's an optional call
server.ts:            const msgLower = (e.message || '').toLowerCase();
server.ts:            const isExpectedSilent = msgLower.includes("message is not modified") || 
server.ts:                                     msgLower.includes("there is no text in the message") ||
server.ts:                                     msgLower.includes("message can't be edited") ||
server.ts:                                     msgLower.includes("chat not found") ||
server.ts:                                     msgLower.includes("message to delete not found") ||
server.ts:                                     msgLower.includes("inline keyboard expected") ||
server.ts:                                     msgLower.includes("message to edit not found");
server.ts:            
server.ts:            if (!isExpectedSilent) {
server.ts:                console.error(`[Bot API] Error on ${method}:`, e.message);
server.ts:            }
server.ts:            return null;
server.ts:        }
server.ts:    }
server.ts:    return null;
server.ts:};
server.ts:
server.ts:const ensureSafeMessageLength = (text: string): string => {
server.ts:    if (!text || text.length <= 4000) return text;
server.ts:    let truncated = text.substring(0, 3950);
server.ts:    truncated += "\n...(truncated due to length limit)";
server.ts:    const tripleBacktickCount = (truncated.match(/```/g) || []).length;
server.ts:    if (tripleBacktickCount % 2 === 1) {
server.ts:        truncated += "\n```";
server.ts:    }
server.ts:    return truncated;
server.ts:};
server.ts:
server.ts:const safeSendMessage = async (chatId: number, text: string, options: any = {}) => {
server.ts:    const safeText = ensureSafeMessageLength(text);
server.ts:    try {
server.ts:        await bot.sendChatAction(chatId, 'typing');
server.ts:    } catch(e) {}
server.ts:    return await safeBotCall('sendMessage', chatId, safeText, options);
server.ts:};
server.ts:
server.ts:const safeEditMessage = async (text: string, options: { chat_id: number, message_id: number, parse_mode?: any, disable_web_page_preview?: boolean, reply_markup?: any }) => {
server.ts:    if (!options.message_id || options.message_id === 0) return;
server.ts:    const safeText = ensureSafeMessageLength(text);
server.ts:    
server.ts:    // 1. Attempt editMessageText
server.ts:    const res = await safeBotCall('editMessageText', safeText, options);
server.ts:    if (res) return res;
server.ts:
server.ts:    // 2. Fallback: Attempt editMessageCaption
server.ts:    const resCaption = await safeBotCall('editMessageCaption', safeText, {
server.ts:        chat_id: options.chat_id,
server.ts:        message_id: options.message_id,
server.ts:        parse_mode: options.parse_mode,
server.ts:        reply_markup: options.reply_markup
server.ts:    });
server.ts:    if (resCaption) return resCaption;
server.ts:
server.ts:    // 3. Ultimate Fallback: Delete and send new text message
server.ts:    try {
server.ts:        await safeBotCall('deleteMessage', options.chat_id, options.message_id).catch(() => {});
server.ts:        return await safeSendMessage(options.chat_id, safeText, {
server.ts:            parse_mode: options.parse_mode,
server.ts:            disable_web_page_preview: options.disable_web_page_preview,
server.ts:            reply_markup: options.reply_markup
server.ts:        });
server.ts:    } catch (e3: any) {
server.ts:        return null;
server.ts:    }
server.ts:};

server.ts:async function saveRecentSource(userId: number, sourceId: string, sourceName: string) {
server.ts:    if (!approvedUsersCollection) return;
server.ts:    try {
server.ts:        const settingsUid = await resolveSettingsUserId(userId);
server.ts:        const userDoc = await approvedUsersCollection.findOne({ userId: settingsUid });
server.ts:        let recent = userDoc?.recentSources || [];
server.ts:        recent = recent.filter((r: any) => r.sourceId !== sourceId);
server.ts:        recent.unshift({ sourceId, sourceName });
server.ts:        if (recent.length > 10) recent = recent.slice(0, 10);
server.ts:        
server.ts:        await approvedUsersCollection.updateOne(
server.ts:            { userId: settingsUid },
server.ts:            { $set: { recentSources: recent } }
server.ts:        );
server.ts:    } catch (e) {
server.ts:        console.error("Error saving recent source:", e);
server.ts:    }
server.ts:}

server.ts:async function saveRecentDestination(userId: number, destId: string, groupName: string) {
server.ts:    if (!approvedUsersCollection) return;
server.ts:    try {
server.ts:        const settingsUid = await resolveSettingsUserId(userId);
server.ts:        const userDoc = await approvedUsersCollection.findOne({ userId: settingsUid });
server.ts:        let recent = userDoc?.recentDestinations || [];
server.ts:        recent = recent.filter((r: any) => r.destId !== destId);
server.ts:        recent.unshift({ destId, groupName });
server.ts:        if (recent.length > 10) recent = recent.slice(0, 10);
server.ts:        
server.ts:        await approvedUsersCollection.updateOne(
server.ts:            { userId: settingsUid },
server.ts:            { $set: { recentDestinations: recent } }
server.ts:        );
server.ts:    } catch (e) {
server.ts:        console.error("Error saving recent destination:", e);
server.ts:    }
server.ts:}
server.ts:
server.ts:async function updateTopicCloneProgress(sessionId: string) {
server.ts:    const session = activeTopicCloneSessions.get(sessionId);
server.ts:    if (!session) return;
server.ts:    
server.ts:    const { chatId, statusMsgId, totalFiles, processedFiles, successCount, failedCount, topicTitle, sourceGroupId, destGroupId, startTime } = session;
server.ts:    
server.ts:    const filePercentage = totalFiles > 0 ? Math.round((processedFiles / totalFiles) * 100) : 0;
server.ts:    
server.ts:    const barLength = 12;
server.ts:    const filledLength = Math.round((filePercentage / 100) * barLength);
server.ts:    const emptyLength = barLength - filledLength;
server.ts:    const bar = '▰'.repeat(filledLength) + '▱'.repeat(emptyLength);
server.ts:    
server.ts:    let estTimeStr = '';
server.ts:    if (processedFiles > 0) {
server.ts:        const elapsedMs = Date.now() - startTime;
server.ts:        const msPerFile = elapsedMs / processedFiles;
server.ts:        const remainingFiles = totalFiles - processedFiles;
server.ts:        const estRemainingMs = msPerFile * remainingFiles;
server.ts:        const totalSecs = Math.round(estRemainingMs / 1000);
server.ts:        if (totalSecs < 60) {
server.ts:            estTimeStr = `${totalSecs}s`;
server.ts:        } else {
server.ts:            const minutes = Math.floor(totalSecs / 60);
server.ts:            const seconds = totalSecs % 60;
server.ts:            estTimeStr = `${minutes}m ${seconds}s`;
server.ts:        }
server.ts:    }
server.ts:    
server.ts:    const isFinished = processedFiles >= totalFiles;
server.ts:    
server.ts:    let text = `┏━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━┓\n` +
server.ts:               `┃ 📍 𝗧𝗢𝗣𝗜𝗖 𝗖𝗟𝗢𝗡𝗘 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗚𝗥𝗘𝗦𝗦 ┃\n` +
server.ts:               `┗━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━┛\n\n` +
server.ts:               `📚 𝗧𝗼𝗽𝗶𝗰\n` +
server.ts:               `└➤ ${topicTitle || 'No Title'}\n\n` +
server.ts:               `╭─────── 📊 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗜𝗦𝗧𝗜𝗖𝗦 ──╮\n` +
server.ts:               `│ 📦 𝗧𝗼𝘁𝗮𝗹 𝗙𝗶𝗹𝗲𝘀 : ${totalFiles}\n` +
server.ts:               `│ 🔄 𝗣𝗿𝗼𝗰𝗲𝘀𝘀𝗲𝗱   : ${processedFiles} / ${totalFiles}\n` +
server.ts:               `│ 🟢 𝗦𝘂𝗰𝗰𝗲𝘀𝘀     : ${successCount}\n` +
server.ts:               `│ 🔴 𝗙𝗮𝗶𝗹𝗲𝗱      : ${failedCount}\n` +
server.ts:               `│ ⏳ 𝗥𝗲𝗺𝗮𝗶𝗻𝗶𝗻𝗴   : ${totalFiles - processedFiles}\n` +
server.ts:               `│ 🕒 𝗘𝗧𝗔         : ${estTimeStr}\n` +
server.ts:               `╰──────────────────────╯\n\n` +
server.ts:               `🚀 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗚𝗥𝗘𝗦𝗦\n` +
server.ts:               `${bar} ${filePercentage}%\n` +
server.ts:               `━━━━━━━━━━━━━`;
server.ts:               
server.ts:    if (isFinished) {
server.ts:        text += `\n\n🎉 **All specific topic tasks completed!**`;
server.ts:    }
server.ts:    
server.ts:    await safeEditMessage(text, { 
server.ts:        chat_id: chatId, 
server.ts:        message_id: statusMsgId, 
server.ts:        parse_mode: 'Markdown'
server.ts:    }).catch((err: any) => {
server.ts:        console.warn(`[Topic Clone Progress] Failed to edit message for session ${sessionId}:`, err.message);
server.ts:    });
server.ts:    
server.ts:    if (isFinished) {
server.ts:        activeTopicCloneSessions.delete(sessionId);
server.ts:        
server.ts:        // Pin the completed status bar
server.ts:        try {
server.ts:            await safeBotCall('pinChatMessage', chatId, String(statusMsgId), { disable_notification: false });
server.ts:        } catch (pinErr: any) {
server.ts:            console.error("[Topic Clone Profile] pinChatMessage failed on finished:", pinErr.message);
server.ts:        }
server.ts:        
server.ts:        // Notify user in chat
server.ts:        try {
server.ts:            await safeSendMessage(chatId, `🔔 **Notification:** Specific Topic Clone task Completed!\n\nSare task khatm ho gaya inside topic \`${topicTitle}\`.`);
server.ts:        } catch(e) {
server.ts:            console.error("Error sending topic clone completion notification", e);
server.ts:        }
server.ts:    }

server.ts:async function resumeFullMirrorSession(chatId: number, sessionId: string, triggerQuery: any) {
server.ts:    if (!fullMirrorSessionsCollection) {
server.ts:        throw new Error("Database not ready.");
server.ts:    }
server.ts:    const session = await fullMirrorSessionsCollection.findOne({ sessionId });

server.ts:        throw new Error("Session tracker not found in database.");
server.ts:    }

server.ts:    if (!sourceId || !dest) {
server.ts:        throw new Error("Invalid session backup data.");
server.ts:    }

server.ts:    // Clean up any pending tasks for this session from database and in-memory queue to start fresh

server.ts:        }
server.ts:    }

server.ts:        await queuedTasksCollection.deleteMany({ fullMirrorSessionId: sessionId }).catch(() => {});
server.ts:    }

server.ts:    const client = await getConnectedUserbotClient(targetUid);
server.ts:    if (!client) throw new Error("Your Userbot session is not active. Please reconnect first.");
server.ts:
server.ts:    let sourceEntity: any;
server.ts:    try {
server.ts:        sourceEntity = await safelyResolveFullEntity(client, sourceId);
server.ts:    } catch (e: any) {
server.ts:        if (!sourceId.startsWith('-100') && !isNaN(Number(sourceId))) {
server.ts:            sourceEntity = await safelyResolveFullEntity(client, "-100" + sourceId);
server.ts:        } else {
server.ts:            throw e;
server.ts:        }
server.ts:    }
server.ts:    
server.ts:    const destPath = dest.destId;
server.ts:    let destEntity: any = null;
server.ts:    try {
server.ts:        destEntity = await safelyResolveFullEntity(client, destPath);
server.ts:    } catch (e: any) {
server.ts:        if (!destPath.startsWith('-100') && !isNaN(Number(destPath))) {
server.ts:            destEntity = await safelyResolveFullEntity(client, "-100" + destPath).catch(() => null);
server.ts:        }
server.ts:    }
server.ts:    if (!destEntity) {
server.ts:        throw new Error("Could not access destination group.");
server.ts:    }
server.ts:
server.ts:    let sourceTopics: Record<number, string> = {};
server.ts:    let destTopics: Record<string, number> = {};
server.ts:    const destTopicsTitleMap: Record<number, string> = {};
server.ts:    const isSourceForum = (sourceEntity as any).forum;
server.ts:    const isDestForum = (destEntity as any).forum;
server.ts:
server.ts:    if (isSourceForum) {
server.ts:        try {
server.ts:            const res: any = await client.invoke(new Api.channels.GetForumTopics({ channel: sourceEntity, offsetDate: 0, offsetId: 0, offsetTopic: 0, limit: 100 }));
server.ts:            res.topics?.forEach((t: any) => {
server.ts:                if (t.title) sourceTopics[t.id] = t.title;
server.ts:            });
server.ts:        } catch (e) {
server.ts:            console.warn("Failed to fetch source topics:", e);
server.ts:        }
server.ts:    }
server.ts:
server.ts:    if (isDestForum) {
server.ts:        try {
server.ts:            const res: any = await client.invoke(new Api.channels.GetForumTopics({ channel: destEntity, offsetDate: 0, offsetId: 0, offsetTopic: 0, limit: 100 }));
server.ts:            res.topics?.forEach((t: any) => {
server.ts:                if (t.title) {
server.ts:                    destTopics[t.title.trim().toLowerCase()] = t.id;
server.ts:                    destTopicsTitleMap[t.id] = t.title;
server.ts:                }
server.ts:            });
server.ts:        } catch (e) {
server.ts:            console.warn("Failed to fetch destination topics:", e);
server.ts:        }
server.ts:    }
server.ts:
server.ts:    const sourceIdRaw = (sourceEntity as any).id?.toString() || "";
server.ts:    const sourceIdClean = sourceIdRaw.replace('-100', '');
server.ts:
server.ts:    const alreadyMirroredDocs = mirroredMessagesCollection ? 
server.ts:          await mirroredMessagesCollection.find({ destId: destPath }).toArray() : [];
server.ts:    const alreadyMirroredLinks = new Set(alreadyMirroredDocs.map((doc: any) => doc.link));
server.ts:
server.ts:    // Load blocked topics to skip
server.ts:    const userDoc = await approvedUsersCollection?.findOne({ userId: targetUid.toString() });
server.ts:    const blockedTopics = (userDoc?.blockedTopics || []).map((t: string) => t.trim().toLowerCase());
server.ts:
server.ts:    const msgsToQueue = [];
server.ts:    const topicMap: Record<number, number | undefined> = {};
server.ts:    let latestMsgId = 0;
server.ts:    let skippedCount = 0;
server.ts:
server.ts:    for await (const m of client.iterMessages(sourceEntity, { reverse: true, limit: undefined })) {
server.ts:        if (m.action) continue; 
server.ts:        if (!m.message && !m.media) continue;
server.ts:
server.ts:        if (m.id > latestMsgId) {
server.ts:            latestMsgId = m.id;
server.ts:        }
server.ts:
server.ts:        const virtualLink = `https://t.me/c/${sourceIdClean}/${m.id}`;
server.ts:        if (alreadyMirroredLinks.has(virtualLink)) {
server.ts:            skippedCount++;
server.ts:            continue;
server.ts:        }
server.ts:
server.ts:        let overrideThreadId: number | undefined = dest.destThreadId; // Base thread ID
server.ts:        let sourceTopicId: number | undefined;
server.ts:
server.ts:        if (isSourceForum && isDestForum && (m as any).replyTo) {
server.ts:            const replyTo = (m as any).replyTo;
server.ts:            sourceTopicId = replyTo.replyToTopId || replyTo.replyToMsgId;
server.ts:            
server.ts:            if (sourceTopicId) {
server.ts:                const topicTitle = sourceTopics[sourceTopicId];
server.ts:                if (topicTitle) {
server.ts:                    const normTitle = topicTitle.trim().toLowerCase();
server.ts:                    // Skip if blocked
server.ts:                    if (blockedTopics.some((bt: string) => bt === normTitle || bt === sourceTopicId!.toString())) {
server.ts:                        skippedCount++;
server.ts:                        continue;
server.ts:                    }
server.ts:
server.ts:                    if (topicMap[sourceTopicId] !== undefined) {
server.ts:                        overrideThreadId = topicMap[sourceTopicId] ?? dest.destThreadId;
server.ts:                    } else {
server.ts:                        const normalizedTitle = topicTitle.trim().toLowerCase();
server.ts:                        if (destTopics[normalizedTitle]) {
server.ts:                            topicMap[sourceTopicId] = destTopics[normalizedTitle];
server.ts:                            overrideThreadId = destTopics[normalizedTitle];
server.ts:                        } else {
server.ts:                            try {
server.ts:                                const createResult: any = await client.invoke(new Api.channels.CreateForumTopic({
server.ts:                                    channel: destEntity,
server.ts:                                    title: topicTitle
server.ts:                                }));
server.ts:                                const update = createResult.updates?.find((u: any) => u.className === 'UpdateNewForumTopic');
server.ts:                                let newDestTopicId = update?.topicId;
server.ts:                                
server.ts:                                if (!newDestTopicId) {
server.ts:                                    const retryTopics: any = await client.invoke(new Api.channels.GetForumTopics({ channel: destEntity, limit: 100 }));
server.ts:                                    newDestTopicId = retryTopics.topics?.find((t: any) => t.title?.trim().toLowerCase() === normalizedTitle)?.id;
server.ts:                                }
server.ts:                                
server.ts:                                if (newDestTopicId) {
server.ts:                                    destTopics[normalizedTitle] = newDestTopicId;
server.ts:                                    destTopicsTitleMap[newDestTopicId] = topicTitle;
server.ts:                                    topicMap[sourceTopicId] = newDestTopicId;
server.ts:                                    overrideThreadId = newDestTopicId;
server.ts:                                }
server.ts:                            } catch (e) {
server.ts:                                console.warn(`Failed to create topic ${topicTitle}:`, e);
server.ts:                                topicMap[sourceTopicId] = undefined;
server.ts:                            }
server.ts:                        }
server.ts:                    }
server.ts:                }
server.ts:            }
server.ts:        }
server.ts:
server.ts:        msgsToQueue.push({ 
server.ts:            chatId, 
server.ts:            link: virtualLink, 
server.ts:            userId: triggerQuery.from.id,
server.ts:            forceGeneralPath: true,
server.ts:            overrideThreadId,
server.ts:            overrideTargetId: destPath,
server.ts:            isMirror: true
server.ts:         });
server.ts:    }
server.ts:
server.ts:    if (msgsToQueue.length === 0) {
server.ts:        throw new Error(`All remaining messages are already successfully mirrored or skipped.`);
server.ts:    }
server.ts:
server.ts:    // Sort by topic
server.ts:    const tasksByTopic = new Map<string | number, any[]>();
server.ts:    const generalTasks: any[] = [];
server.ts:
server.ts:    for (const task of msgsToQueue) {
server.ts:        if (task.overrideThreadId !== undefined && task.overrideThreadId !== null) {
server.ts:            if (!tasksByTopic.has(task.overrideThreadId)) {
server.ts:                tasksByTopic.set(task.overrideThreadId, []);
server.ts:            }
server.ts:            tasksByTopic.get(task.overrideThreadId)!.push(task);
server.ts:        } else {
server.ts:            generalTasks.push(task);
server.ts:        }
server.ts:    }
server.ts:
server.ts:    const orderedTasks: any[] = [];
server.ts:    if (generalTasks.length > 0) {
server.ts:        orderedTasks.push(...generalTasks);
server.ts:    }
server.ts:    for (const [topicId, tasks] of tasksByTopic.entries()) {
server.ts:        orderedTasks.push(...tasks);
server.ts:    }
server.ts:
server.ts:    // Re-create new topic stats and session object
server.ts:    const topicStats: Record<string | number, { total: number; processed: number; isMarkedCompleted: boolean; title: string }> = {};
server.ts:
server.ts:    for (const task of orderedTasks) {
server.ts:        task.fullMirrorSessionId = sessionId;
server.ts:
server.ts:        const threadId = task.overrideThreadId !== undefined && task.overrideThreadId !== null ? task.overrideThreadId : 'general';
server.ts:        const topicTitle = task.overrideThreadId !== undefined && task.overrideThreadId !== null ? (destTopicsTitleMap[task.overrideThreadId] || `Topic #${task.overrideThreadId}`) : 'General Discussion';
server.ts:
server.ts:        if (!topicStats[threadId]) {
server.ts:            topicStats[threadId] = {
server.ts:                total: 0,
server.ts:                processed: 0,
server.ts:                isMarkedCompleted: false,
server.ts:                title: topicTitle
server.ts:            };
server.ts:        }
server.ts:        topicStats[threadId].total++;
server.ts:    }
server.ts:
server.ts:    // Update session tracker in mongoDB and memory
server.ts:    const updatedSession = {
server.ts:        ...session,
server.ts:        totalFiles: orderedTasks.length,
server.ts:        processedFiles: 0,
server.ts:        successCount: 0,
server.ts:        failedCount: 0,
server.ts:        topicStats
server.ts:    };
server.ts:
server.ts:    activeFullMirrorSessions.set(sessionId, updatedSession);
server.ts:    await fullMirrorSessionsCollection.updateOne({ sessionId }, { $set: updatedSession });
server.ts:
server.ts:    // Trigger initial progress bar write/re-write
server.ts:    await updateGlobalMirrorProgress(sessionId).catch(pErr => console.error("[Resume Progress Update Failed]", pErr));
server.ts:
server.ts:    // Enqueue
server.ts:    taskQueue.push(...orderedTasks);
server.ts:    dbEnqueueTasks(orderedTasks).catch(e => console.error("[Queue DB] Bulk enqueue error during resume:", e));
server.ts:    runNextTask();
server.ts:
server.ts:    return orderedTasks.length;
server.ts:}

server.ts:async function updateGlobalMirrorProgress(sessionId: string) {
server.ts:    const session = activeFullMirrorSessions.get(sessionId);
server.ts:    if (!session) return;
server.ts:    
server.ts:    const { chatId, statusMsgId, totalFiles, processedFiles, successCount, failedCount, topicStats } = session;
server.ts:    
server.ts:    // Find active topic title
server.ts:    let activeTopicName = 'General Discussion';
server.ts:    let completedTopics = 0;
server.ts:    const totalTopics = Object.keys(topicStats).length;
server.ts:    
server.ts:    for (const threadId of Object.keys(topicStats)) {
server.ts:        const stats = topicStats[threadId];
server.ts:        if (stats.processed < stats.total) {
server.ts:            // First non-completed topic is considered the active one
server.ts:            activeTopicName = stats.title;
server.ts:        }
server.ts:        if (stats.processed >= stats.total) {
server.ts:            completedTopics++;
server.ts:        }
server.ts:    }
server.ts:    
server.ts:    const filePercentage = totalFiles > 0 ? Math.round((processedFiles / totalFiles) * 100) : 0;
server.ts:    
server.ts:    // Build beautiful progress bar (length 15)
server.ts:    const barLength = 15;
server.ts:    const filledLength = Math.round((filePercentage / 100) * barLength);
server.ts:    const emptyLength = barLength - filledLength;
server.ts:    const bar = '█'.repeat(filledLength) + '░'.repeat(emptyLength);
server.ts:    
server.ts:    const isFinished = processedFiles >= totalFiles;
server.ts:    
server.ts:    let text = `📍 **[GLOBAL PROGRESS] Full Group Mirror Setup**\n\n` +
server.ts:               `📁 **Total Files inside Group:** \`${totalFiles}\`\n` +
server.ts:               `⏳ **Processed:** \`${processedFiles} / ${totalFiles}\` ` +
server.ts:               `(🟢 Success: \`${successCount}\` | 🔴 Failed: \`${failedCount}\`)\n\n` +
server.ts:               `👉 **Mirror Progress Bar:**\n` +
server.ts:               `\`[${bar}]\` **${filePercentage}%**\n\n` +
server.ts:               `📌 **Total Topics:** \`${totalTopics}\`\n` +
server.ts:               `✅ **Completed Topics:** \`${completedTopics} / ${totalTopics}\`\n\n` +
server.ts:               `🔄 **Current Active Topic:** \`${activeTopicName}\`\n` +
server.ts:               `└ _Status:_ ${isFinished ? '🟢 Mirroring Completed!' : '⏳ Mirroring contents...'}\n\n` +
server.ts:               `━━━━━━━\n` +
server.ts:               `_This pinned status bar tracks the entire folder mirroring process in real-time._`;
server.ts:               
server.ts:    if (isFinished) {
server.ts:        text += `\n\n🎉 **Full Mirror completed successfully!**`;
server.ts:    }
server.ts:    
server.ts:    await safeEditMessage(text, { 
server.ts:        chat_id: chatId, 
server.ts:        message_id: statusMsgId, 
server.ts:        parse_mode: 'Markdown',
server.ts:        reply_markup: {
server.ts:            inline_keyboard: [
server.ts:                [{ text: '🚫 Block This or Any Topic', callback_data: `add_blocked_topic_start` }]
server.ts:            ]
server.ts:        }
server.ts:    }).catch((err: any) => {
server.ts:        console.warn(`[Progress Update] Failed to edit message for session ${sessionId}:`, err.message);
server.ts:    });
server.ts:    
server.ts:    if (isFinished) {
server.ts:        activeFullMirrorSessions.delete(sessionId);
server.ts:        if (fullMirrorSessionsCollection) {
server.ts:            await fullMirrorSessionsCollection.deleteOne({ sessionId }).catch(() => {});
server.ts:        }
server.ts:    } else {
server.ts:        if (fullMirrorSessionsCollection) {
server.ts:            await fullMirrorSessionsCollection.replaceOne({ sessionId }, session, { upsert: true }).catch(() => {});
server.ts:        }
server.ts:    }
server.ts:}
server.ts:
server.ts:async function safelyResolveEntity(client: TelegramClient, entity: any): Promise<any> {
server.ts:    try {
server.ts:        if (!entity) throw new Error("Entity is undefined");
server.ts:
server.ts:        let lookupEntity = entity;
server.ts:
server.ts:        // A. If entity is a string but is actually JSON containing PeerChannel, parse it first
server.ts:        if (typeof entity === 'string' && entity.trim().startsWith('{')) {
server.ts:            try {
server.ts:                const parsed = JSON.parse(entity);
server.ts:                entity = parsed;
server.ts:                lookupEntity = parsed;
server.ts:            } catch (jsonErr) {}
server.ts:        }
server.ts:
server.ts:        // B. Handle raw Peer or Entity objects (PeerChannel, PeerUser, Channel, User, Chat, etc)
server.ts:        if (typeof entity === 'object' && entity !== null) {
server.ts:            if (entity.className === 'PeerChannel' && entity.channelId) {
server.ts:                const cid = entity.channelId.toString();
server.ts:                lookupEntity = cid.startsWith('-100') ? cid : "-100" + cid;
server.ts:            } else if (entity.className === 'PeerUser' && entity.userId) {
server.ts:                lookupEntity = entity.userId.toString();
server.ts:            } else if (entity.className === 'PeerChat' && entity.chatId) {
server.ts:                lookupEntity = entity.chatId.toString();
server.ts:            } else if (entity.className === 'Channel' && entity.id) {
server.ts:                const cid = entity.id.toString();
server.ts:                lookupEntity = cid.startsWith('-100') ? cid : "-100" + cid;
server.ts:            } else if (entity.className === 'Chat' && entity.id) {
server.ts:                lookupEntity = entity.id.toString();
server.ts:            } else if (entity.className === 'User' && entity.id) {
server.ts:                lookupEntity = entity.id.toString();
server.ts:            } else if (entity.id) {
server.ts:                const idStr = entity.id.toString();
server.ts:                if (entity.className && (entity.className.toLowerCase().includes('channel') || entity.className.toLowerCase().includes('chat'))) {
server.ts:                    lookupEntity = idStr.startsWith('-100') ? idStr : "-100" + idStr;
server.ts:                } else {
server.ts:                    lookupEntity = idStr;
server.ts:                }
server.ts:            }
server.ts:        }
server.ts:
server.ts:        // C. Clean duplicate/unbalanced prefixes
server.ts:        if (typeof lookupEntity === 'string' || typeof lookupEntity === 'number') {
server.ts:            let idStr = lookupEntity.toString().trim();
server.ts:            while (idStr.startsWith('-100-100')) {
server.ts:                idStr = "-100" + idStr.substring(8);
server.ts:            }
server.ts:            if (/^\d+$/.test(idStr)) {
server.ts:                if (idStr.length >= 9) {
server.ts:                    lookupEntity = "-100" + idStr;
server.ts:                } else {
server.ts:                    lookupEntity = idStr;
server.ts:                }
server.ts:            } else if (idStr.startsWith('-100')) {
server.ts:                lookupEntity = idStr;
server.ts:            } else if (idStr.startsWith('-')) {
server.ts:                const absStr = idStr.substring(1);
server.ts:                if (absStr.startsWith('100')) {
server.ts:                    lookupEntity = idStr;
server.ts:                } else if (absStr.length >= 9) {
server.ts:                    lookupEntity = "-100" + absStr;
server.ts:                } else {
server.ts:                    lookupEntity = idStr;
server.ts:                }
server.ts:            } else {
server.ts:                lookupEntity = idStr;
server.ts:            }
server.ts:        }
server.ts:
server.ts:        // D. If it's already an input peer, return it directly
server.ts:        if (lookupEntity && lookupEntity.className && lookupEntity.className.startsWith('InputPeer')) {
server.ts:            return lookupEntity;
server.ts:        }
server.ts:
server.ts:        // E. Define match criteria
server.ts:        const searchId = lookupEntity.toString().replace('-100', '').trim();
server.ts:        const searchIdWithPrefix = lookupEntity.toString().startsWith('-100') ? lookupEntity.toString() : "-100" + lookupEntity.toString();
server.ts:
server.ts:        const matchDialog = (d: any) => {
server.ts:            const dIdStr = d.id ? d.id.toString() : "";
server.ts:            const entityIdStr = d.entity && d.entity.id ? d.entity.id.toString() : "";
server.ts:            return dIdStr === lookupEntity.toString() || 
server.ts:                   dIdStr === searchId ||
server.ts:                   dIdStr === searchIdWithPrefix ||
server.ts:                   entityIdStr === lookupEntity.toString() ||
server.ts:                   entityIdStr === searchId ||
server.ts:                   entityIdStr === searchIdWithPrefix ||
server.ts:                   (d.entity?.username && d.entity.username.toLowerCase() === searchId.replace('@', '').toLowerCase()) ||
server.ts:                   (d.name && d.name.toLowerCase() === lookupEntity.toString().toLowerCase());
server.ts:        };
server.ts:
server.ts:        // F. Standard check in existing cached Dialogs (very fast, no network overhead if cached)
server.ts:        const clientAny = client as any;
server.ts:        const now = Date.now();
server.ts:
server.ts:        if (clientAny._dialogsCache && clientAny._dialogsCache.length > 0) {
server.ts:            const found = clientAny._dialogsCache.find(matchDialog);
server.ts:            if (found) {
server.ts:                try {
server.ts:                    return await client.getInputEntity(found.entity);
server.ts:                } catch (e) {}
server.ts:            }
server.ts:        }
server.ts:
server.ts:        // F1. Attempt direct construction for -100 IDs if they look like they might have been seen recently
server.ts:        const idStrRaw = lookupEntity.toString();
server.ts:        if (idStrRaw.startsWith('-100')) {
server.ts:            const cleanId = idStrRaw.replace('-100', '');
server.ts:            if (/^\d+$/.test(cleanId)) {
server.ts:                try {
server.ts:                    // Peek into internal peer cache if possible
server.ts:                    const peer = await (client as any)._entityCache?.get(bigInt(cleanId));
server.ts:                    if (peer) return await client.getInputEntity(peer);
server.ts:                } catch (e) {}
server.ts:            }
server.ts:        }
server.ts:
server.ts:        // G. Try direct resolution via GramJS's built-in getEntity
server.ts:        try {
server.ts:            const resolved = await client.getEntity(lookupEntity);
server.ts:            if (resolved) {
server.ts:                return await client.getInputEntity(resolved);
server.ts:            }
server.ts:        } catch (e: any) {
server.ts:            // Silently proceed to fallbacks
server.ts:        }
server.ts:
server.ts:        // H. Try direct resolution via GramJS's built-in getInputEntity
server.ts:        try {
server.ts:            return await client.getInputEntity(lookupEntity);
server.ts:        } catch (e: any) {
server.ts:            // Silently proceed to fallbacks
server.ts:        }
server.ts:
server.ts:        // I. Direct query path for Numerical IDs (Fastest & Safest)
server.ts:        const idStrClean = lookupEntity.toString().replace('-100', '').replace('-', '').trim();
server.ts:        if (/^\d+$/.test(idStrClean)) {
server.ts:            const isPotentialChannel = lookupEntity.toString().startsWith('-100');
server.ts:
server.ts:            // Strategy 1: messages.GetChats (Resolves both private groups and supergroups if ID works)
server.ts:            try {
server.ts:                console.log(`[safelyResolveEntity] Invoking messages.GetChats for ID: ${idStrClean}`);
server.ts:                const response = await client.invoke(new Api.messages.GetChats({
server.ts:                    id: [bigInt(idStrClean)]
server.ts:                })) as any;
server.ts:                
server.ts:                if (response && response.chats && response.chats.length > 0) {
server.ts:                    const matched = response.chats[0];
server.ts:                    console.log(`[safelyResolveEntity] messages.GetChats matched: "${matched.title}"`);
server.ts:                    try {
server.ts:                        return await client.getInputEntity(matched);
server.ts:                    } catch (e) {
server.ts:                         // Construction fallback
server.ts:                         if (matched.className === 'Channel' || matched.broadcast || matched.megagroup) {
server.ts:                             return new Api.InputPeerChannel({
server.ts:                                 channelId: bigInt(matched.id.toString()),
server.ts:                                 accessHash: matched.accessHash ? bigInt(matched.accessHash.toString()) : bigInt(0)
server.ts:                             });
server.ts:                         } else {
server.ts:                             return new Api.InputPeerChat({ chatId: bigInt(matched.id.toString()) });
server.ts:                         }
server.ts:                    }
server.ts:                }
server.ts:            } catch (err) {}
server.ts:
server.ts:        // Strategy 2: channels.GetChannels (Specific for supergroups/channels)
server.ts:        if (isPotentialChannel) {
server.ts:            try {
server.ts:                const chResp = await client.invoke(new Api.channels.GetChannels({
server.ts:                    id: [new Api.InputChannel({ channelId: bigInt(idStrClean), accessHash: bigInt(0) })]
server.ts:                })).catch(() => null) as any;
server.ts:                
server.ts:                if (chResp && chResp.chats && chResp.chats.length > 0) {
server.ts:                    try {
server.ts:                        return await client.getInputEntity(chResp.chats[0]);
server.ts:                    } catch (e) {
server.ts:                         return new Api.InputPeerChannel({
server.ts:                             channelId: bigInt(chResp.chats[0].id.toString()),
server.ts:                             accessHash: chResp.chats[0].accessHash ? bigInt(chResp.chats[0].accessHash.toString()) : bigInt(0)
server.ts:                         });
server.ts:                    }
server.ts:                }
server.ts:            } catch (err) {}
server.ts:        }
server.ts:        }
server.ts:
server.ts:        // II. Deep search via getDialogs (Paginating to find "lost" entities)
server.ts:        if (!(client as any)._isBotInApp) {
server.ts:            try {
server.ts:                console.log(`[safelyResolveEntity] Starting deep resolve for ${idStrClean}...`);
server.ts:                let batchLimit = 1000;
server.ts:                let currentOffsetDate = 0;
server.ts:                
server.ts:                // Try first 1000
server.ts:                const firstBatch = await client.getDialogs({ limit: 1000 });
server.ts:                let found = firstBatch.find(matchDialog);
server.ts:                if (found) return await client.getInputEntity(found.entity);
server.ts:
server.ts:                // If large account, go deeper (up to 12,000 dialogs)
server.ts:                if (firstBatch.length >= 950) {
server.ts:                    console.log(`[safelyResolveEntity] Extremely large account. Paginating deeply...`);
server.ts:                    let lastDate = firstBatch[firstBatch.length - 1].date;
server.ts:                    for (let i = 0; i < 11; i++) {
server.ts:                        const moreDialogs = await client.getDialogs({ limit: 1000, offsetDate: lastDate });
server.ts:                        if (!moreDialogs || moreDialogs.length === 0) break;
server.ts:                        found = moreDialogs.find(matchDialog);
server.ts:                        if (found) return await client.getInputEntity(found.entity);
server.ts:                        lastDate = moreDialogs[moreDialogs.length - 1].date;
server.ts:                        if (moreDialogs.length < 1000) break;
server.ts:                    }
server.ts:                }
server.ts:            } catch (dgErr: any) {
server.ts:                console.warn(`[safelyResolveEntity] Deep dialog search failed: ${dgErr.message}`);
server.ts:            }
server.ts:        }
server.ts:
server.ts:        // III. Last Resort: Forced Construction
server.ts:        console.log(`[safelyResolveEntity] Forced construction resort for ${lookupEntity}`);
server.ts:        const finalIdStr = lookupEntity.toString().trim();
server.ts:        if (finalIdStr.startsWith('-100')) {
server.ts:            const cid = finalIdStr.replace('-100', '');
server.ts:            if (/^\d+$/.test(cid)) {
server.ts:                return new Api.InputPeerChannel({ 
server.ts:                    channelId: bigInt(cid), 
server.ts:                    accessHash: bigInt(0) 
server.ts:                });
server.ts:            }
server.ts:        } else if (finalIdStr.startsWith('-')) {
server.ts:            const cid = finalIdStr.substring(1);
server.ts:            if (/^\d+$/.test(cid)) {
server.ts:                return new Api.InputPeerChat({ chatId: bigInt(cid) });
server.ts:            }
server.ts:        } else if (/^\d+$/.test(finalIdStr)) {
server.ts:            return new Api.InputPeerUser({ userId: bigInt(finalIdStr), accessHash: bigInt(0) });
server.ts:        }
server.ts:
server.ts:        throw new Error(`Resolution failed for ID: ${lookupEntity}`);
server.ts:    } catch (e: any) {
server.ts:        console.error(`[safelyResolveEntity] Fatal failure: ${e.message}`);
server.ts:        // If it's already a -100 ID, try to return a constructed peer anyway
server.ts:        if (typeof entity === 'string' && entity.startsWith('-100')) {
server.ts:            return new Api.InputPeerChannel({ channelId: bigInt(entity.replace('-100', '')), accessHash: bigInt(0) });
server.ts:        }
server.ts:        throw e;
server.ts:    }
server.ts:}
server.ts:
server.ts:async function safelyResolveFullEntity(client: TelegramClient, entity: any): Promise<any> {
server.ts:    const peer = await safelyResolveEntity(client, entity);
server.ts:    try {
server.ts:        return await client.getEntity(peer);
server.ts:    } catch (e: any) {
server.ts:        if (e.errorMessage === 'CHANNEL_INVALID' || e.errorMessage === 'CHANNEL_PRIVATE' || (e.message && (e.message.includes('CHANNEL_INVALID') || e.message.includes('CHANNEL_PRIVATE')))) {
server.ts:            try {
server.ts:                return await client.getInputEntity(peer);
server.ts:            } catch (innerE) {
server.ts:                throw new Error(`Cannot access chat/channel format for ${entity}. It may be private, invalid, or the Userbot is not a member.`);
server.ts:            }
server.ts:        }
server.ts:        throw e;
server.ts:    }
server.ts:}

server.ts:// User Sessions Management and watchdog

server.ts:const pendingConnections = new Map<number, Promise<any>>();
