server.ts:async function runActiveWatchdog() {
server.ts:    try {
server.ts:        if (!approvedUsersCollection) return;
server.ts:        const users = await approvedUsersCollection.find({ stringSession: { $exists: true, $ne: "" } }).toArray();
server.ts:        for (const user of users) {
server.ts:            const userId = Number(user.userId);
server.ts:            if (isNaN(userId)) continue;
server.ts:
server.ts:            const existingClient = userClients.get(userId);
server.ts:            if (!existingClient) {
server.ts:                console.log(`[Watchdog] User ${userId} bot client missing in memory. Re-connecting...`);
server.ts:                await getConnectedUserbotClient(userId).catch(err => {
server.ts:                    console.error(`[Watchdog] Failed to connect user ${userId} in watchdog: ${err.message}`);
server.ts:                });
server.ts:            } else {
server.ts:                let healthy = false;
server.ts:                if (existingClient.connected) {
server.ts:                    try {
server.ts:                        // Heartbeat ping check (10s timeout)
server.ts:                        let timeoutId: any;
server.ts:                        await Promise.race([
server.ts:                            existingClient.getMe(),
server.ts:                            new Promise((_, reject) => {
server.ts:                                timeoutId = setTimeout(() => reject(new Error("Heartbeat Timeout")), 30000);
server.ts:                            })
server.ts:                        ]);
server.ts:                        clearTimeout(timeoutId);
server.ts:                        healthy = true;
server.ts:                    } catch (heartbeatErr: any) {
server.ts:                        console.warn(`[Watchdog] User ${userId} heartbeat check failed: ${heartbeatErr.message}`);
server.ts:                    }
server.ts:                }
server.ts:
server.ts:                if (!healthy) {
server.ts:                    console.log(`[Watchdog] User ${userId} bot client failed heartbeat or disconnected. Repairing & reconnecting...`);
server.ts:                    activeWatchers.delete(userId);
server.ts:                    userClients.delete(userId);
server.ts:                    try {
server.ts:                        await existingClient.disconnect().catch(() => {});
server.ts:                    } catch (e) {}
server.ts:                    await getConnectedUserbotClient(userId).catch(err => {
server.ts:                        console.error(`[Watchdog] Failed to cleanly reconnect user ${userId} in watchdog: ${err.message}`);
server.ts:                    });
server.ts:                } else if (!activeWatchers.has(userId)) {
server.ts:                    console.log(`[Watchdog] User ${userId} watcher not active. Restarting watcher...`);
server.ts:                    await startAutoMirrorWatcher(userId, existingClient).catch((err: any) => {
server.ts:                        console.error(`[Watchdog] Failed to restart watcher for ${userId} in watchdog: ${err.message}`);
server.ts:                    });
server.ts:                }
server.ts:            }
server.ts:        }
server.ts:    } catch (e: any) {
server.ts:        console.error(`[Watchdog] Error occurred: ${e.message}`);
server.ts:    }
server.ts:}

server.ts:      console.error('MongoDB Connection Error:', err);
server.ts:    });

server.ts:
server.ts:// Admin Check Utility
server.ts:const ALLOWED_ADMIN_IDS = ["6431447408", "6581298945", "6065778458"];
server.ts:
server.ts:const isAdmin = (userId: number | undefined) => {
server.ts:  if (!userId) return false;
server.ts:  const uidStr = userId.toString().trim();
server.ts:  const mainAdminStr = currentAdminId?.toString().trim();
server.ts:  return ALLOWED_ADMIN_IDS.includes(uidStr) || (mainAdminStr && uidStr === mainAdminStr);
server.ts:};
server.ts:
server.ts:// Approval Check Utility
server.ts:const isAuthorized = (userId: number | undefined) => {
server.ts:  return isAdmin(userId);
server.ts:};
server.ts:
server.ts:const resolveSettingsUserId = async (fromId: number | undefined): Promise<string> => {
server.ts:    if (!fromId) return "";
server.ts:    
server.ts:    // 1. Check if admin explicitly switched to a session (in memory)
server.ts:    if (adminActiveSession.has(fromId)) {
server.ts:        return adminActiveSession.get(fromId)!.toString();
server.ts:    }
server.ts:
server.ts:    const fromIdStr = fromId.toString();
server.ts:    
server.ts:    // 2. Check if the admin has a persisted active userbot in their DB document
server.ts:    if (approvedUsersCollection) {
server.ts:        try {
server.ts:            const adminDoc = await approvedUsersCollection.findOne({ userId: fromIdStr });
server.ts:            if (adminDoc?.activeUserbotUserId) {
server.ts:                const activeUid = adminDoc.activeUserbotUserId.toString();
server.ts:                const ubotDoc = await approvedUsersCollection.findOne({ userId: activeUid, stringSession: { $exists: true, $ne: "" } });
server.ts:                if (ubotDoc) {
server.ts:                    adminActiveSession.set(fromId, Number(activeUid));
server.ts:                    return activeUid;
server.ts:                }
server.ts:            }
server.ts:        } catch (e: any) {
server.ts:            console.error(`[resolveSettingsUserId] Error getting persisted ubot: ${e.message}`);
server.ts:        }
server.ts:    }
server.ts:
server.ts:    // 3. Check if the current user has a direct session
server.ts:    if (approvedUsersCollection) {
server.ts:        try {
server.ts:            const directSession = await approvedUsersCollection.findOne({ userId: fromIdStr, stringSession: { $exists: true, $ne: "" }});
server.ts:            if (directSession) {
server.ts:                adminActiveSession.set(fromId, fromId);
server.ts:                return fromIdStr;
server.ts:            }
server.ts:        } catch (e) {}
server.ts:    }
server.ts:
server.ts:    // 4. Fallback to any userbot account logged in by this admin
server.ts:    if (approvedUsersCollection) {
server.ts:        try {
server.ts:            const loggedByThisAdmin = await approvedUsersCollection.findOne({ 
server.ts:                addedByAdminId: fromIdStr, 
server.ts:                stringSession: { $exists: true, $ne: "" }
server.ts:            });
server.ts:            if (loggedByThisAdmin) {
server.ts:                const uidStr = loggedByThisAdmin.userId;
server.ts:                adminActiveSession.set(fromId, Number(uidStr));
server.ts:                return uidStr;
server.ts:            }
server.ts:        } catch (e) {}
server.ts:    }
server.ts:
server.ts:    // 5. Ultimate Fallback: any userbot account with a valid stringSession in the database!
server.ts:    if (approvedUsersCollection) {
server.ts:        try {
server.ts:            const anyUbotSession = await approvedUsersCollection.findOne({ 
server.ts:                stringSession: { $exists: true, $ne: "" }
server.ts:            });
server.ts:            if (anyUbotSession) {
server.ts:                const uidStr = anyUbotSession.userId;
server.ts:                adminActiveSession.set(fromId, Number(uidStr));
server.ts:                return uidStr;
server.ts:            }
server.ts:        } catch (e) {}
server.ts:    }
server.ts:    
server.ts:    // 6. Fallback to primary admin search or ALLOWED_ADMIN_IDS
server.ts:    if (isAdmin(fromId)) {
server.ts:        try {
server.ts:            if (currentAdminId && currentAdminId.toString() !== fromIdStr) {
server.ts:                 const primarySession = await approvedUsersCollection?.findOne({ userId: currentAdminId.toString(), stringSession: { $exists: true, $ne: "" }});
server.ts:                 if (primarySession) {
server.ts:                     adminActiveSession.set(fromId, Number(currentAdminId));
server.ts:                     return currentAdminId.toString();
server.ts:                 }
server.ts:            }
server.ts:            
server.ts:            const firstAdmin = ALLOWED_ADMIN_IDS[0];
server.ts:            if (firstAdmin && firstAdmin !== fromIdStr) {
server.ts:                 const fallbackSession = await approvedUsersCollection?.findOne({ userId: firstAdmin, stringSession: { $exists: true, $ne: "" }});
server.ts:                 if (fallbackSession) {
server.ts:                     adminActiveSession.set(fromId, Number(firstAdmin));
server.ts:                     return firstAdmin;
server.ts:                 }
server.ts:            }
server.ts:        } catch (e) {}
server.ts:    }
server.ts:
server.ts:    return fromIdStr;
server.ts:};
server.ts:

server.ts:            timeout: 120000,

server.ts:            }

server.ts:
server.ts:        // Security Interceptor to ignore all non-admin messages globally
server.ts:        const globalProcessedUpdateKeys = new Set<string>();
server.ts:
server.ts:        const originalProcessUpdate = bot.processUpdate.bind(bot);
server.ts:        bot.processUpdate = (update: TelegramBot.Update) => {
server.ts:            // Deduplicate at the root level for ALL incoming updates (commands, callbacks, etc.)
server.ts:            let updateKey = '';
server.ts:            if (update.message) {
server.ts:                updateKey = `msg_${update.message.chat.id}_${update.message.message_id}`;
server.ts:            } else if (update.callback_query) {
server.ts:                updateKey = `cbq_${update.callback_query.id}`;
server.ts:            }
server.ts:            
server.ts:            if (updateKey) {
server.ts:                if (globalProcessedUpdateKeys.has(updateKey)) {
server.ts:                    console.log(`[Deduplicator] Ignored duplicate update globally for key: ${updateKey}`);
server.ts:                    return;
server.ts:                }
server.ts:                globalProcessedUpdateKeys.add(updateKey);
server.ts:                setTimeout(() => {
server.ts:                    globalProcessedUpdateKeys.delete(updateKey);
server.ts:                }, 5 * 60 * 1000);
server.ts:            }
server.ts:
server.ts:            const fromId = update.message?.from?.id || update.callback_query?.from?.id;
server.ts:            // Ignore if fromId is present but they are not an admin
server.ts:            if (fromId && !isAdmin(fromId)) {
server.ts:                return;
server.ts:            }
server.ts:            return originalProcessUpdate(update);
server.ts:        };

server.ts:        const handleSetMirror = async (chatId: number, fromId: number | undefined, msg: TelegramBot.Message) => {
server.ts:            try {
server.ts:                if (!isAdmin(fromId) || !fromId) throw new Error("Restricted: Admin access required.");
server.ts:                
server.ts:                if (msg.chat.type === 'private') {
server.ts:                    throw new Error("Use this command in the **Destination Group**.");
server.ts:                }
server.ts:
server.ts:                if (approvedUsersCollection) {
server.ts:                    const settingsUid = await resolveSettingsUserId(fromId);
server.ts:                    const userDoc = await approvedUsersCollection.findOne({ userId: settingsUid });
server.ts:                    const savedDestinations = userDoc?.savedDestinations || [];
server.ts:                    
server.ts:                    const destId = chatId.toString();
server.ts:                    const destThreadId = msg.message_thread_id;
server.ts:                    const groupName = msg.chat.title || 'Group';
server.ts:                    
server.ts:                    // Prevent duplicates (per group ID)
server.ts:                    const filtered = savedDestinations.filter((d: any) => d.destId !== destId);
server.ts:                    filtered.push({
server.ts:                        destId,
server.ts:                        destThreadId,
server.ts:                        groupName,
server.ts:                        topicName: destThreadId ? `Topic ${destThreadId}` : 'General',
server.ts:                        createdAt: new Date()
server.ts:                    });
server.ts:                    
server.ts:                    const finalDestinations = filtered.slice(-20); // Limit to 20 saved destinations
server.ts:                    
server.ts:                    await approvedUsersCollection.updateOne(
server.ts:                        { userId: settingsUid },
server.ts:                        { $set: { savedDestinations: finalDestinations } }
server.ts:                    );
server.ts:                    
server.ts:                    const destDisplay = destThreadId ? `${groupName} (Topic: ${destThreadId})` : groupName;
server.ts:                    safeSendMessage(chatId, `✅ **Destination Saved!**\n\n**Destination:** ${destDisplay}\n\nYou can now select this destination when using **Live Mirror** or **Full Mirror Group** from the bot menu.`, { parse_mode: 'Markdown' });
server.ts:                }
server.ts:            } catch (err: any) {
server.ts:                safeSendMessage(chatId, `❌ **Mirror Sync Error:** ${err.message}`);
server.ts:            }
server.ts:        };

server.ts:        const handleLogin = async (chatId: number, fromId: number | undefined, force: boolean = false) => {
server.ts:          try {
server.ts:            if (!isAdmin(fromId)) throw new Error("Restricted: You are not an Admin.");
server.ts:            if (!apiIdValue || !apiHashValue) throw new Error("Missing API_ID or API_HASH. Please set them using /settings or your environment/dashboard variables.");

server.ts:                return safeSendMessage(chatId, "✅ **You are already logged in!**\n\nYour session is active. If you want to log in with a different account, use `/login force` or `/logout` first.", { parse_mode: 'Markdown' });

server.ts:                    await oldClient.disconnect().catch(() => {});
server.ts:                    userClients.delete(fromId);
server.ts:                }

server.ts:                activeWatchers.delete(fromId);
server.ts:            }
server.ts:

server.ts:            }
server.ts:
server.ts:            safeSendMessage(chatId, "👋 **Ready to connect!**\n\nPlease enter your phone number in international format (e.g., `+91XXXXXXXXXX`).\n\n_Note: This will link a Userbot session to your account._", { 
server.ts:              parse_mode: 'Markdown',
server.ts:              reply_markup: { force_reply: true }
server.ts:            });
server.ts:            
server.ts:            loginStates[fromId!] = { step: 'awaiting_phone' };
server.ts:          } catch (err: any) {

server.ts:          }

server.ts:    const handleCancel = (chatId: number, fromId: number | undefined) => {
server.ts:      if (!isAdmin(fromId)) return;
server.ts:      let cancelled = false;
server.ts:      
server.ts:      // Global Cancel: Clear all login states
server.ts:      const loginCount = Object.keys(loginStates).length;
server.ts:      if (loginCount > 0) {
server.ts:        for (const key in loginStates) {
server.ts:          if (loginStates[key].client) loginStates[key].client?.disconnect();
server.ts:        }
server.ts:        for (const key in loginStates) delete loginStates[key];
server.ts:        cancelled = true;
server.ts:      }
server.ts:
server.ts:      // Global Cancel: Clear all user action states
server.ts:      const actionCount = Object.keys(userActionStates).length;
server.ts:      if (actionCount > 0) {
server.ts:        for (const key in userActionStates) delete userActionStates[key as any];
server.ts:        cancelled = true;
server.ts:      }
server.ts:
server.ts:      // Global Cancel: Clear the entire task queue
server.ts:      if (taskQueue.length > 0) {
server.ts:          taskQueue.length = 0;
server.ts:          dbClearAllTasks().catch(e => console.error("[Queue DB] failed to clear on cancel:", e));
server.ts:          cancelled = true;
server.ts:      }
server.ts:      
server.ts:      // Cancel active tasks, except live mirror tasks
server.ts:      for (const [key, job] of activeTaskJobs) {
server.ts:          if (job.isMirror && ['searching', 'downloading', 'uploading'].includes(job.phase)) {
server.ts:              continue;
server.ts:          }
server.ts:          activeTaskJobs.delete(key);
server.ts:          taskControlMap.delete(key);
server.ts:          cancelled = true;
server.ts:      }
server.ts:
server.ts:      if (cancelled) {
server.ts:          safeSendMessage(chatId, "✅ All non-essential/pending tasks have been cancelled.");
server.ts:      }
server.ts:
server.ts:      // Reset activity trackers
server.ts:      activeTasksPerUser.clear();
server.ts:      activeTasksCount = 0;
server.ts:
server.ts:      if (cancelled) {
server.ts:        safeSendMessage(chatId, "🛑 **GLOBAL CANCEL:**\nAll active tasks, batches, user operations, and queues have been wiped globally.");
server.ts:      } else {
server.ts:        safeSendMessage(chatId, "⚠️ **No active tasks or operations found to cancel.**");
server.ts:      }
server.ts:    };

server.ts:    const handleForward = async (chatId: number, fromId: number | undefined) => {
server.ts:      try {
server.ts:        if (!isAdmin(fromId) || !fromId) throw new Error("Restricted: Admin access required.");
server.ts:        
server.ts:        userActionStates[fromId] = { type: 'forward_start_link' };
server.ts:        
server.ts:        safeSendMessage(chatId, "🚀 **Batch Forward Started**\n\nSend the **Starting Link** now.");
server.ts:      } catch (err: any) {
server.ts:        safeSendMessage(chatId, `❌ **Error:** ${err.message}`);
server.ts:      }
server.ts:    };
server.ts:
server.ts:    const handleBatch = async (chatId: number, fromId: number | undefined, messageId?: number) => {
server.ts:      try {
server.ts:        if (!isAdmin(fromId) || !fromId) throw new Error("Restricted: Admin access required.");
server.ts:        
server.ts:        const contextUid = Number(await resolveSettingsUserId(fromId));
server.ts:        const client = await getConnectedUserbotClient(contextUid);
server.ts:        if (!client) throw new Error("Userbot Session Required: Please /login first.");
server.ts:        
server.ts:        userActionStates[fromId] = { type: 'batch_start' };
server.ts:        
server.ts:        const text = "📦 **Batch Process Started**\n\nSend the **Starting Link** now.";
server.ts:        if (messageId) {
server.ts:            safeEditMessage(text, { chat_id: chatId, message_id: messageId, parse_mode: 'Markdown' });
server.ts:        } else {
server.ts:            safeSendMessage(chatId, text, { reply_markup: { force_reply: true }, parse_mode: 'Markdown' });
server.ts:        }
server.ts:      } catch (err: any) {
server.ts:        safeSendMessage(chatId, `❌ **Error:** ${err.message}`);
server.ts:      }
server.ts:    };
server.ts:
server.ts:    const handleBatchForward = async (chatId: number, fromId: number, startLink: string, endLink: string) => {
server.ts:        const parseLink = (link: string) => {
server.ts:            const match = link.match(/t\.me\/(?:c\/)?([a-zA-Z0-9_-]+)\/(\d+)/i);
server.ts:            if (!match) throw new Error("Invalid link format");
server.ts:            let chatId = match[1];
server.ts:            if (/^\d+$/.test(chatId)) chatId = '-100' + chatId;
server.ts:            return { chatId, msgId: parseInt(match[2]) };
server.ts:        };
server.ts:
server.ts:        const start = parseLink(startLink);
server.ts:        const end = parseLink(endLink);
server.ts:        
server.ts:        if (start.chatId !== end.chatId) throw new Error("Links must be from the same chat");
server.ts:        
server.ts:        const contextUid = Number(await resolveSettingsUserId(fromId));
server.ts:        const client = await getConnectedUserbotClient(contextUid);
server.ts:        if (!client) throw new Error("Userbot Session Required.");
server.ts:        
server.ts:        const userDoc = await approvedUsersCollection.findOne({ userId: contextUid.toString() });
server.ts:        const destChatId = userDoc?.uploadPath;
server.ts:        if (!destChatId) throw new Error("Destination path not set. Use /setpath");
server.ts:        
server.ts:        for (let i = start.msgId; i <= end.msgId; i++) {
server.ts:            try {
server.ts:                await client.forwardMessages(destChatId, {
server.ts:                    messages: [i],
server.ts:                    fromPeer: start.chatId,
server.ts:                    dropAuthor: true 
server.ts:                });
server.ts:            } catch (e: any) {
server.ts:                if (e.seconds) {
server.ts:                    console.log(`[FloodWait] Waiting ${e.seconds} seconds.`);
server.ts:                    await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, (e.seconds + 1) * 1000));
server.ts:                    i--; // Retry this message
server.ts:                } else {
server.ts:                    console.log(`[Individual Forward Error] Msg ${i} failed: ${e.message}`);
server.ts:                }
server.ts:            }
server.ts:            await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 600));
server.ts:        }
server.ts:        safeSendMessage(chatId, "✅ **Batch Forward Complete!**");
server.ts:    };
server.ts:

server.ts:    if (!(bot as any)._isPatchedForAnswer) {
server.ts:        const originalAnswer = bot.answerCallbackQuery.bind(bot);
server.ts:        (bot as any).answerCallbackQuery = async function(...args: any[]) {
server.ts:             const qId = args[0];
server.ts:             if (processedCallbackQueryIds.has(`ans_${qId}`)) {
server.ts:                 return Promise.resolve(); 
server.ts:             }
server.ts:             processedCallbackQueryIds.add(`ans_${qId}`);
server.ts:             setTimeout(() => processedCallbackQueryIds.delete(`ans_${qId}`), 5 * 60 * 1000);
server.ts:             return originalAnswer(...args).catch((err: any) => console.log('Answer CB Error avoided:', err.message));
server.ts:        };
server.ts:        (bot as any)._isPatchedForAnswer = true;
server.ts:    }

server.ts:    bot.on('callback_query', async (query) => {
server.ts:      const chatId = query.message?.chat.id;
server.ts:      if (!chatId) return;
server.ts:
server.ts:      // Deduplicate callback queries
server.ts:      if (processedCallbackQueryIds.has(query.id)) {
server.ts:        console.log(`[Deduplicator] Ignored duplicate callback query for ID: ${query.id}`);
server.ts:        return;
server.ts:      }
server.ts:      processedCallbackQueryIds.add(query.id);
server.ts:      setTimeout(() => {
server.ts:        processedCallbackQueryIds.delete(query.id);

server.ts:
server.ts:      // Instantly answer the callback query to remove loading spinner for most menu navigation!

server.ts:    bot.onText(/\/restart/, async (msg) => {
server.ts:        const fromId = msg.from?.id;
server.ts:        const chatId = msg.chat.id;
server.ts:        if (!fromId || !isAdmin(fromId)) return;
server.ts:        
server.ts:        let report = "🔄 **System Hard Restart Initiated**\n\n";
server.ts:
server.ts:        // 1. Stop Task Queue
server.ts:        const tasksStopped = taskQueue.length;
server.ts:        taskQueue.length = 0; // Clear array
server.ts:        dbClearAllTasks().catch(e => console.error("[Queue DB] failed to clear on restart:", e));
server.ts:        nextTaskRunAt = null;
server.ts:        report += `🛑 Tasks Stopped: \`${tasksStopped}\`\n`;
server.ts:
server.ts:        // 2. Clear Performance Junk
server.ts:        for (const key in libraryPerfMetrics) {
server.ts:            libraryPerfMetrics[key] = { totalBytes: 0, totalTimeMs: 0, count: 0 };
server.ts:        }
server.ts:        
server.ts:        // Cleanup actual junk files from disk
server.ts:        let junkCleanedCount = 0;
server.ts:        try {
server.ts:            const tmpDir = os.tmpdir();
server.ts:            const files = fs.readdirSync(tmpDir);
server.ts:            for (const file of files) {
server.ts:                if (file.startsWith('temp_') || file.startsWith('thumb_') || file.includes('userbot_')) {
server.ts:                    try {
server.ts:                        fs.unlinkSync(path.join(tmpDir, file));
server.ts:                        junkCleanedCount++;
server.ts:                    } catch {}
server.ts:                }
server.ts:            }
server.ts:        } catch (e) {
server.ts:            console.error("Failed to clean disk junk:", e);
server.ts:        }
server.ts:        report += `🧹 Junk Files Removed: \`${junkCleanedCount}\`\n`;
server.ts:        report += `📊 Metrics Reset: \`Done\`\n`;
server.ts:
server.ts:        // 3. Clear Interaction States
server.ts:        const actionsCleared = Object.keys(userActionStates).length;
server.ts:        for (const key in userActionStates) delete userActionStates[Number(key)];
server.ts:        report += `🖱 UI States Cleared: \`${actionsCleared}\`\n`;
server.ts:
server.ts:        // 4. Clear Login Buffer
server.ts:        const loginsAborted = Object.keys(loginStates).length;
server.ts:        for (const key in loginStates) {
server.ts:            try {
server.ts:                await loginStates[Number(key)].client?.disconnect();
server.ts:            } catch {}
server.ts:            delete loginStates[Number(key)];
server.ts:        }
server.ts:        report += `🔐 Pending Logins Aborted: \`${loginsAborted}\`\n`;
server.ts:
server.ts:        // 5. Disconnect Active Clients (Bypass/Refresh logic)
server.ts:        const clientsRefreshed = userClients.size;
server.ts:        for (const [userId, client] of userClients.entries()) {
server.ts:            try {
server.ts:                await client.disconnect();
server.ts:            } catch (e) {
server.ts:                console.error(`Failed to disconnect client for user ${userId}:`, e);
server.ts:            }
server.ts:        }
server.ts:        userClients.clear();
server.ts:        report += `⚡ Active Sessions Re-queued: \`${clientsRefreshed}\`\n`;
server.ts:
server.ts:        // 6. Check for API Limits (Global)
server.ts:        report += `📍 API Limit Bypass: \`Active\` (Rotating sessions & clearing buffers)\n`;
server.ts:        
server.ts:        report += `\n✅ **System is now clean. Bot operations resumed.**`;
server.ts:        report += `\n💾 **Login Persistence:** \`SAFE\` (Your accounts stay logged in)`;
server.ts:
server.ts:        bot.sendMessage(chatId, report, { parse_mode: 'Markdown' });
server.ts:    });

server.ts:        }
server.ts:
server.ts:        const parts = args.split(/\s+/);
server.ts:        let rawPath = parts[0];
server.ts:        let topicId: number | null = parts[1] ? parseInt(parts[1]) : null;
server.ts:
server.ts:        if (rawPath.startsWith('http://') || rawPath.startsWith('https://')) {
server.ts:            const urlParts = rawPath.split('/').filter(p => p.length > 0);

server.ts:            if (domainIdx !== -1 && urlParts.length > domainIdx + 1) {
server.ts:                const nextPart = urlParts[domainIdx + 1];

server.ts:                    let channelId = urlParts[domainIdx + 2];
server.ts:                    if (!channelId.startsWith('-100') && /^\d+$/.test(channelId)) {
server.ts:                        channelId = "-100" + channelId;
server.ts:                    }
server.ts:                    rawPath = channelId;
server.ts:                    if (urlParts.length > domainIdx + 3) {
server.ts:                        const possibleMsgOrTopic = parseInt(urlParts[domainIdx + 3]);
server.ts:                        if (!isNaN(possibleMsgOrTopic) && topicId === null) {
server.ts:                            topicId = possibleMsgOrTopic;
server.ts:                        }
server.ts:                    }
server.ts:                } else {
server.ts:                    rawPath = "@" + nextPart;
server.ts:                }
server.ts:            }
server.ts:        }
server.ts:
server.ts:        if (!rawPath.startsWith('-') && !rawPath.startsWith('@') && /^[a-zA-Z]/.test(rawPath)) {
server.ts:            rawPath = "@" + rawPath;
server.ts:        }
server.ts:
server.ts:        if (approvedUsersCollection) {
server.ts:            const adminIdStr = fromId.toString();
server.ts:            const settingsUid = await resolveSettingsUserId(fromId);
server.ts:            
server.ts:            const update = { 
server.ts:                $set: { 
server.ts:                    uploadPath: rawPath,
server.ts:                    uploadTopicId: topicId || null,
server.ts:                    uploadGroupName: rawPath,
server.ts:                    uploadTopicName: topicId ? `Topic ${topicId}` : ''
server.ts:                } 
server.ts:            };
server.ts:            
server.ts:            await approvedUsersCollection.updateOne({ userId: adminIdStr }, update);
server.ts:            if (settingsUid !== adminIdStr) {
server.ts:                await approvedUsersCollection.updateOne({ userId: settingsUid }, update);
server.ts:            }
server.ts:            
server.ts:            const dest = topicId ? `${rawPath} (Topic ID: ${topicId})` : rawPath;
server.ts:            const confirmationText = `🚀 **𝗨𝗽𝗹𝗼𝗮𝗱 𝗗𝗲𝘀𝘁𝗶𝗻𝗮𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻 𝗦𝗮𝘃𝗲𝗱 𝘃𝗶𝗮 𝗝𝘂𝗺𝗽𝗧𝗼𝗣𝗮𝘁𝗵!**\n\n📍 All upcoming tasks will be processed and routed to:\n🎯 \`${dest}\``;

server.ts:        }

server.ts:        const fromId = msg.from?.id;
server.ts:        const chatId = msg.chat.id;
server.ts:        if (!fromId || !isAdmin(fromId)) return;
server.ts:

server.ts:        rText += `• **Queue Status:** ${isQueuePaused ? '⏸️ PAUSED' : '🟢 RUNNING'}\n`;
server.ts:        rText += `• **Active Workers:** \`${activeTasksCount} / ${MAX_CONCURRENT_TASKS}\`\n`;
server.ts:        rText += `• **Pending Tasks in Queue:** \`${taskQueue.length} files\`\n\n`;
server.ts:
server.ts:        if (activeTaskJobs.size > 0) {
server.ts:            rText += `⚙️ **Currently Executing Jobs:**\n`;
server.ts:            for (const [key, job] of activeTaskJobs) {
server.ts:                const parts = job.link.split('/');
server.ts:                const msgId = parts[parts.length - 1] || 'Media';

server.ts:                if (job.progress) {
server.ts:                    const pct = (job.progress.percent || 0).toFixed(1);
server.ts:                    rText += `  └ \`[${pct}%]\` of \`${formatBytes(job.progress.total)}\` at \`${formatBytes(job.progress.speed)}/s\` (ETA: \`${job.progress.eta >= 0 ? job.progress.eta + 's' : 'N/A'}\`)\n`;
server.ts:                }
server.ts:            }
server.ts:            rText += `\n`;
server.ts:        }
server.ts:
server.ts:        if (taskQueue.length === 0) {
server.ts:            rText += `📭 _No pending tasks in the queue._\n`;
server.ts:        } else {
server.ts:            rText += `⏳ **Pending Queue Tasks (First 15):**\n`;
server.ts:            for (let i = 0; i < Math.min(15, taskQueue.length); i++) {
server.ts:                const t = taskQueue[i];
server.ts:                const parts = t.link.split('/');
server.ts:                const mId = parts[parts.length - 1] || 'Media';
server.ts:                rText += `**${i + 1}.** [Msg ${mId}](${t.link}) ${t.isMirror ? '🔄 [Mirror]' : ''}\n`;
server.ts:            }
server.ts:            if (taskQueue.length > 15) {
server.ts:                rText += `_...and ${taskQueue.length - 15} more files wait in queue._\n`;
server.ts:            }
server.ts:            rText += `\n💡 **Queue Control Actions:**\n`;
server.ts:            rText += `• Move task to front: \`/prioritizetask <index>\`\n`;
server.ts:            rText += `• Cancel task: \`/canceltask <index>\`\n`;
server.ts:            rText += `• Wipe pending: \`/clearqueue\`\n`;
server.ts:        }
server.ts:
server.ts:        const keyboard = [
server.ts:            [
server.ts:                isQueuePaused ? { text: '▶️ Resume Queue', callback_data: 'resume_queue_cb' } : { text: '⏸️ Pause Queue', callback_data: 'pause_queue_cb' },
server.ts:                { text: '🔄 Refresh Queue', callback_data: 'view_queue_cb' }
server.ts:            ],
server.ts:            [
server.ts:                { text: '🗑️ Clear Queue', callback_data: 'clear_queue_cb' }
server.ts:            ]
server.ts:        ];
server.ts:
server.ts:        safeSendMessage(chatId, rText, {
server.ts:            parse_mode: 'Markdown',
server.ts:            disable_web_page_preview: true,
server.ts:            reply_markup: { inline_keyboard: keyboard }
server.ts:        });
server.ts:    });

server.ts:    bot.onText(/\/canceltask(?:\s+(.+))?/, async (msg, match) => {
server.ts:        const fromId = msg.from?.id;
server.ts:        const chatId = msg.chat.id;
server.ts:        if (!fromId || !isAdmin(fromId)) return;
server.ts:
server.ts:        const argStr = match?.[1]?.trim().toLowerCase();
server.ts:        if (!argStr) {
server.ts:            return safeSendMessage(chatId, "❌ **Usage:** \`/canceltask <1-based index>\` or \`/canceltask all\`\nType \`/queue\` to view index numbers.", { parse_mode: 'Markdown' });
server.ts:        }
server.ts:
server.ts:        if (argStr === 'all') {
server.ts:            taskQueue.length = 0;
server.ts:            dbClearAllTasks().catch(e => console.error("[Queue DB] Clear cancel-all error:", e));
server.ts:            return safeSendMessage(chatId, "🗑️ **All pending tasks inside the queue have been cancelled!**", { parse_mode: 'Markdown' });
server.ts:        }
server.ts:
server.ts:        const idx = parseInt(argStr);
server.ts:        if (isNaN(idx) || idx < 1 || idx > taskQueue.length) {
server.ts:            return safeSendMessage(chatId, `❌ **Error:** Please enter a valid index number between 1 and ${taskQueue.length}.`, { parse_mode: 'Markdown' });
server.ts:        }
server.ts:
server.ts:        const removed = taskQueue.splice(idx - 1, 1)[0];
server.ts:        dbDequeueTask(removed).catch(e => console.error("[Queue DB] Dequeue cancelled task error:", e));
server.ts:
server.ts:        const parts = removed.link.split('/');
server.ts:        const msgId = parts[parts.length - 1] || 'Media';
server.ts:        safeSendMessage(chatId, `✅ **Cancelled Task #${idx}:** [Message ${msgId}](${removed.link}) has been removed from the queue.`, { parse_mode: 'Markdown', disable_web_page_preview: true });
server.ts:    });
server.ts:
server.ts:    bot.onText(/\/prioritizetask(?:\s+(.+))?/, async (msg, match) => {
server.ts:        const fromId = msg.from?.id;
server.ts:        const chatId = msg.chat.id;
server.ts:        if (!fromId || !isAdmin(fromId)) return;
server.ts:
server.ts:        const argStr = match?.[1]?.trim();
server.ts:        if (!argStr) {
server.ts:            return safeSendMessage(chatId, "❌ **Usage:** \`/prioritizetask <1-based index>\`\nThis moves a task to index 1 of the queue.", { parse_mode: 'Markdown' });
server.ts:        }
server.ts:
server.ts:        const idx = parseInt(argStr);
server.ts:        if (isNaN(idx) || idx < 1 || idx > taskQueue.length) {
server.ts:            return safeSendMessage(chatId, `❌ **Error:** Please enter a valid index number between 1 and ${taskQueue.length}.`, { parse_mode: 'Markdown' });
server.ts:        }
server.ts:
server.ts:        if (idx === 1) {
server.ts:            return safeSendMessage(chatId, "💡 **Task is already at the absolute front of the queue.**");
server.ts:        }
server.ts:
server.ts:        const chosen = taskQueue.splice(idx - 1, 1)[0];
server.ts:        taskQueue.unshift(chosen);
server.ts:        dbRequeueFrontTask(chosen).catch(e => console.error("[Queue DB] requeue front error:", e));
server.ts:
server.ts:        const parts = chosen.link.split('/');
server.ts:        const msgId = parts[parts.length - 1] || 'Media';
server.ts:        safeSendMessage(chatId, `⚡ **Task Prioritized:** [Message ${msgId}](${chosen.link}) has been elevated to index 1 and will run next!`, { parse_mode: 'Markdown', disable_web_page_preview: true });
server.ts:
server.ts:        if (!isQueuePaused) {
server.ts:            runNextTask();
server.ts:        }
server.ts:    });

server.ts:        }

server.ts:                perUserLimit = parsedPerUser;
server.ts:            }

server.ts:                { type: 'global_config' }, 
server.ts:                { $set: { maxConcurrentTasks: limit, maxTasksPerUser: perUserLimit } }, 
server.ts:                { upsert: true }
server.ts:            );
server.ts:        }
server.ts:        
server.ts:        safeSendMessage(chatId, `✅ **Speed configuration updated!**\n\n• **Global Concurrency:** \`${limit}\` concurrent tasks\n• **User Concurrency:** \`${perUserLimit}\` tasks per user`, { parse_mode: 'Markdown' });
server.ts:    });

server.ts:    bot.onText(/\/failed/, async (msg) => {
server.ts:        if (!isAdmin(msg.from?.id)) return;
server.ts:        const chatId = msg.chat.id;
server.ts:        try {
server.ts:            const failedTasks = failedTasksCollection ? await failedTasksCollection.find({}).sort({ failedAt: -1 }).limit(10).toArray() : [];

server.ts:            
server.ts:            if (failedCount === 0) {
server.ts:                await safeSendMessage(chatId, "🎉 **No current failed tasks!** All copy & mirror operations are clean and successful.", { parse_mode: 'Markdown' });
server.ts:                return;
server.ts:            }
server.ts:            
server.ts:            let failedText = `⚠️ **Failed Mirror/Copy Tasks Report**\n`;
server.ts:            failedText += `• **Total Failed Logs:** \`${failedCount} tasks\`\n`;
server.ts:            failedText += `===============================\n\n`;
server.ts:            
server.ts:            failedTasks.forEach((t: any, i: number) => {
server.ts:                const parts = t.link.split('/');
server.ts:                const msgId = parts[parts.length - 1] || 'Media';
server.ts:                failedText += `**${i + 1}. [Message ${msgId}](${t.link})**\n`;
server.ts:                failedText += `  ├─ **Error:** \`${t.error || 'Unknown Error'}\`\n`;
server.ts:                failedText += `  └─ **Failed At:** \`${t.failedAt ? new Date(t.failedAt).toLocaleString() : 'N/A'}\`\n\n`;
server.ts:            });
server.ts:            
server.ts:            if (failedCount > 10) {
server.ts:                failedText += `_...and ${failedCount - 10} more failed tasks._\n\n`;
server.ts:            }
server.ts:            
server.ts:            failedText += `💡 You can retry these failed tasks using the dashboard or buttons below.`;
server.ts:            
server.ts:            await bot?.sendMessage(chatId, failedText, {
server.ts:                parse_mode: 'Markdown',
server.ts:                disable_web_page_preview: true,
server.ts:                reply_markup: {
server.ts:                    inline_keyboard: [
server.ts:                        [
server.ts:                            { text: '🔄 Retry All Failed', callback_data: 'retry_all_failed_cb' },
server.ts:                            { text: '🗑️ Clear Failed Logs', callback_data: 'clear_failed_cb' }
server.ts:                        ],
server.ts:                        [
server.ts:                            { text: '⬅️ Back to Menu', callback_data: 'menu_back' }
server.ts:                        ]
server.ts:                    ]
server.ts:                }
server.ts:            });
server.ts:        } catch (err: any) {
server.ts:            safeSendMessage(chatId, `❌ **Failed Tracker Error:** ${err.message}`);
server.ts:        }
server.ts:    });

server.ts:    // Helper to get or create topic by name
server.ts:const getOrCreateTopic = async (client: TelegramClient, channelEntity: any, topicName: string): Promise<{ topicId?: number; error?: string }> => {
server.ts:    try {
server.ts:        const cacheKey = `${channelEntity.id}:${topicName.trim().toLowerCase()}`;
server.ts:        if (topicMappingCache.has(cacheKey)) {
server.ts:             return { topicId: topicMappingCache.get(cacheKey) };
server.ts:        }
server.ts:
server.ts:        const destTopics: any = await client.invoke(new Api.channels.GetForumTopics({
server.ts:            channel: channelEntity,
server.ts:            limit: 500
server.ts:        }));
server.ts:        
server.ts:        const found = destTopics.topics?.find((t: any) => t.title?.trim().toLowerCase() === topicName.trim().toLowerCase());
server.ts:        if (found) {
server.ts:            console.log(`[TopicMgr] Found existing topic "${topicName}" -> ID: ${found.id}`);
server.ts:            topicMappingCache.set(cacheKey, found.id);
server.ts:            return { topicId: found.id };
server.ts:        }
server.ts:
server.ts:        console.log(`[TopicMgr] Creating new topic "${topicName}"...`);
server.ts:        const createResult: any = await client.invoke(new Api.channels.CreateForumTopic({
server.ts:            channel: channelEntity,
server.ts:            title: topicName
server.ts:        }));
server.ts:        const update = createResult.updates?.find((u: any) => u.className === 'UpdateNewForumTopic');
server.ts:        if (update?.topicId) {
server.ts:            topicMappingCache.set(cacheKey, update.topicId);
server.ts:            return { topicId: update.topicId };
server.ts:        }
server.ts:        // Fallback: Scan if not found in updates
server.ts:        const retryTopics: any = await client.invoke(new Api.channels.GetForumTopics({ channel: channelEntity, limit: 200 }));
server.ts:        const foundRetry = retryTopics.topics?.find((t: any) => t.title?.trim().toLowerCase() === topicName.trim().toLowerCase());
server.ts:        if (foundRetry) {
server.ts:            topicMappingCache.set(cacheKey, foundRetry.id);
server.ts:            return { topicId: foundRetry.id };
server.ts:        }
server.ts:        return { error: "Could not find UpdateNewForumTopic in creation updates nor in subsequent scan" };
server.ts:    } catch (err: any) {
server.ts:        console.error(`[TopicMgr] Error in getOrCreateTopic for ${topicName}: ${err.message}`);
server.ts:        // Retry scan
server.ts:        try {
server.ts:            const retryTopics: any = await client.invoke(new Api.channels.GetForumTopics({ channel: channelEntity, limit: 200 }));
server.ts:            const retryFound = retryTopics.topics?.find((t: any) => t.title?.trim().toLowerCase() === topicName.trim().toLowerCase())?.id;
server.ts:            if (retryFound) {
server.ts:                topicMappingCache.set(`${channelEntity.id}:${topicName.trim().toLowerCase()}`, retryFound);
server.ts:                return { topicId: retryFound };
server.ts:            }
server.ts:            return { error: `${err.message} (Retry topic scan of existing topics also returned no match)` };
server.ts:        } catch (retryErr: any) { 
server.ts:            return { error: `${err.message} (Retry scan failed: ${retryErr.message})` }; 
server.ts:        }
server.ts:    }
server.ts:};
server.ts:interface ActiveJob {
server.ts:    link: string;
server.ts:    chatId: number;
server.ts:    userId: number;
server.ts:    phase: 'searching' | 'downloading' | 'uploading' | 'cooldown';
server.ts:    isMirror?: boolean;
server.ts:    progress?: {
server.ts:        total: number;
server.ts:        current: number;
server.ts:        speed: number;
server.ts:        percent: number;
server.ts:        elapsed: number;
server.ts:        eta: number;
server.ts:    };
server.ts:    cooldownRemaining?: number;
server.ts:    startTime: number;
server.ts:}
server.ts:activeTaskJobs = new Map<string, ActiveJob>();
server.ts:
server.ts:function formatBytes(bytes: number, decimals = 2) {
server.ts:    if (!bytes || isNaN(bytes) || bytes <= 0) return '0 Bytes';
server.ts:    const k = 1024;
server.ts:    const dm = decimals < 0 ? 0 : decimals;
server.ts:    const sizes = ['Bytes', 'KB', 'MB', 'GB', 'TB'];
server.ts:    const i = Math.floor(Math.log(bytes) / Math.log(k));
server.ts:    return parseFloat((bytes / Math.pow(k, i)).toFixed(dm)) + ' ' + sizes[i];
server.ts:}
server.ts:
server.ts:async function generateDashboardText() {
server.ts:    const activeTasks = activeTasksCount;
server.ts:    const queueLen = taskQueue.length;
server.ts:    const dbStatusText = dbStatus === 'Connected' ? '🟢 Connected' : '🔴 Disconnected';
server.ts:
server.ts:    const formatDashboardTime = (s: number) => {
server.ts:        if (s <= 0) return "0s";
server.ts:        if (s < 60) return `${Math.round(s)}s`;
server.ts:        const m = Math.floor(s / 60);
server.ts:        const sec = Math.round(s % 60);
server.ts:        return `${m}m ${sec}s`;
server.ts:    };
server.ts:
server.ts:    // 1. Batch Sync Status Summary
server.ts:    const totalBatches = batchStatusMap.size;
server.ts:    let activeBatchesText = '';
server.ts:    let activeBatchesCount = 0;
server.ts:    let completedBatchesCount = 0;
server.ts:
server.ts:    for (const [batchId, info] of batchStatusMap) {
server.ts:        const remaining = info.total - info.processed;
server.ts:        if (remaining > 0) {
server.ts:            activeBatchesCount++;
server.ts:            const progress = info.total > 0 ? Math.min(100, Math.max(0, Math.floor((info.processed / info.total) * 100))) : 0;
server.ts:            const barLength = 10;
server.ts:            const filled = Math.min(barLength, Math.max(0, Math.round((progress / 100) * barLength)));
server.ts:            const bar = '█'.repeat(filled) + '░'.repeat(Math.max(0, barLength - filled));
server.ts:            const elapsed = (Date.now() - info.startTime) / 1000;
server.ts:            
server.ts:            activeBatchesText += `\n📦 **BATCH ID:** \`${batchId.substring(0, 8)}\`\n`;
server.ts:            activeBatchesText += `  ├─ **Progress:** \`[${bar}]\` **${progress}%**\n`;
server.ts:            activeBatchesText += `  ├─ **Processed:** \`${info.processed} / ${info.total}\` (Success: \`${info.success}\` | Failed: \`${info.failed}\`)\n`;
server.ts:            activeBatchesText += `  ├─ **Current Link:** \`${info.currentLink ? info.currentLink.split('/').pop() : 'Idle'}\`\n`;
server.ts:            activeBatchesText += `  └─ **Running:** \`${formatDashboardTime(elapsed)}\`\n`;
server.ts:        } else {
server.ts:            completedBatchesCount++;
server.ts:        }
server.ts:    }
server.ts:
server.ts:    if (activeBatchesCount === 0) {
server.ts:        activeBatchesText = `\n_No active batch synchronizations running._`;
server.ts:    }
server.ts:
server.ts:    // 2. Active Mirror Jobs & Standalone Jobs
server.ts:    let activeMirrorText = '';
server.ts:    let activeTaskText = '';
server.ts:    let activeMirrorCount = 0;
server.ts:    let activeTaskCount = 0;
server.ts:
server.ts:    for (const [key, job] of activeTaskJobs) {
server.ts:        const linkParts = job.link.split('/');
server.ts:        const msgId = linkParts[linkParts.length - 1] || 'Media';
server.ts:        
server.ts:        let jobText = `\n⚙️ **TASK:** [Message ${msgId}](${job.link})\n`;
server.ts:        jobText += `  ├─ **Phase:** `;
server.ts:        if (job.phase === 'searching') jobText += `🔍 Searching/Resolving source\n`;
server.ts:        else if (job.phase === 'cooldown') jobText += `⏳ In Cooldown (${job.cooldownRemaining || 0}s remaining)\n`;
server.ts:        else if (job.phase === 'downloading') jobText += `📥 Downloading from Telegram\n`;
server.ts:        else if (job.phase === 'uploading') jobText += `📤 Uploading to Destination\n`;
server.ts:        
server.ts:        if (job.progress) {
server.ts:            const progress = job.progress;
server.ts:            const barLength = 10;
server.ts:            const percentVal = Math.min(100, Math.max(0, progress.percent || 0));
server.ts:            const filledLength = Math.min(barLength, Math.max(0, Math.round((percentVal / 100) * barLength)));
server.ts:            const emptyLength = Math.max(0, barLength - filledLength);
server.ts:            const bar = '█'.repeat(filledLength) + '░'.repeat(emptyLength);
server.ts:            
server.ts:            jobText += `  ├─ **Progress:** \`[${bar}]\` **${percentVal.toFixed(1)}%**\n`;
server.ts:            jobText += `  ├─ **Size:** \`${formatBytes(progress.current)} / ${formatBytes(progress.total)}\`\n`;
server.ts:            jobText += `  ├─ **Speed:** \`${formatBytes(progress.speed)}/s\`\n`;
server.ts:            jobText += `  └─ **Time:** Elapsed \`${progress.elapsed}s\` | ETA \`${progress.eta >= 0 ? progress.eta + 's' : 'N/A'}\`\n`;
server.ts:        }
server.ts:        jobText += `  -----------------------------\n`;
server.ts:
server.ts:        if (job.isMirror) {
server.ts:            activeMirrorText += jobText;
server.ts:            activeMirrorCount++;
server.ts:        } else {
server.ts:            activeTaskText += jobText;
server.ts:            activeTaskCount++;
server.ts:        }
server.ts:    }
server.ts:
server.ts:    if (activeMirrorCount === 0) {
server.ts:        activeMirrorText = `_No active mirror tasks running._`;
server.ts:    }
server.ts:    if (activeTaskCount === 0) {
server.ts:        activeTaskText = `_No active standalone downloads running._`;
server.ts:    }
server.ts:
server.ts:    return `📈 **𝗗𝗔𝗦𝗛𝗕𝗢𝗔𝗥𝗗 : 𝗥𝗼𝗵𝗶𝘁  𝗦𝗮𝘃𝗲  𝗥𝗲𝘀𝘁𝗿𝗶𝗰𝘁𝗶𝗰𝘁𝗲𝗱  𝗯𝗼𝘁  𝟮𝟬𝟮𝟲**\n` +
server.ts:           `▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬\n\n` +
server.ts:           `🖥️ **𝗦𝗬𝗦𝗧𝗘𝗠  𝗛𝗘𝗔𝗟𝗧𝗛:**\n` +
server.ts:           `├ **Database Connect:** ${dbStatusText}\n` +
server.ts:           `├ **Active Pipelines:** \`${activeTasks} / ${MAX_CONCURRENT_TASKS} workers\`\n` +
server.ts:           `└ **Queue Backlog:** \`${queueLen} pending files\`\n\n` +
server.ts:           `⚡ **𝗦𝗣𝗘𝗘𝗗  &  𝗟𝗜𝗠𝗜𝗧𝗦:**\n` +

server.ts:           `📦 **𝗕𝗔𝗧𝗖𝗛  𝗦𝗬𝗡𝗖  𝗦𝗨𝗠𝗠𝗔𝗥𝗬:**\n` +
