server.ts:interface BatchInfo {
server.ts:    total: number;
server.ts:    processed: number;
server.ts:    success: number;
server.ts:    failed: number;
server.ts:    startTime: number;
server.ts:    summaryMsgId: number;
server.ts:    chatId: number;
server.ts:    currentLink?: string;
server.ts:    lastUpdate?: number;
server.ts:}
server.ts:batchStatusMap = new Map<string, BatchInfo>();
server.ts:
server.ts:const refreshBatchSummary = async (batchId: string, force = false) => {
server.ts:    const info = batchStatusMap.get(batchId);
server.ts:    if (!info || !bot) return;
server.ts:
server.ts:    // Throttle updates: only once every 3 seconds unless forced (final update)
server.ts:    const now = Date.now();
server.ts:    if (!force && info.lastUpdate && (now - info.lastUpdate < 3000)) return;
server.ts:    info.lastUpdate = now;
server.ts:
server.ts:    const remaining = info.total - info.processed;
server.ts:    const elapsed = (now - info.startTime) / 1000;
server.ts:    const avgTimePerLink = info.processed > 0 ? elapsed / info.processed : 0;
server.ts:    const etaSeconds = remaining * avgTimePerLink;
server.ts:
server.ts:    const formatTime = (s: number) => {
server.ts:        if (s <= 0) return "0s";
server.ts:        if (s < 60) return `${Math.round(s)}s`;
server.ts:        const m = Math.floor(s / 60);
server.ts:        const sec = Math.round(s % 60);
server.ts:        return `${m}m ${sec}s`;
server.ts:    };
server.ts:
server.ts:    const progress = info.total > 0 ? Math.floor((info.processed / info.total) * 100) : 0;
server.ts:    const size = 15;
server.ts:    const filled = Math.min(size, Math.max(0, Math.floor((size * (info.processed || 0)) / (info.total || 1))));
server.ts:    const empty = Math.max(0, size - filled);
server.ts:    const bar = "🟩".repeat(filled) + "⬜".repeat(empty);
server.ts:
server.ts:    const isFinished = remaining <= 0;
server.ts:    const progressBar = "█".repeat(Math.min(8, Math.max(0, Math.round(progress / 12.5))));
server.ts:
server.ts:    const text = `╔═══ ⚡ 𝗕𝗮𝘁𝗰𝗵 𝗘𝗻𝗴𝗶𝗻𝗲 ⚡ ═══╗\n` +
server.ts:                 `║ 🟢 𝗦𝘆𝘀𝘁𝗲𝗺: 𝗢𝗻𝗹𝗶𝗻𝗲\n` +
server.ts:                 `║ 📊 𝗟𝗼𝗮𝗱: ${progress}% ${progressBar}\n` +
server.ts:                 `╠═══════════════════════\n` +
server.ts:                 `║ 🔗 𝗜𝗻𝗽𝘂𝘁 : ${info.total} 𝗟𝗶𝗻𝗸𝘀\n` +
server.ts:                 `║ ✅ 𝗗𝗼𝗻𝗲  : ${info.success}\n` +
server.ts:                 `║ ❌ 𝗘𝗿𝗿𝗼𝗿 : ${info.failed}\n` +
server.ts:                 `║ ⏳ 𝗪𝗮𝗶𝘁  : ${remaining}\n` +
server.ts:                 `╠═══════════════════════\n` +
server.ts:                 `║ 🚀 𝗔𝗰𝘁𝗶𝘃𝗲 𝗠𝗼𝗱𝗲\n` +
server.ts:                 `║ ${info.currentLink ? info.currentLink.substring(0, 30) : 'Idle...'}\n` +
server.ts:                 `╠═══════════════════════\n` +
server.ts:                 `║ ⏱ ${formatTime(elapsed)} • ${isFinished ? 'Done ⚡' : 'Updating...'}\n` +
server.ts:                 `╚═══════════════════════╝\n` +
server.ts:                 `🔄 ${isFinished ? 'Finished' : '𝗨𝗽𝗱𝗮𝘁𝗶𝗻𝗴...'}`;
server.ts:
server.ts:    await safeEditMessage(text, {
server.ts:        chat_id: info.chatId,
server.ts:        message_id: info.summaryMsgId,
server.ts:        parse_mode: 'Markdown',
server.ts:        disable_web_page_preview: true
server.ts:    });
server.ts:};
server.ts:
server.ts:async function dbEnqueueTask(task: Task) {
server.ts:    if (!task.id) {
server.ts:        task.id = Date.now().toString(36) + Math.random().toString(36).substring(2, 8);
server.ts:    }
server.ts:    if (queuedTasksCollection) {
server.ts:        try {
server.ts:            await queuedTasksCollection.insertOne({
server.ts:                id: task.id,
server.ts:                chatId: task.chatId,
server.ts:                userId: task.userId,
server.ts:                link: task.link,
server.ts:                statusMsgId: task.statusMsgId,
server.ts:                batchId: task.batchId,
server.ts:                overrideThreadId: task.overrideThreadId,
server.ts:                forceGeneralPath: task.forceGeneralPath,
server.ts:                overrideTargetId: task.overrideTargetId,
server.ts:                isMirror: task.isMirror,
server.ts:                fullMirrorSessionId: task.fullMirrorSessionId,
server.ts:                topicCloneSessionId: task.topicCloneSessionId,
server.ts:                createdAt: new Date()
server.ts:            });
server.ts:        } catch (err) {
server.ts:            console.error('[DB Queue] Error inserting task:', err);
server.ts:        }
server.ts:    }
server.ts:}
server.ts:
server.ts:dbEnqueueTasks = async function(tasks: Task[]) {
server.ts:    if (tasks.length === 0) return;
server.ts:    for (const t of tasks) {
server.ts:        if (!t.id) {
server.ts:            t.id = Date.now().toString(36) + Math.random().toString(36).substring(2, 8);
server.ts:        }
server.ts:    }
server.ts:    if (queuedTasksCollection) {
server.ts:        try {
server.ts:            const now = Date.now();
server.ts:            const docs = tasks.map((t, index) => ({
server.ts:                id: t.id,
server.ts:                chatId: t.chatId,
server.ts:                userId: t.userId,
server.ts:                link: t.link,
server.ts:                statusMsgId: t.statusMsgId,
server.ts:                batchId: t.batchId,
server.ts:                overrideThreadId: t.overrideThreadId,
server.ts:                forceGeneralPath: t.forceGeneralPath,
server.ts:                overrideTargetId: t.overrideTargetId,
server.ts:                isMirror: t.isMirror,
server.ts:                fullMirrorSessionId: t.fullMirrorSessionId,
server.ts:                topicCloneSessionId: t.topicCloneSessionId,
server.ts:                createdAt: new Date(now + index)
server.ts:            }));
server.ts:            await queuedTasksCollection.insertMany(docs);
server.ts:        } catch (err) {
server.ts:            console.error('[DB Queue] Error inserting bulk tasks:', err);
server.ts:        }
server.ts:    }
server.ts:}
server.ts:
server.ts:dbDequeueTask = async function(task: Task) {
server.ts:    if (queuedTasksCollection && task.id) {
server.ts:        try {
server.ts:            await queuedTasksCollection.deleteOne({ id: task.id });
server.ts:        } catch (err) {
server.ts:            console.error('[DB Queue] Error deleting task:', err);
server.ts:        }
server.ts:    }
server.ts:}
server.ts:
server.ts:async function dbRequeueFrontTask(task: Task) {
server.ts:    if (queuedTasksCollection && task.id) {
server.ts:        try {
server.ts:            await queuedTasksCollection.insertOne({
server.ts:                id: task.id,
server.ts:                chatId: task.chatId,
server.ts:                userId: task.userId,
server.ts:                link: task.link,
server.ts:                statusMsgId: task.statusMsgId,
server.ts:                batchId: task.batchId,
server.ts:                overrideThreadId: task.overrideThreadId,
server.ts:                forceGeneralPath: task.forceGeneralPath,
server.ts:                overrideTargetId: task.overrideTargetId,
server.ts:                isMirror: task.isMirror,
server.ts:                fullMirrorSessionId: task.fullMirrorSessionId,
server.ts:                topicCloneSessionId: task.topicCloneSessionId,
server.ts:                retries: task.retries || 0,
server.ts:                createdAt: new Date(Date.now() - 3600000)
server.ts:            });
server.ts:        } catch (err) {
server.ts:            console.error('[DB Queue] Error requeuing front task:', err);
server.ts:        }
server.ts:    }
server.ts:}
server.ts:
server.ts:dbClearAllTasks = async function() {
server.ts:    if (queuedTasksCollection) {
server.ts:        try {
server.ts:            await queuedTasksCollection.deleteMany({});
server.ts:        } catch (err) {
server.ts:            console.error('[DB Queue] Error clearing tasks:', err);
server.ts:        }
server.ts:    }
server.ts:}
server.ts:
server.ts:async function saveFailedTask(task: Task, reason: string) {
server.ts:    if (failedTasksCollection) {
server.ts:        try {
server.ts:            await failedTasksCollection.insertOne({
server.ts:                id: task.id || Date.now().toString(36) + Math.random().toString(36).substring(2, 8),
server.ts:                chatId: Number(task.chatId),
server.ts:                userId: Number(task.userId),
server.ts:                link: task.link,
server.ts:                error: reason,
server.ts:                failedAt: new Date(),
server.ts:                overrideThreadId: task.overrideThreadId,
server.ts:                forceGeneralPath: task.forceGeneralPath,
server.ts:                overrideTargetId: task.overrideTargetId,
server.ts:                isMirror: task.isMirror
server.ts:            });
server.ts:            console.log(`[Failed Tracker] Saved failed task to MongoDB: ${task.link}`);
server.ts:        } catch (err) {
server.ts:            console.error('[Failed Tracker] Error saving failed task:', err);
server.ts:        }
server.ts:    }
server.ts:}
server.ts:
server.ts:retryFailedTask = async function(id: string) {
server.ts:    if (failedTasksCollection) {
server.ts:        try {
server.ts:            const taskDoc = await failedTasksCollection.findOne({ id });
server.ts:            if (taskDoc) {
server.ts:                const newTask: Task = {
server.ts:                    id: taskDoc.id,
server.ts:                    chatId: Number(taskDoc.chatId),
server.ts:                    userId: Number(taskDoc.userId),
server.ts:                    link: taskDoc.link,
server.ts:                    overrideThreadId: taskDoc.overrideThreadId,
server.ts:                    forceGeneralPath: taskDoc.forceGeneralPath,
server.ts:                    overrideTargetId: taskDoc.overrideTargetId,
server.ts:                    isMirror: taskDoc.isMirror,
server.ts:                    retries: 0
server.ts:                };
server.ts:                taskQueue.push(newTask);
server.ts:                await dbEnqueueTask(newTask);
server.ts:                await failedTasksCollection.deleteOne({ id });
server.ts:                console.log(`[Failed Tracker] Retrying failed task: ${newTask.link}`);
server.ts:                runNextTask();
server.ts:                return true;
server.ts:            }
server.ts:        } catch (err) {
server.ts:            console.error('[Failed Tracker] Error retrying failed task:', err);
server.ts:        }
server.ts:    }
server.ts:    return false;
server.ts:}
server.ts:
server.ts:retryAllFailedTasks = async function() {
server.ts:    if (failedTasksCollection) {
server.ts:        try {
server.ts:            const failedTasks = await failedTasksCollection.find({}).toArray();
server.ts:            if (failedTasks.length > 0) {
server.ts:                const restoredTasks: Task[] = [];
server.ts:                for (const taskDoc of failedTasks) {
server.ts:                    const newTask: Task = {
server.ts:                        id: taskDoc.id || Date.now().toString(36) + Math.random().toString(36).substring(2, 8),
server.ts:                        chatId: Number(taskDoc.chatId),
server.ts:                        userId: Number(taskDoc.userId),
server.ts:                        link: taskDoc.link,
server.ts:                        overrideThreadId: taskDoc.overrideThreadId,
server.ts:                        forceGeneralPath: taskDoc.forceGeneralPath,
server.ts:                        overrideTargetId: taskDoc.overrideTargetId,
server.ts:                        isMirror: taskDoc.isMirror,
server.ts:                        retries: 0
server.ts:                    };
server.ts:                    taskQueue.push(newTask);
server.ts:                    restoredTasks.push(newTask);
server.ts:                }
server.ts:                await dbEnqueueTasks(restoredTasks);
server.ts:                await failedTasksCollection.deleteMany({});
server.ts:                console.log(`[Failed Tracker] Requeued ${failedTasks.length} failed tasks.`);
server.ts:                runNextTask();
server.ts:                return failedTasks.length;
server.ts:            }
server.ts:        } catch (err) {
server.ts:            console.error('[Failed Tracker] Error retrying all failed tasks:', err);
server.ts:        }
server.ts:    }
server.ts:    return 0;
server.ts:}
server.ts:
server.ts:clearAllFailedTasks = async function() {
server.ts:    if (failedTasksCollection) {
server.ts:        try {
server.ts:            await failedTasksCollection.deleteMany({});
server.ts:            console.log('[Failed Tracker] Cleared all failed tasks from database');
server.ts:            return true;
server.ts:        } catch (err) {
server.ts:            console.error('[Failed Tracker] Error clearing failed tasks:', err);
server.ts:        }
server.ts:    }
server.ts:    return false;
server.ts:}
server.ts:
server.ts:runNextTask = async () => {
server.ts:    console.log(`[Queue] runNextTask started. activeTasksCount: ${activeTasksCount}, queueLength: ${taskQueue.length}`);
server.ts:    if (isQueuePaused) {
server.ts:        console.log(`[Queue] Queue is currently PAUSED. Aborting execution.`);
server.ts:        return;
server.ts:    }
server.ts:    if (activeTasksCount >= MAX_CONCURRENT_TASKS || taskQueue.length === 0) {
server.ts:        console.log(`[Queue] Hit limit or empty queue. Aborting runNextTask.`);
server.ts:        return;
server.ts:    }
server.ts:
server.ts:    const fallbackIdVal = currentAdminId || ALLOWED_ADMIN_IDS[0] || 'admin';
server.ts:    const getTaskUserKey = (uId: any) => {
server.ts:        if (!uId) return fallbackIdVal.toString();
server.ts:        return uId.toString();
server.ts:    };
server.ts:
server.ts:    // Find the first task whose user has available task slots
server.ts:    let taskIndex = -1;
server.ts:    for (let i = 0; i < taskQueue.length; i++) {
server.ts:        const uIdKey = getTaskUserKey(taskQueue[i].userId);
server.ts:        const uActive = activeTasksPerUser.get(uIdKey) || 0;
server.ts:        if (uActive < MAX_TASKS_PER_USER) {
server.ts:            taskIndex = i;
server.ts:            break;
server.ts:        }
server.ts:    }
server.ts:
server.ts:    if (taskIndex === -1) {
server.ts:        console.log(`[Queue] All tasks belong to users who are currently busy. Keeping in queue.`);
server.ts:        return;
server.ts:    }
server.ts:
server.ts:    // Force sequential: if any task is already active globally, do not start
server.ts:    if (activeTasksCount > 0) {
server.ts:        console.log(`[Queue] Another task is already active. Sequential mode enforced.`);
server.ts:        return;
server.ts:    }
server.ts:
server.ts:    // Check if the task is stuck (if it takes too long or failed before)
server.ts:    // Here we can just ensure that if the queue runner is called, 
server.ts:    // it will always pick the oldest (or next) task sequentially.
server.ts:    // The current implementation of taskQueue.splice(taskIndex, 1)[0] 
server.ts:    // and the check `if (activeTasksCount > 0) return;` 
server.ts:    // already enforces sequential execution (MaxActive=1).
server.ts:    // The user also mentioned "stuck files" or "failed files" 
server.ts:    // need to be retried automatically. 
server.ts:    // The retry logic is already in place.
server.ts:    
server.ts:    // Capture the task and check if we can immediately trigger another worker for the next slot
server.ts:    const task = taskQueue.splice(taskIndex, 1)[0];
server.ts:    dbDequeueTask(task).catch(e => console.error("[Queue DB] dequeue error:", e));
server.ts:    const fromId = task.userId;
server.ts:    const fromIdKey = getTaskUserKey(fromId);
server.ts:
server.ts:    activeTasksCount++;
server.ts:    const currentActiveForUser = (activeTasksPerUser.get(fromIdKey) || 0) + 1;
server.ts:    activeTasksPerUser.set(fromIdKey, currentActiveForUser);
server.ts:
server.ts:    const jobKey = `${task.userId}-${task.link}`;
server.ts:    activeTaskJobs.set(jobKey, {
server.ts:        link: task.link,
server.ts:        chatId: task.chatId,
server.ts:        userId: task.userId,
server.ts:        phase: 'searching',
server.ts:        startTime: Date.now(),
server.ts:        isMirror: task.isMirror
server.ts:    });
server.ts:    
server.ts:    console.log(`[Queue] Task assigned. activeTasksCount: ${activeTasksCount}, User ${fromIdKey} active: ${currentActiveForUser}`);
server.ts:    
server.ts:    // Proactively try to fill next available slot if more tasks exist
server.ts:    if (activeTasksCount < MAX_CONCURRENT_TASKS && taskQueue.length > 0) {
server.ts:        console.log(`[Queue] Triggering another worker slots empty.`);
server.ts:        setImmediate(runNextTask);
server.ts:    }
server.ts:
server.ts:    let statusMsgId = task.statusMsgId || 0;
server.ts:    try {
server.ts:        // Update batch info if applicable
server.ts:        if (task.batchId) {
server.ts:            console.log(`[Queue] refreshing batch summary...`);
server.ts:            const info = batchStatusMap.get(task.batchId);
server.ts:            if (info) {
server.ts:                info.currentLink = task.link;
server.ts:                await refreshBatchSummary(task.batchId).catch(e => console.error("[Queue] refreshBatchSummary Error:", e));
server.ts:            }
server.ts:        }
server.ts:
server.ts:        // Send individual status message one-by-one if not exists
server.ts:        if (!statusMsgId) {
server.ts:            console.log(`[Queue] Sending initial searching message...`);
server.ts:            const msgId = task.link.split('/').pop() || 'media';
server.ts:            const sMsg = await safeSendMessage(task.chatId, `🔍 **Searching Item:** \`${msgId}\`...`, { parse_mode: 'Markdown' });
server.ts:            statusMsgId = sMsg?.message_id || 0;
server.ts:        }
server.ts:
server.ts:        let cooldownSecs = globalCooldownSeconds;
server.ts:        if (approvedUsersCollection) {
server.ts:            try {
server.ts:                const targetUidStr = await resolveSettingsUserId(fromId);
server.ts:                const userDoc = await approvedUsersCollection.findOne({ userId: targetUidStr });
server.ts:                if (userDoc && userDoc.cooldownSeconds !== undefined) {
server.ts:                    cooldownSecs = Number(userDoc.cooldownSeconds);
server.ts:                }
server.ts:            } catch (dbErr) {
server.ts:                console.error("[Queue] Failed to fetch cooldownSeconds from DB:", dbErr);
server.ts:            }
server.ts:        }
server.ts:
server.ts:        const taskNow = Date.now();
server.ts:        const userLastTaskTime = lastTaskTimePerUser.get(fromIdKey) || 0;
server.ts:        console.log(`[Queue] Cooldown check. taskNow: ${taskNow}, lastTaskTime: ${userLastTaskTime}, configSecs: ${cooldownSecs}`);
server.ts:        
server.ts:        const cooldownMs = cooldownSecs * 1000;
server.ts:        if (cooldownMs > 0 && userLastTaskTime > 0) {
server.ts:            const timeDiff = taskNow - userLastTaskTime;
server.ts:            if (timeDiff < cooldownMs) {
server.ts:                const waitSecs = Math.ceil((cooldownMs - timeDiff) / 1000);
server.ts:                const jobKey = `${task.userId}-${task.link}`;
server.ts:                const job = activeTaskJobs.get(jobKey);
server.ts:                if (job) {
server.ts:                    job.phase = 'cooldown';
server.ts:                    job.cooldownRemaining = waitSecs;
server.ts:                }
server.ts:                console.log(`[Queue] Throttling for ${waitSecs}s due to ${cooldownSecs}s cooldown.`);
server.ts:                for (let i = waitSecs; i > 0; i--) {
server.ts:                    if (job) {
server.ts:                        job.cooldownRemaining = i;
server.ts:                    }
server.ts:                    const totalBarLen = 12;
server.ts:                    const elapsed = waitSecs - i;
server.ts:                    const filledLen = Math.min(totalBarLen, Math.max(0, Math.round((elapsed / Math.max(1, waitSecs)) * totalBarLen)));
server.ts:                    const emptyLen = Math.max(0, totalBarLen - filledLen);
server.ts:                    const cBar = '█'.repeat(filledLen) + '░'.repeat(emptyLen);
server.ts:                    const pct = Math.round((elapsed / waitSecs) * 100);
server.ts:
server.ts:                    const cooldownText = `⏳ **Auto-Countdown Cooldown Active**\n\n` +
server.ts:                                         `• **Status:** Anti-Flood Limit Buffer\n` +
server.ts:                                         `• **Time Remaining:** \`${i} seconds\`\n` +
server.ts:                                         `• **Delay Progress:** \`[${cBar}]\` **${pct}%**\n\n` +
server.ts:                                         `🛡 _Protecting your Telegram session against API throttling limits._`;
server.ts:
server.ts:                    await safeEditMessage(cooldownText, { chat_id: task.chatId, message_id: statusMsgId, parse_mode: 'Markdown' }).catch(() => {});
server.ts:                    await sleep(1000);
server.ts:                }
server.ts:            }
server.ts:        }
server.ts:
server.ts:        nextTaskRunAt = null;
server.ts:        console.log(`[Queue] Starting processTask for link ${task.link}`);
server.ts:        let success = false;
server.ts:        let finalDone = false;
server.ts:        let isTopicBlocked = false;
server.ts:
server.ts:        if (task.fullMirrorSessionId) {
server.ts:            const session = activeFullMirrorSessions.get(task.fullMirrorSessionId);
server.ts:            if (session) {
server.ts:                const threadId = task.overrideThreadId !== undefined && task.overrideThreadId !== null ? task.overrideThreadId : 'general';
server.ts:                const topicStat = session.topicStats[threadId];
server.ts:                if (topicStat) {
server.ts:                    const topicTitle = (topicStat.title || '').trim().toLowerCase();
server.ts:                    // Load blocked topics
server.ts:                    const settingsUid = await resolveSettingsUserId(fromId);
server.ts:                    const userDoc = await approvedUsersCollection?.findOne({ userId: settingsUid });
server.ts:                    const blockedTopics = (userDoc?.blockedTopics || []).map((t: string) => t.trim().toLowerCase());
server.ts:                    
server.ts:                    const srcMatch = task.link.match(/t\.me\/(?:c\/)?([a-zA-Z0-9_-]+)\/(\d+)/i);
server.ts:                    let sourceGroupIdStr = srcMatch ? srcMatch[1].replace('-100', '') : '';
server.ts:                    
server.ts:                    if (blockedTopics.some((bt: string) => 
server.ts:                        bt === topicTitle || 
server.ts:                        bt === threadId.toString() || 
server.ts:                        (sourceGroupIdStr && (bt === `-100${sourceGroupIdStr}_${threadId}` || bt === `${sourceGroupIdStr}_${threadId}`))
server.ts:                    )) {
server.ts:                        isTopicBlocked = true;
server.ts:                        console.log(`[Queue] Skipping blocked topic: "${topicStat.title}" (ThreadId: ${threadId})`);
server.ts:                    }
server.ts:                }
server.ts:            }
server.ts:        }
server.ts:
server.ts:        try {
server.ts:            if (isTopicBlocked) {
server.ts:                await safeEditMessage(`🚫 **Skipped task (Blocked Topic):**\n└ Link: ${task.link}`, { chat_id: task.chatId, message_id: statusMsgId });
server.ts:                success = true; // Act as success so that it iterates forward cleanly without errors
server.ts:                finalDone = true;
server.ts:            } else {
server.ts:                // Task timeout is completely removed as requested, allowing unlimited download time for large content.
server.ts:                success = await processTask(task.chatId, task.link, statusMsgId, fromId, task.overrideThreadId, task.forceGeneralPath, task.overrideTargetId, task.isMirror);
server.ts:                finalDone = true;
server.ts:            }
server.ts:        } catch (taskErr: any) {
server.ts:            const isSkip = taskErr.message?.includes("DOWNLOAD_SKIPPED");
server.ts:            if (!isSkip) {
server.ts:                console.error(`[Queue] processTask failed or threw natively:`, taskErr);
server.ts:            } else {
server.ts:                console.log(`[Queue] Task skipped gracefully: ${task.link}`);
server.ts:            }
server.ts:            
server.ts:            if (taskErr.message.includes("FloodWait")) {
server.ts:                let waitMs = 30000; // Default 30s
server.ts:                const match = taskErr.message.match(/wait of (\d+) seconds/i) || taskErr.message.match(/(\d+) seconds/i);
server.ts:                if (match && match[1]) {
server.ts:                    waitMs = (parseInt(match[1]) + 5) * 1000;
server.ts:                }
server.ts:                console.log(`[Queue] Task paused due to flood wait. Re-queueing at the front. Waiting ${waitMs}ms.`);
server.ts:                taskQueue.unshift(task); // Re-queue at the front to maintain order
server.ts:                await safeEditMessage(`⚠️ **Task Paused (FloodWait):** Telegram Bot currently under heavy abuse. Waiting ${Math.ceil(waitMs / 1000)} seconds... \n\n🔗 **Link:** ${task.link}`, { chat_id: task.chatId, message_id: statusMsgId });
server.ts:                await sleep(waitMs);
server.ts:                return;
server.ts:            }
server.ts:
server.ts:            task.retries = (task.retries || 0) + 1;
server.ts:            // isSkip is already declared above in the catch block
server.ts:            const isPermissionError = taskErr.message?.includes("Userbot session does not have access");
server.ts:            if (task.retries <= 3 && !isSkip && !isPermissionError) {
server.ts:                console.log(`[Queue] Retrying task (Retry ${task.retries}/3)`);
server.ts:                taskQueue.unshift(task); // Re-queue at the front
server.ts:                dbRequeueFrontTask(task).catch(e => console.error("[Queue DB] requeue front error on retry:", e));
server.ts:                await safeEditMessage(`⚠️ **Task Error:** ${taskErr.message}\nRetrying (${task.retries}/3)...\n\n🔗 **Link:** ${task.link}`, { chat_id: task.chatId, message_id: statusMsgId });
server.ts:                if (taskErr.message?.includes('Timeout')) {
server.ts:                    await sleep(3000); // Give MTProto more time
server.ts:                }
server.ts:            } else {
server.ts:                // Final failure
server.ts:                const failReason = isSkip ? "Task skipped by user choice" : (taskErr.message || "Max retries reached");
server.ts:                await safeEditMessage(isSkip ? `⏭️ **Task Skipped:** ${failReason}\n\n🔗 **Link:** ${task.link}` : `❌ **Task Failed:** ${taskErr.message} (Max retries reached)\n\n🔗 **Link:** ${task.link}`, { chat_id: task.chatId, message_id: statusMsgId });
server.ts:                
server.ts:                if (!isSkip) {
server.ts:                    await saveFailedTask(task, failReason);
server.ts:                }
server.ts:
server.ts:                // Add to in-memory logs
server.ts:                const cleanLink = task.link.trim();
server.ts:                const destTargetStr = task.overrideTargetId ? task.overrideTargetId.toString() : 'Default';
server.ts:                inMemoryMirrorLogs.unshift({
server.ts:                    link: cleanLink,
server.ts:                    destId: destTargetStr,
server.ts:                    mirroredAt: new Date().toISOString(),
server.ts:                    status: isSkip ? 'Skipped' : 'Failed',
server.ts:                    info: failReason
server.ts:                });
server.ts:                if (inMemoryMirrorLogs.length > 500) inMemoryMirrorLogs.pop();
server.ts:                finalDone = true;
server.ts:            }
server.ts:            success = false;
server.ts:        }
server.ts:        console.log(`[Queue] processTask finished with success=${success}`);
server.ts:        if (success) {
server.ts:            downloadCounter++;
server.ts:            if (downloadCounter >= 100) {
server.ts:                console.log("[Anti-Flood] Cool down triggered (100 tasks). Waiting 90s...");
server.ts:                await sleep(90000);
server.ts:                downloadCounter = 0;
server.ts:            }
server.ts:        }
server.ts:        lastTaskTimePerUser.set(fromIdKey, Date.now());
server.ts:
server.ts:        if (finalDone && task.fullMirrorSessionId) {
server.ts:            const session = activeFullMirrorSessions.get(task.fullMirrorSessionId);
server.ts:            if (session) {
server.ts:                session.processedFiles++;
server.ts:                if (success) {
server.ts:                    session.successCount++;
server.ts:                } else {
server.ts:                    session.failedCount++;
server.ts:                }
server.ts:
server.ts:                // Update topic stats
server.ts:                const threadId = task.overrideThreadId !== undefined && task.overrideThreadId !== null ? task.overrideThreadId : 'general';
server.ts:                const topicStat = session.topicStats[threadId];
server.ts:                if (topicStat) {
server.ts:                    topicStat.processed++;
server.ts:                    if (topicStat.processed >= topicStat.total && !topicStat.isMarkedCompleted) {
server.ts:                        topicStat.isMarkedCompleted = true;
server.ts:                    }
server.ts:                }
server.ts:
server.ts:                // Trigger progress bar write
server.ts:                await updateGlobalMirrorProgress(task.fullMirrorSessionId).catch(err => {
server.ts:                    console.error("[Full Mirror Progress Update Failed]", err);
server.ts:                });
server.ts:            }
server.ts:        }
server.ts:
server.ts:        if (finalDone && task.topicCloneSessionId) {
server.ts:            const tcSession = activeTopicCloneSessions.get(task.topicCloneSessionId);
server.ts:            if (tcSession) {
server.ts:                tcSession.processedFiles++;
server.ts:                if (success) {
server.ts:                    tcSession.successCount++;
server.ts:                } else {
server.ts:                    tcSession.failedCount++;
server.ts:                }
server.ts:                
server.ts:                const now = Date.now();
server.ts:                const isFinished = tcSession.processedFiles >= tcSession.totalFiles;
server.ts:                if (!tcSession.lastUpdate || now - tcSession.lastUpdate >= 4000 || isFinished) {
server.ts:                    tcSession.lastUpdate = now;
server.ts:                    await updateTopicCloneProgress(task.topicCloneSessionId).catch(err => {
server.ts:                        console.error("[Topic Clone Progress Update Failed]", err);
server.ts:                    });
server.ts:                }
server.ts:            }
server.ts:        }
server.ts:        
server.ts:        if (task.batchId) {
server.ts:            const info = batchStatusMap.get(task.batchId);
server.ts:            if (info) {
server.ts:                info.processed++;
server.ts:                if (success) info.success++;
server.ts:                else info.failed++;
server.ts:                const isFinished = info.processed === info.total;
server.ts:                await refreshBatchSummary(task.batchId, isFinished).catch(e => console.error("[Queue] Final refreshBatchSummary Error:", e));
server.ts:            }
server.ts:        }
server.ts:    } catch (e: any) {
server.ts:        console.error("[Queue] Queue execution error:", e);
server.ts:        if (e.description?.includes("too many requests") || e.error_code === 429) {
server.ts:            const retryAfter = (e.parameters?.retry_after || 60) + 5;
server.ts:            console.warn(`[Queue] 429 Detected. Slot paused for ${retryAfter}s...`);
server.ts:            await safeEditMessage(`⚠️ **429 Too Many Requests:** Telegram limitation active. Retrying automatically in ${retryAfter} seconds...`, { chat_id: task.chatId, message_id: statusMsgId });
server.ts:            // Put the task back at the front if it failed due to 429
server.ts:            taskQueue.unshift(task);
server.ts:            dbRequeueFrontTask(task).catch(e => console.error("[Queue DB] requeue front error:", e));
server.ts:            setTimeout(runNextTask, retryAfter * 1000);
server.ts:            // activeTasksCount-- needs to be removed from here because it's handled in finally
server.ts:            activeTasksPerUser.set(fromIdKey, Math.max(0, (activeTasksPerUser.get(fromIdKey) || 1) - 1));
server.ts:            return;
server.ts:        }
server.ts:    } finally {
server.ts:        const jobKey = `${task.userId}-${task.link}`;
server.ts:        activeTaskJobs.delete(jobKey);
server.ts:        activeTasksCount--;
server.ts:        activeTasksPerUser.set(fromIdKey, Math.max(0, (activeTasksPerUser.get(fromIdKey) || 1) - 1));
server.ts:        console.log(`[Queue] Finally block hit. activeTasksCount is now ${activeTasksCount}, User ${fromIdKey} active: ${activeTasksPerUser.get(fromIdKey)}`);
server.ts:        // Add human-like random jitter (1 to 3 seconds) between tasks in the same slot
server.ts:        const jitter = Math.floor(Math.random() * 2000) + 1000;
server.ts:        nextTaskRunAt = Date.now() + jitter;
server.ts:        setTimeout(runNextTask, jitter); 
server.ts:    }
server.ts:};
server.ts:
server.ts:async function updateMirrorPathLastId(userId: number, sourceId: string, lastId: number) {
server.ts:    if (!approvedUsersCollection) return;
server.ts:    try {
server.ts:        const settingsUid = await resolveSettingsUserId(userId);
server.ts:        const userDoc = await approvedUsersCollection.findOne({ userId: settingsUid });
server.ts:        if (!userDoc || !userDoc.mirrorPaths) return;
server.ts:        
server.ts:        const normalize = (id: any) => id?.toString().replace('-100', '');
server.ts:        const cleanSource = normalize(sourceId);
server.ts:        
server.ts:        let updated = false;
server.ts:        const newPaths = userDoc.mirrorPaths.map((p: any) => {
server.ts:            if (normalize(p.sourceId) === cleanSource || normalize(p.sourceNumericId) === cleanSource) {
server.ts:                p.lastScannedAt = new Date().toISOString();
server.ts:                updated = true;
server.ts:                if (!p.lastProcessedMsgId || lastId > p.lastProcessedMsgId) {
server.ts:                    p.lastProcessedMsgId = lastId;
server.ts:                }
server.ts:            }
server.ts:            return p;
server.ts:        });
server.ts:        
server.ts:        if (updated) {
server.ts:            await approvedUsersCollection.updateOne(
server.ts:                { userId: settingsUid },
server.ts:                { $set: { mirrorPaths: newPaths } }
server.ts:            );
server.ts:        }
server.ts:    } catch (e: any) {
server.ts:        console.error(`[Watcher] Error updating last processed message ID: ${e.message}`);
server.ts:    }
server.ts:}
server.ts:
server.ts:async function catchUpLiveMirrors(userId: number, client: TelegramClient) {
server.ts:    if (!approvedUsersCollection) return;
server.ts:    try {
server.ts:        const settingsUid = await resolveSettingsUserId(userId);
server.ts:        const userDoc = await approvedUsersCollection.findOne({ userId: settingsUid });
server.ts:        if (!userDoc || !userDoc.mirrorPaths) return;
server.ts:
server.ts:        const livePaths = userDoc.mirrorPaths.filter((p: any) => p.isLive === true);
server.ts:        if (livePaths.length === 0) return;
server.ts:
server.ts:        console.log(`[CatchUp] Checking catch-up for user ${userId} with ${livePaths.length} live paths...`);
server.ts:
server.ts:        for (const pathObj of livePaths) {
server.ts:            const sourceId = pathObj.sourceId;
server.ts:            const lastId = pathObj.lastProcessedMsgId;
server.ts:            
server.ts:            // Set exact scan time
server.ts:            pathObj.lastScannedAt = new Date().toISOString();
server.ts:            
server.ts:            if (!lastId) {
server.ts:                // If there's no lastProcessedMsgId, initialize it with the latest message ID
server.ts:                try {
server.ts:                    const sourceEntity = await safelyResolveFullEntity(client, sourceId).catch(() => null);
server.ts:                    if (sourceEntity) {
server.ts:                        const msgs = await client.getMessages(sourceEntity, { limit: 1 });
server.ts:                        if (msgs && msgs.length > 0) {
server.ts:                            pathObj.lastProcessedMsgId = msgs[0].id;
server.ts:                            await approvedUsersCollection.updateOne(
server.ts:                                { userId: settingsUid },
server.ts:                                { $set: { mirrorPaths: userDoc.mirrorPaths } }
server.ts:                            );
server.ts:                            console.log(`[CatchUp] Initialized lastProcessedMsgId to ${msgs[0].id} for source ${sourceId}`);
server.ts:                        }
server.ts:                    }
server.ts:                } catch (err: any) {
server.ts:                    console.error(`[CatchUp] Failed to initialize lastProcessedMsgId for ${sourceId}:`, err.message);
server.ts:                }
server.ts:                continue;
server.ts:            }
server.ts:
server.ts:            console.log(`[CatchUp] Scanning ${sourceId} from message ID > ${lastId}`);
server.ts:
server.ts:            try {
server.ts:                const sourceEntity = await safelyResolveFullEntity(client, sourceId).catch(() => null);
server.ts:                if (!sourceEntity) {
server.ts:                    console.warn(`[CatchUp] Could not resolve source entity for ${sourceId}`);
server.ts:                    continue;
server.ts:                }
server.ts:
server.ts:                // Query messages with minId = lastId. This gets messages newer than lastId.
server.ts:                const messages: any = await client.getMessages(sourceEntity, {
server.ts:                    minId: lastId,
server.ts:                    limit: 100
server.ts:                });
server.ts:
server.ts:                if (messages && messages.length > 0) {
server.ts:                    console.log(`[CatchUp] Found ${messages.length} missed messages in source ${sourceId}`);
server.ts:                    // Since getMessages returns newest first, reverse it to process from oldest to newest
server.ts:                    const sortedMessages = [...messages].reverse();
server.ts:
server.ts:                    for (const m of sortedMessages) {
server.ts:                        if (m instanceof Api.MessageEmpty) continue;
server.ts:                        if (m.out) continue;
server.ts:                        if (m.action instanceof Api.MessageActionTopicCreate) {
server.ts:                            continue;
server.ts:                        }
server.ts:
server.ts:                        // Verify topic alignment if this is a topic-specific mirror path
server.ts:                        if (pathObj.topicName && pathObj.topicName !== 'General') {
server.ts:                            const replyTo = m.replyTo;
server.ts:                            const sourceTopicId = replyTo ? (replyTo.replyToTopId || replyTo.replyToMsgId) : undefined;
server.ts:                            let msgTopicName = 'General';
server.ts:                            
server.ts:                            if (sourceTopicId) {
server.ts:                                const sourceIdStr = sourceId.toString().replace('-100', '');
server.ts:                                if (!sourceTopicCache.has(sourceIdStr)) sourceTopicCache.set(sourceIdStr, new Map());
server.ts:                                const chatTopicCache = sourceTopicCache.get(sourceIdStr)!;
server.ts:                                if (chatTopicCache.has(sourceTopicId)) {
server.ts:                                    msgTopicName = chatTopicCache.get(sourceTopicId)!;
server.ts:                                } else {
server.ts:                                    try {
server.ts:                                        const topicsResult: any = await client.invoke(new Api.channels.GetForumTopics({
server.ts:                                            channel: sourceEntity,
server.ts:                                            limit: 500
server.ts:                                        }));
server.ts:                                        const foundTopic = topicsResult.topics?.find((t: any) => t.id === sourceTopicId);
server.ts:                                        if (foundTopic) {
server.ts:                                            msgTopicName = foundTopic.title;
server.ts:                                            chatTopicCache.set(sourceTopicId, msgTopicName);
server.ts:                                        }
server.ts:                                    } catch(e) {}
server.ts:                                }
server.ts:                            }
server.ts:
server.ts:                            if (msgTopicName.trim().toLowerCase() !== pathObj.topicName.trim().toLowerCase()) {
server.ts:                                continue;
server.ts:                            }
server.ts:                        }
server.ts:
server.ts:                        const destId = pathObj.destId;
server.ts:                        let destTopicId = pathObj.destThreadId ? Number(pathObj.destThreadId) : undefined;
server.ts:
server.ts:                        if (pathObj.topicName && pathObj.topicName !== 'General') {
server.ts:                            try {
server.ts:                                const destEntity = await safelyResolveFullEntity(client, destId);
server.ts:                                const destTopics: any = await client.invoke(new Api.channels.GetForumTopics({
server.ts:                                    channel: destEntity,
server.ts:                                    limit: 200
server.ts:                                }));
server.ts:                                const found = destTopics.topics?.find((t: any) => t.title?.trim().toLowerCase() === pathObj.topicName.trim().toLowerCase());
server.ts:                                if (found) {
server.ts:                                    destTopicId = found.id;
server.ts:                                } else {
server.ts:                                    const createResult: any = await client.invoke(new Api.channels.CreateForumTopic({
server.ts:                                        channel: destEntity,
server.ts:                                        title: pathObj.topicName
server.ts:                                    }));
server.ts:                                    const update = createResult.updates?.find((u: any) => u.className === 'UpdateNewForumTopic');
server.ts:                                    destTopicId = update?.topicId;
server.ts:                                }
server.ts:                            } catch (e: any) {
server.ts:                                console.error(`[CatchUp] Dest Topic resolution failed: ${e.message}`);
server.ts:                            }
server.ts:                        }
server.ts:
server.ts:                        const entityId = sourceId.toString().replace('-100', '');
server.ts:                        const virtualLink = `https://t.me/c/${entityId}/${m.id}`;
server.ts:
server.ts:                        console.log(`[CatchUp] Queueing missed message ${m.id} to task queue... -> Link: ${virtualLink}`);
server.ts:
server.ts:                        // Notify user about start
server.ts:                        bot?.sendMessage(userId, `🚀 **Live Mirror Detected New Content!**\n\nStarting download for: ${virtualLink}`, { parse_mode: 'Markdown' }).catch(() => {});
server.ts:
server.ts:                        const newTask = {
server.ts:                            chatId: userId,
server.ts:                            link: virtualLink,
server.ts:                            userId: userId,
server.ts:                            overrideThreadId: destTopicId,
server.ts:                            overrideTargetId: destId,
server.ts:                            isMirror: true,
server.ts:                            retries: 0
server.ts:                        };
server.ts:                        taskQueue.push(newTask);
server.ts:                        dbEnqueueTask(newTask).catch(e => console.error("[Queue DB] enqueue error:", e));
server.ts:
server.ts:                        pathObj.lastProcessedMsgId = m.id;
server.ts:                    }
server.ts:
server.ts:                    // Save the updated lastProcessedMsgId to the DB
server.ts:                    await approvedUsersCollection.updateOne(
server.ts:                        { userId: settingsUid },
server.ts:                        { $set: { mirrorPaths: userDoc.mirrorPaths } }
server.ts:                    );
server.ts:
server.ts:                    runNextTask();
server.ts:                }
server.ts:            } catch (err: any) {
server.ts:                console.error(`[CatchUp] Error during catch-up for ${sourceId}:`, err.message);
server.ts:                if (err.message && err.message.includes('CHANNEL_INVALID')) {
server.ts:                    console.log(`[CatchUp] Disabling live path for invalid channel: ${sourceId}`);
server.ts:                    pathObj.isLive = false;
server.ts:                    await approvedUsersCollection.updateOne(
server.ts:                        { userId: settingsUid },
server.ts:                        { $set: { mirrorPaths: userDoc.mirrorPaths } }
server.ts:                    );
server.ts:                    bot?.sendMessage(userId, `⚠️ **Mirror Path Disabled**\n\nThe source channel ${sourceId} is invalid or no longer accessible. The live mirror path has been disabled.`).catch(() => {});
server.ts:                }
server.ts:            }
server.ts:        }
server.ts:        
server.ts:        // Save the updated lastScannedAt and message IDs back to database
server.ts:        await approvedUsersCollection.updateOne(
server.ts:            { userId: settingsUid },
server.ts:            { $set: { mirrorPaths: userDoc.mirrorPaths } }
server.ts:        );
server.ts:    } catch (err: any) {
server.ts:        console.error(`[CatchUp] Error in catch-Up live mirrors:`, err.message);
server.ts:    }
server.ts:}
server.ts:
server.ts:startAutoMirrorWatcher = async (userId: number, client: TelegramClient) => {
server.ts:    if (activeWatchers.has(userId)) return;
server.ts:    activeWatchers.add(userId);
server.ts:
server.ts:    console.log(`[Watcher] Starting Auto-Mirror for user ${userId}`);
server.ts:
server.ts:    client.addEventHandler(async (event: any) => {
server.ts:        try {
server.ts:            const message = event.message;
server.ts:            if (!message || message.out) return;
server.ts:
server.ts:            // Use event.match or event.chatId as it's more consistent in GramJS
server.ts:            let chatIdRaw = '';
server.ts:            if (event.chatId) {
server.ts:                chatIdRaw = event.chatId.toString().replace('-100', '');
server.ts:            } else if (message.peerId) {
server.ts:                const pid = message.peerId;
server.ts:                if (pid.channelId) chatIdRaw = pid.channelId.toString().replace('-100', '');
server.ts:                else if (pid.chatId) chatIdRaw = pid.chatId.toString();
server.ts:                else if (pid.userId) chatIdRaw = pid.userId.toString();
server.ts:            }
server.ts:            
server.ts:            if (!chatIdRaw) return;
server.ts:            
server.ts:            const settingsUid = await resolveSettingsUserId(userId);
server.ts:            const userDoc = await approvedUsersCollection?.findOne({ userId: settingsUid });
server.ts:            const paths = userDoc?.mirrorPaths || [];
server.ts:            
server.ts:            // Normalize IDs for robust matching
server.ts:            const normalize = (id: any) => id?.toString().replace('-100', '');
server.ts:
server.ts:            // 1. Match by Normalized Chat ID
server.ts:            const cleanChatId = chatIdRaw;
server.ts:            let matchingPaths = paths.filter((p: any) => 
server.ts:                p.isLive === true && (
server.ts:                    normalize(p.sourceId) === cleanChatId || 
server.ts:                    normalize(p.sourceNumericId) === cleanChatId
server.ts:                )
server.ts:            );
server.ts:
server.ts:            // 2. Fallback: match by Username if not matched yet
server.ts:            if (matchingPaths.length === 0) {
server.ts:                try {
server.ts:                    const chatEntity = await message.getChat();
server.ts:                    if (chatEntity && chatEntity.username) {
server.ts:                        const currentUsername = chatEntity.username.toLowerCase();
server.ts:                        matchingPaths = paths.filter((p: any) => 
server.ts:                            p.isLive === true && (
server.ts:                                (p.sourceUsername && p.sourceUsername.toLowerCase() === currentUsername) ||
server.ts:                                (p.sourceId && p.sourceId.replace('@', '').toLowerCase() === currentUsername)
server.ts:                            )
server.ts:                        );
server.ts:                    }
server.ts:                } catch (e) {}
server.ts:            }
server.ts:
server.ts:            if (matchingPaths.length > 0) {
server.ts:                let topicName = 'General';
server.ts:                
server.ts:                // Proactively handle Topic Creation service messages
server.ts:                if (message.action instanceof Api.MessageActionTopicCreate) {
server.ts:                    topicName = (message.action as any).title || 'General';
server.ts:                    console.log(`[Watcher] New topic detected in source: ${topicName}`);
server.ts:                    
server.ts:                    if (!sourceTopicCache.has(chatIdRaw)) sourceTopicCache.set(chatIdRaw, new Map());
server.ts:                    const chatTopicCache = sourceTopicCache.get(chatIdRaw)!;
server.ts:                    chatTopicCache.set(message.id, topicName);
server.ts:                } else {
server.ts:                    // Determine Topic Name from reply header
server.ts:                    const replyTo = message.replyTo;
server.ts:                    // For Forums, replyToTopId is the topic ID
server.ts:                    const sourceTopicId = replyTo ? (replyTo.replyToTopId || replyTo.replyToMsgId) : undefined;
server.ts:                    
server.ts:                    if (sourceTopicId) {
server.ts:                        if (!sourceTopicCache.has(chatIdRaw)) sourceTopicCache.set(chatIdRaw, new Map());
server.ts:                        const chatTopicCache = sourceTopicCache.get(chatIdRaw)!;
server.ts:
server.ts:                        if (chatTopicCache.has(sourceTopicId)) {
server.ts:                            topicName = chatTopicCache.get(sourceTopicId)!;
server.ts:                        } else {
server.ts:                            try {
server.ts:                                const chatEntity = await message.getChat();
server.ts:                                let foundTopic = null;
server.ts:                                try {
server.ts:                                    const topicsResult: any = await client.invoke(new Api.channels.GetForumTopics({
server.ts:                                        channel: chatEntity,
server.ts:                                        limit: 500 // Search deeper
server.ts:                                    }));
server.ts:                                    foundTopic = topicsResult.topics?.find((t: any) => t.id === sourceTopicId);
server.ts:                                } catch (e1) {}
server.ts:
server.ts:                                if (foundTopic) {
server.ts:                                    topicName = foundTopic.title;
server.ts:                                    chatTopicCache.set(sourceTopicId, topicName);
server.ts:                                } else {
server.ts:                                    // Fallback: inspect starting topic message directly
server.ts:                                    const msgs = await client.getMessages(chatEntity, { ids: [sourceTopicId] });
server.ts:                                    if (msgs && msgs.length > 0) {
server.ts:                                        const topicMsg = msgs[0];
server.ts:                                        if (topicMsg?.action && (topicMsg.action as any).title) {
server.ts:                                            topicName = (topicMsg.action as any).title;
server.ts:                                            chatTopicCache.set(sourceTopicId, topicName);
server.ts:                                        }
server.ts:                                    }
server.ts:                                }
server.ts:                            } catch (err: any) {
server.ts:                                console.error(`[Watcher] Failed to get topic info: ${err.message}`);
server.ts:                            }
server.ts:                        }
server.ts:                    }
server.ts:                }
server.ts:
server.ts:                // Select the best matching path from matchingPaths based on topicName
server.ts:                let match = matchingPaths.find((p: any) => p.topicName && p.topicName.trim().toLowerCase() === topicName.trim().toLowerCase());
server.ts:                if (!match) {
server.ts:                    // Fallback to general/full mirror path
server.ts:                    match = matchingPaths.find((p: any) => !p.topicName || p.topicName === 'General');
server.ts:                }
server.ts:
server.ts:                if (!match) {
server.ts:                    console.log(`[Watcher] No matching path/topic mirror config found for topic "${topicName}" in source ${chatIdRaw}`);
server.ts:                    return;
server.ts:                }
server.ts:
server.ts:                console.log(`[Watcher] Match found! Source: ${match.sourceId} (Topic: ${topicName}) -> Dest: ${match.destId}`);
server.ts:
server.ts:                const destId = match.destId;
server.ts:                let destTopicId = match.destThreadId ? Number(match.destThreadId) : undefined;
server.ts:                
server.ts:                if (!destTopicId && topicName !== 'General') {
server.ts:                    if (!mirrorTopicCache.has(destId)) mirrorTopicCache.set(destId, new Map());
server.ts:                    const userDestCache = mirrorTopicCache.get(destId)!;
server.ts:                    
server.ts:                    if (userDestCache.has(topicName)) {
server.ts:                        destTopicId = userDestCache.get(topicName);
server.ts:                    } else {
server.ts:                        try {
server.ts:                            const destEntity = await safelyResolveFullEntity(client, destId);
server.ts:                            // Robust Topic Verification before creation
server.ts:                            const destTopics: any = await client.invoke(new Api.channels.GetForumTopics({
server.ts:                                channel: destEntity,
server.ts:                                limit: 500 // Scan deeper for existing topic
server.ts:                            }));
server.ts:                            const found = destTopics.topics?.find((t: any) => t.title?.trim().toLowerCase() === topicName.trim().toLowerCase());
server.ts:                            if (found) {
server.ts:                                destTopicId = found.id;
server.ts:                                console.log(`[Watcher] Found existing topic "${topicName}" in destination ID: ${destTopicId}`);
server.ts:                            } else {
server.ts:                                console.log(`[Watcher] No existing topic "${topicName}" found. Creating new topic...`);
server.ts:                                try {
server.ts:                                    const createResult: any = await client.invoke(new Api.channels.CreateForumTopic({
server.ts:                                        channel: destEntity,
server.ts:                                        title: topicName
server.ts:                                    }));
server.ts:                                    const update = createResult.updates?.find((u: any) => u.className === 'UpdateNewForumTopic');
server.ts:                                    destTopicId = update?.topicId;
server.ts:                                } catch (e) {
server.ts:                                    // Final retry scan
server.ts:                                    const retryTopics: any = await client.invoke(new Api.channels.GetForumTopics({ channel: destEntity, limit: 200 }));
server.ts:                                    destTopicId = retryTopics.topics?.find((t: any) => t.title?.trim().toLowerCase() === topicName.trim().toLowerCase())?.id;
server.ts:                                }
server.ts:                            }
server.ts:                            if (destTopicId) userDestCache.set(topicName, destTopicId);
server.ts:                        } catch (err: any) {
server.ts:                            console.error(`[Watcher] Dest Topic Error: ${err.message}`);
server.ts:                        }
server.ts:                    }
server.ts:                }
server.ts:
server.ts:                const entityId = chatIdRaw.replace('-100', '');
server.ts:                const virtualLink = `https://t.me/c/${entityId}/${message.id}`;
server.ts:                
server.ts:                // If it was just a topic creation, we don't need to mirror a specific message
server.ts:                if (message.action instanceof Api.MessageActionTopicCreate) {
server.ts:                    return;
server.ts:                }
server.ts:
server.ts:                console.log(`[Watcher] Queuing mirror task: ${virtualLink} -> Topic ${destTopicId || 'General'}`);
server.ts:                
server.ts:                // --- INCREMENTAL MIRRORING CHECK ---
server.ts:                if (mirroredMessagesCollection) {
server.ts:                    const alreadyMirrored = await mirroredMessagesCollection.findOne({ link: virtualLink, destId: match.destId });
server.ts:                    if (alreadyMirrored) {
server.ts:                        console.log(`[Watcher] Message already mirrored, skipping: ${virtualLink}`);
server.ts:                        return;
server.ts:                    }
server.ts:                }
server.ts:                
server.ts:                // Notify user about start
server.ts:                bot?.sendMessage(userId, `🚀 **Live Mirror Detected New Content!**\n\nStarting download for: ${virtualLink}`, { parse_mode: 'Markdown' }).catch(() => {});
server.ts:
server.ts:                const newTask = {
server.ts:                    chatId: userId, 
server.ts:                    link: virtualLink,
server.ts:                    userId: userId,
server.ts:                    overrideThreadId: destTopicId,
server.ts:                    overrideTargetId: match.destId,
server.ts:                    isMirror: true,
server.ts:                    retries: 0
server.ts:                };
server.ts:                taskQueue.push(newTask);
server.ts:                dbEnqueueTask(newTask).catch(e => console.error("[Queue DB] enqueue error:", e));
server.ts:                
server.ts:                runNextTask();
server.ts:                
server.ts:                // Keep track of the last processed message ID in real-time
server.ts:                await updateMirrorPathLastId(userId, chatIdRaw, message.id);
server.ts:            }
server.ts:        } catch (e: any) {
server.ts:            console.error(`[Watcher] Event Handler Error: ${e.message}`);
server.ts:        }
server.ts:    }, new NewMessage({}));
server.ts:
server.ts:    // Trigger catch-up scanning for any messages sent during downtime
server.ts:    catchUpLiveMirrors(userId, client).catch((err: any) => {
server.ts:        console.error(`[Watcher] Catch-up failed for user ${userId}:`, err.message);
server.ts:    });
server.ts:}
server.ts:
server.ts:getConnectedUserbotClient = async (userId: number) => {
server.ts:    const lookupId = userId;
server.ts:
server.ts:    // Check if there's already a connection in progress
server.ts:    if (pendingConnections.has(lookupId)) {
server.ts:        return pendingConnections.get(lookupId);
server.ts:    }
server.ts:
server.ts:    const connectPromise = (async () => {
server.ts:        // Check if we already have an active client for this user
server.ts:        if (userClients.has(lookupId)) {
server.ts:            const client = userClients.get(lookupId)!;
server.ts:            try {
server.ts:                if (client.connected) {
server.ts:                    try {
server.ts:                        await client.getMe();
server.ts:                        await startAutoMirrorWatcher(lookupId, client);
server.ts:                        return client;
server.ts:                    } catch (e: any) {
server.ts:                        if (e.message?.includes('AUTH_KEY_UNREGISTERED')) throw e;
server.ts:                    }
server.ts:                }
server.ts:                await client.connect();
server.ts:                await client.getMe();
server.ts:                await startAutoMirrorWatcher(lookupId, client);
server.ts:                return client;
server.ts:            } catch (e: any) {
server.ts:                console.warn(`[getConnectedUserbotClient] Client fail for ${lookupId}: ${e.message}`);
server.ts:                userClients.delete(lookupId);
server.ts:                activeWatchers.delete(lookupId);
server.ts:            }
server.ts:        }
server.ts:
server.ts:        // Try to load session from DB/Memory
server.ts:        let sessionStr = userSessions.get(lookupId);
server.ts:        if (!sessionStr && approvedUsersCollection) {
server.ts:            const userDoc = await approvedUsersCollection.findOne({ userId: lookupId.toString() });
server.ts:            if (userDoc?.stringSession) {
server.ts:                sessionStr = userDoc.stringSession;
server.ts:                userSessions.set(lookupId, sessionStr);
server.ts:            }
server.ts:        }
server.ts:
server.ts:        if (!sessionStr) return null;
server.ts:
server.ts:        try {
server.ts:            if (!apiIdValue || !apiHashValue) return null;
server.ts:
server.ts:            const client = new TelegramClient(
server.ts:                new StringSession(sessionStr),
server.ts:                apiIdValue,
server.ts:                apiHashValue,
server.ts:                {
server.ts:                    connectionRetries: 15,
server.ts:                    timeout: 300000,
server.ts:                    requestRetries: 10,
server.ts:                    ...getRandomDeviceProps(),
server.ts:                    useWSS: false,
server.ts:                    autoReconnect: true,
server.ts:                    floodSleepThreshold: 300,
server.ts:                    proxy: undefined,
server.ts:                }
server.ts:            );
server.ts:
server.ts:            await client.connect();
server.ts:            
server.ts:            // Verify session immediately
server.ts:            try {
server.ts:                await client.getMe();
server.ts:                userClients.set(lookupId, client);
server.ts:                console.log(`[getConnectedUserbotClient] Session verified for ${lookupId}`);
server.ts:                
server.ts:                // Prefetch dialogs backgroundly and safely
server.ts:                client.getDialogs({ limit: 150 }).then(dlgs => {
server.ts:                    (client as any)._dialogsCache = dlgs;
server.ts:                    (client as any)._dialogsCacheTime = Date.now();
server.ts:                }).catch(err => {
server.ts:                    console.warn(`[getConnectedUserbotClient] Background prefetch failed: ${err.message}`);
server.ts:                });
server.ts:
server.ts:                await startAutoMirrorWatcher(lookupId, client);
server.ts:                return client;
server.ts:            } catch (meErr: any) {
server.ts:                console.error(`[getConnectedUserbotClient] Verification failed for ${lookupId}: ${meErr.message}`);
server.ts:                if (meErr.message?.includes('AUTH_KEY_UNREGISTERED')) {

server.ts:                    // if (approvedUsersCollection) {
server.ts:                    //     await approvedUsersCollection.updateOne({ userId: lookupId.toString() }, { $unset: { stringSession: "" } });
server.ts:                    // }
server.ts:                    await client.disconnect().catch(() => {});
server.ts:                    return null;
server.ts:                }
server.ts:                
server.ts:                if (meErr.message?.includes('AUTH_KEY_DUPLICATED')) {
server.ts:                    userSessions.delete(lookupId);
server.ts:                    if (approvedUsersCollection) {
server.ts:                        await approvedUsersCollection.updateOne({ userId: lookupId.toString() }, { $unset: { stringSession: "" } });
server.ts:                    }
server.ts:                    await client.disconnect().catch(() => {});
server.ts:                    console.error(`Session key duplicated for ${lookupId}. Cleared session.`);
server.ts:                    return null;
server.ts:                }
server.ts:                
server.ts:                await client.disconnect().catch(() => {});
server.ts:                throw new Error(`[Userbot] Verification failed for ${lookupId}: ${meErr.message}`);
server.ts:            }
server.ts:        } catch (err: any) {
server.ts:            console.warn(`[Userbot] Userbot Client failed for user ${lookupId}:`, err);
server.ts:            if (err.message?.includes('AUTH_KEY_DUPLICATED') || (err as any).errorMessage === 'AUTH_KEY_DUPLICATED') {
server.ts:                userSessions.delete(lookupId);
server.ts:                if (approvedUsersCollection) {
server.ts:                    await approvedUsersCollection.updateOne({ userId: lookupId.toString() }, { $unset: { stringSession: "" } });
server.ts:                }
server.ts:                console.error(`Session key duplicated for ${lookupId} in watchdog. Cleared session.`);
server.ts:                throw new Error(`[Userbot] Session key duplicated for ${lookupId}. Cleared session.`);
server.ts:            }
server.ts:            throw new Error(`[Userbot] Connection failed for user ${lookupId}: ${err.message}`);
server.ts:        }
server.ts:    })();
