server.ts:    pendingConnections.set(lookupId, connectPromise);
server.ts:    try {
server.ts:        return await connectPromise;
server.ts:    } finally {
server.ts:        pendingConnections.delete(lookupId);
server.ts:    }
server.ts:};
server.ts:
server.ts:createProgressBar = (total: number, current: number, label: string, startTime: number, pathStr?: string) => {
server.ts:    const percentage = Math.min(100, Math.max(0, Math.floor((current / (total || 1)) * 100)));
server.ts:    const size = 12;
server.ts:    const filled = Math.min(size, Math.max(0, Math.floor((size * (current || 0)) / (total || 1))));
server.ts:    const empty = Math.max(0, size - filled);
server.ts:    
server.ts:    const colors = ["🟥", "🟧", "🟨", "🟩", "🟦", "🟪"];
server.ts:    let progressBar = "";
server.ts:    for(let i = 0; i < filled; i++) {
server.ts:        progressBar += colors[Math.floor((i / size) * colors.length)];
server.ts:    }
server.ts:    progressBar += "⬜".repeat(empty);
server.ts:    
server.ts:    const now = Date.now();
server.ts:    const elapsed = (now - startTime) / 1000;
server.ts:    const speed = elapsed > 0 ? (current / elapsed) : 0; // bytes per second
server.ts:    const remaining = total - current;
server.ts:    const eta = speed > 0 ? Math.ceil(remaining / speed) : 0;
server.ts:
server.ts:    const formatBytes = (bytes: number) => {
server.ts:        if (!bytes || isNaN(bytes) || bytes <= 0) return '0 B';
server.ts:        const k = 1024;
server.ts:        const sizes = ['B', 'KB', 'MB', 'GB', 'TB', 'PB'];
server.ts:        let i = Math.floor(Math.log(bytes) / Math.log(k));
server.ts:        if (i < 0) i = 0;
server.ts:        if (i >= sizes.length) i = sizes.length - 1;
server.ts:        return parseFloat((bytes / Math.pow(k, i)).toFixed(2)) + ' ' + sizes[i];
server.ts:    };
server.ts:
server.ts:    const formatTime = (seconds: number) => {
server.ts:        if (seconds === 0 || seconds > 86400 * 7) return "∞";
server.ts:        if (seconds < 60) return `${seconds}s`;
server.ts:        const totalMins = Math.floor(seconds / 60);
server.ts:        const secs = seconds % 60;
server.ts:        if (totalMins < 60) return `${totalMins}m ${secs}s`;
server.ts:        const hours = Math.floor(totalMins / 60);
server.ts:        const mins = totalMins % 60;
server.ts:        return `${hours}h ${mins}m`;
server.ts:    };
server.ts:
server.ts:    const formatElapsed = (seconds: number) => {
server.ts:        if (seconds <= 0) return "0s";
server.ts:        if (seconds < 60) return `${Math.floor(seconds)}s`;
server.ts:        const totalMins = Math.floor(seconds / 60);
server.ts:        const secs = Math.floor(seconds % 60);
server.ts:        if (totalMins < 60) return `${totalMins}m ${secs}s`;
server.ts:        const hours = Math.floor(totalMins / 60);
server.ts:        const mins = totalMins % 60;
server.ts:        return `${hours}h ${mins}m`;
server.ts:    };
server.ts:
server.ts:    const icon = label === "Downloading" ? "⬇️" : "⬆️";
server.ts:    const meta = label === "Downloading" ? "Server ⟿ Bot" : "Bot ⟿ Your Chat";
server.ts:
server.ts:    // Enhanced progress tracker
server.ts:    const text = `╔═══ ${icon} ${label.toUpperCase()} ═══╗\n` +
server.ts:           `║ ${progressBar} ${percentage}%\n` +
server.ts:           `╠══════════════════════╣\n` +
server.ts:           `║ 📦 𝗦𝗶𝘇𝗲   : ${formatBytes(current)} / ${formatBytes(total)}\n` +
server.ts:           `║ ⚡ 𝗦𝗽𝗲𝗲𝗱  : ${formatBytes(speed)}/s\n` +
server.ts:           `║ ⏳ 𝗘𝗧𝗔    : ${formatTime(eta)} (Elapsed: ${formatElapsed(elapsed)})\n` +
server.ts:           `╠══════════════════════╣\n` +
server.ts:           `║ 🚀 𝗠𝗼𝗱𝗲   : ${currentUploadEngine}\n` +
server.ts:           `║ 🛰 𝗥𝗼𝘂𝘁𝗲  : ${meta}\n` +
server.ts:           `║ 👣 𝗣𝗮𝘁𝗵    : ${pathStr || 'N/A'}\n` +
server.ts:           `╚══════════════════════╝`;
server.ts:    return text;
server.ts:};
server.ts:
server.ts:createProgressMarkup = (jobKey: string, isPaused: boolean) => ({
server.ts:    inline_keyboard: [[
server.ts:        { text: isPaused ? '▶️ Resume' : '⏸️ Pause', callback_data: `${isPaused ? 'resume' : 'pause'}_${jobKey}` },
server.ts:        { text: '🔁 Retry', callback_data: `retry_${jobKey}` },
server.ts:        { text: '⏭️ Skip Task', callback_data: `skip_${jobKey}` }
server.ts:    ]]
server.ts:});
server.ts:
server.ts:    const getBestClientForLinkData = async (linkData: any, preferredUserIdParam: number, statusMsgId?: number, chatId?: number) => {
server.ts:        const preferredUserId = Number(await resolveSettingsUserId(preferredUserIdParam)) || preferredUserIdParam;
server.ts:
server.ts:        // Strictly use the preferred account as requested by the user
server.ts:        const client = await getConnectedUserbotClient(preferredUserId);
server.ts:        if (client) {
server.ts:            try {
server.ts:                let entity = await safelyResolveEntity(client, linkData.channelId).catch(() => null);
server.ts:                if (!entity && !linkData.isRestricted && typeof linkData.channelId === 'string' && !linkData.channelId.startsWith('-')) {
server.ts:                    try {
server.ts:                        await client.invoke(new Api.channels.JoinChannel({ channel: linkData.channelId }));
server.ts:                        entity = await safelyResolveEntity(client, linkData.channelId).catch(() => null);
server.ts:                    } catch (joinErr) {}
server.ts:                }
server.ts:                if (entity) {
server.ts:                    const msgs = await client.getMessages(entity, { ids: [linkData.msgId] });
server.ts:                    if (msgs && msgs.length > 0 && !(msgs[0] instanceof Api.MessageEmpty)) {
server.ts:                        return { client, userId: preferredUserId, peer: entity };
server.ts:                    }
server.ts:                }
server.ts:            } catch (e) {}
server.ts:        }
server.ts:
server.ts:        // --- SMART ROUTING CRITICAL FALLBACK ---
server.ts:        // Try other active connected clients to see if they can access the channel/message
server.ts:        for (const [vId, otherClient] of userClients.entries()) {
server.ts:            if (vId === preferredUserId) continue;
server.ts:            try {
server.ts:                let entity = await safelyResolveEntity(otherClient, linkData.channelId).catch(() => null);
server.ts:                if (!entity && !linkData.isRestricted && typeof linkData.channelId === 'string' && !linkData.channelId.startsWith('-')) {
server.ts:                    try {
server.ts:                        await otherClient.invoke(new Api.channels.JoinChannel({ channel: linkData.channelId }));
server.ts:                        entity = await safelyResolveEntity(otherClient, linkData.channelId).catch(() => null);
server.ts:                    } catch (joinErr) {}
server.ts:                }
server.ts:                if (entity) {
server.ts:                    const msgs = await otherClient.getMessages(entity, { ids: [linkData.msgId] });
server.ts:                    if (msgs && msgs.length > 0 && !(msgs[0] instanceof Api.MessageEmpty)) {
server.ts:                        console.log(`[Smart Route] Routed fetch of msg ${linkData.msgId} from preferred user ${preferredUserId} to active user ${vId}`);
server.ts:                        return { client: otherClient, userId: vId, peer: entity };
server.ts:                    }
server.ts:                }
server.ts:            } catch (e) {}
server.ts:        }
server.ts:
server.ts:        return { client, userId: preferredUserId, peer: null };
server.ts:    };
server.ts:
server.ts:    const getBestClientForTarget = async (targetId: any, preferredUserIdParam: number, statusMsgId?: number, chatId?: number) => {
server.ts:        const preferredUserId = Number(await resolveSettingsUserId(preferredUserIdParam)) || preferredUserIdParam;
server.ts:        
server.ts:        // Strictly use the preferred account as requested by the user
server.ts:        const prefClient = await getConnectedUserbotClient(preferredUserId);
server.ts:        if (prefClient) {
server.ts:            try {
server.ts:                let entity = await safelyResolveEntity(prefClient, targetId).catch(() => null);
server.ts:                if (!entity && typeof targetId === 'string' && !targetId.startsWith('-') && !targetId.startsWith('{')) {
server.ts:                    try {
server.ts:                        await prefClient.invoke(new Api.channels.JoinChannel({ channel: targetId }));
server.ts:                        entity = await safelyResolveEntity(prefClient, targetId).catch(() => null);
server.ts:                    } catch (joinErr) {}
server.ts:                }
server.ts:                if (entity) return { client: prefClient, userId: preferredUserId, peer: entity };
server.ts:            } catch (e) {}
server.ts:        }
server.ts:
server.ts:        // --- SMART ROUTING CRITICAL FALLBACK ---
server.ts:        // Try other active connected clients to see if they can access the destination target
server.ts:        for (const [vId, otherClient] of userClients.entries()) {
server.ts:            if (vId === preferredUserId) continue;
server.ts:            try {
server.ts:                let entity = await safelyResolveEntity(otherClient, targetId).catch(() => null);
server.ts:                if (!entity && typeof targetId === 'string' && !targetId.startsWith('-') && !targetId.startsWith('{')) {
server.ts:                    try {
server.ts:                        await otherClient.invoke(new Api.channels.JoinChannel({ channel: targetId }));
server.ts:                        entity = await safelyResolveEntity(otherClient, targetId).catch(() => null);
server.ts:                    } catch (joinErr) {}
server.ts:                }
server.ts:                if (entity) {
server.ts:                    console.log(`[Smart Route] Routed destination ${targetId} from preferred user ${preferredUserId} to active user ${vId}`);
server.ts:                    return { client: otherClient, userId: vId, peer: entity };
server.ts:                }
server.ts:            } catch (e) {}
server.ts:        }
server.ts:        
server.ts:        return { client: prefClient, userId: preferredUserId, peer: null };
server.ts:    };
server.ts:
server.ts:    const processTask = async (chatId: number, link: string, statusMsgId: number, userId: number, threadIdOverride?: number, forceGeneralPath?: boolean, targetIdOverride?: any, isMirror?: boolean): Promise<boolean> => {
server.ts:        let cleanLink = link.trim();
server.ts:        let destTargetStr = (targetIdOverride || "Default").toString();
server.ts:        let tempFilePath: string | undefined = undefined;
server.ts:        let thumbPath: string | undefined = undefined;
server.ts:        let hasThumb = false;
server.ts:        try {
server.ts:            const getLinkData = (url: string) => {
server.ts:                const cleanUrl = url.trim().split('?')[0];
server.ts:                const parts = cleanUrl.split('/').filter(p => p.length > 0);
server.ts:                
server.ts:                const msgId = parseInt(parts[parts.length - 1]);
server.ts:                if (isNaN(msgId)) throw new Error("Could not parse Message ID from link.");
server.ts:
server.ts:                const domainIdx = parts.findIndex(p => p.includes('t.me') || p === 't.me');
server.ts:                if (domainIdx === -1 || parts.length <= domainIdx + 1) {
server.ts:                    throw new Error("Invalid Telegram Link format.");
server.ts:                }
server.ts:
server.ts:                const nextPart = parts[domainIdx + 1];
server.ts:                if (nextPart === 'c' && parts.length > domainIdx + 2) {
server.ts:                    let channelId = parts[domainIdx + 2];
server.ts:                    // Ensure private channel ID starts with -100 for reliable lookups
server.ts:                    if (!channelId.startsWith('-100') && /^\d+$/.test(channelId)) {
server.ts:                        channelId = "-100" + channelId;
server.ts:                    }
server.ts:                    return {
server.ts:                        channelId: channelId,
server.ts:                        msgId: msgId,
server.ts:                        isRestricted: true
server.ts:                    };
server.ts:                }
server.ts:
server.ts:                return {
server.ts:                    channelId: nextPart, // This is either a username @username or a public chat ID
server.ts:                    msgId: msgId,
server.ts:                    isRestricted: false
server.ts:                };
server.ts:            };
server.ts:
server.ts:            const linkData = getLinkData(link);
server.ts:            
server.ts:            const { client: sourceClient, peer: resolvedSourcePeer } = await getBestClientForLinkData(linkData, userId, statusMsgId, chatId);
server.ts:            if (!sourceClient) {
server.ts:                await safeEditMessage("❌ **No active Userbot session has access to this source!**\n\nPlease /login with an account that is a member of this channel, or ensure your currently logged-in account has access.", { chat_id: chatId, message_id: statusMsgId });
server.ts:                return false;
server.ts:            }
server.ts:            
server.ts:            let userDoc: any = null;
server.ts:            if (approvedUsersCollection) {
server.ts:                userDoc = await approvedUsersCollection.findOne({ userId: (await resolveSettingsUserId(userId)) });
server.ts:            }
server.ts:            const customRules = userDoc?.renameRules || [];
server.ts:
server.ts:            if (!sourceClient.connected) await sourceClient.connect().catch(() => {});
server.ts:
server.ts:            // Resolve target upload destination (User preference or default)
server.ts:            let uploadTarget: any = targetIdOverride || DEFAULT_LOG_GROUP;
server.ts:            let threadId: number | undefined = threadIdOverride;
server.ts:            console.log(`[Debug ProcessTask] targetIdOverride: ${targetIdOverride}, threadIdOverride: ${threadIdOverride}, uploadTarget: ${uploadTarget}, threadId: ${threadId}`);
server.ts:
server.ts:            let mirrorPath: any = undefined;
server.ts:            if (targetIdOverride === undefined) {
server.ts:                const sourceId = linkData.channelId;
server.ts:                mirrorPath = (isMirror || !forceGeneralPath) ? userDoc?.mirrorPaths?.find((p: any) => 
server.ts:                     p.sourceId === sourceId || p.sourceId === `-100${sourceId}` || sourceId === p.sourceId.replace('-100', '')
server.ts:                ) : undefined;
server.ts:
server.ts:                if (mirrorPath) {
server.ts:                    uploadTarget = mirrorPath.destId;
server.ts:                    if (threadId === undefined) threadId = mirrorPath.destThreadId ? Number(mirrorPath.destThreadId) : undefined;
server.ts:                } else if (!isMirror && userDoc?.uploadPath) {
server.ts:                    uploadTarget = userDoc.uploadPath;
server.ts:                    if (threadId === undefined && (userDoc.uploadTopicId || userDoc.uploadThreadId)) {
server.ts:                        threadId = Number(userDoc.uploadTopicId || userDoc.uploadThreadId);
server.ts:                    }
server.ts:                }
server.ts:            }
server.ts:
server.ts:            // CRITICAL USER MANDATE: If no Upload/Set Path is configured AND no target was provided, by default send strictly to -1003995334936 only and nowhere else.
server.ts:            if (!userDoc?.uploadPath && targetIdOverride === undefined) {
server.ts:                uploadTarget = DEFAULT_LOG_GROUP;
server.ts:                threadId = undefined;
server.ts:            }
server.ts:
server.ts:        // Smart Route Destination: Find a client that can reach the destination
server.ts:            let destClient: any = null;
server.ts:            let destPeer: any = null;
server.ts:
server.ts:            if (userDoc?.uploadAgent === 'bot') {
server.ts:                let bClient = await getConnectedBotClient();
server.ts:                if (!bClient) {
server.ts:                    console.warn("Bot GramJS Client not initially available, retrying once...");
server.ts:                    await new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, 3000));
server.ts:                    bClient = await getConnectedBotClient();
server.ts:                }
server.ts:                
server.ts:                if (!bClient) {
server.ts:                    if (botFloodWaitEnd > Date.now()) {
server.ts:                        throw new Error("Telegram Bot currently under heavy abuse (FloodWait). Please wait a few minutes.");
server.ts:                    }
server.ts:                    throw new Error("Bot GramJS Client is not configured or connected. Please make sure BOT_TOKEN, API_ID, and API_HASH are valid.");
server.ts:                }
server.ts:                destClient = bClient;
server.ts:                try {
server.ts:                    const directResolve = await destClient.getEntity(uploadTarget);
server.ts:                    destPeer = await destClient.getInputEntity(directResolve);
server.ts:                } catch (e: any) {
server.ts:                    throw new Error("Target destination could not be resolved by the Telegram Bot. Ensure the Bot has been joined/invited to the destination chat/channel as an Administrator.");
server.ts:                }

server.ts:                const resolvedTarget = await getBestClientForTarget(uploadTarget, userId, statusMsgId, chatId);
server.ts:                destClient = resolvedTarget.client;
server.ts:                destPeer = resolvedTarget.peer;

server.ts:            if (isMirror && mirrorPath) {

server.ts:                } catch (e: any) {

server.ts:                    } else {
server.ts:                        throw new Error("Target destination could not be resolved by your Userbot. Ensure the Userbot has joined the destination chat/channel.");
server.ts:                    }
server.ts:                }
server.ts:            }
server.ts:            if (!destClient) {
server.ts:                if (userDoc?.uploadAgent === 'bot') {
server.ts:                    throw new Error("Telegram Bot destination client unreachable.");
server.ts:                } else {
server.ts:                    throw new Error("Destination unreachable. Ensure your Userbot is a member.");
server.ts:                }
server.ts:            }
server.ts:
server.ts:            destTargetStr = uploadTarget.toString();
server.ts:            cleanLink = link.trim();

server.ts:                const existing = await mirroredMessagesCollection.findOne({ link: cleanLink, destId: destTargetStr });
server.ts:                if (existing) {
server.ts:                    inMemoryMirrorLogs.unshift({
server.ts:                        link: cleanLink,
server.ts:                        destId: destTargetStr,
server.ts:                        mirroredAt: new Date().toISOString(),
server.ts:                        status: 'Skipped',
server.ts:                        info: 'Already mirrored to destination'
server.ts:                    });
server.ts:                    if (inMemoryMirrorLogs.length > 500) inMemoryMirrorLogs.pop();
server.ts:                    await safeEditMessage(`⚡ **Skipped:** Already mirrored to destination.\n\n🔗 **Link:** ${link}`, { chat_id: chatId, message_id: statusMsgId });
server.ts:                    return true;
server.ts:                }
server.ts:            }
server.ts:
server.ts:            const recordSuccessfulMirror = async () => {
server.ts:                inMemoryMirrorLogs.unshift({
server.ts:                    link: cleanLink,
server.ts:                    destId: destTargetStr,
server.ts:                    mirroredAt: new Date().toISOString(),
server.ts:                    status: 'Success'
server.ts:                });
server.ts:                if (inMemoryMirrorLogs.length > 500) inMemoryMirrorLogs.pop();
server.ts:                if (mirroredMessagesCollection) {
server.ts:                    await mirroredMessagesCollection.updateOne(

server.ts:                        { $set: { link: cleanLink, destId: destTargetStr, mirroredAt: new Date() } },
server.ts:                        { upsert: true }
server.ts:                    ).catch(err => console.error("[recordSuccessfulMirror] Error:", err));
server.ts:                }
server.ts:            };
server.ts:
server.ts:            await safeEditMessage("🔍 **Locating content...**", { chat_id: chatId, message_id: statusMsgId });
server.ts:            const sourcePeer = resolvedSourcePeer || await safelyResolveEntity(sourceClient, linkData.channelId);
server.ts:
server.ts:            await safeEditMessage("📥 **Retrieving content...**", { chat_id: chatId, message_id: statusMsgId });
server.ts:            
server.ts:            let msg: any;
server.ts:            let retryCount = 0;
server.ts:            let timeoutRetryCount = 0;
server.ts:            const maxRetries = 2;
server.ts:            const maxTimeoutRetries = 7;
server.ts:            while (retryCount <= maxRetries && timeoutRetryCount <= maxTimeoutRetries) {
server.ts:                try {
server.ts:                    console.log(`[Debug] Attempting to fetch message ${linkData.msgId} from ${linkData.channelId} using sourceClient (attempt ${retryCount+1}).`);
server.ts:                    const messages = await sourceClient.getMessages(sourcePeer, { ids: [linkData.msgId] });
server.ts:                    msg = messages?.[0];
server.ts:                    if (msg && !(msg instanceof Api.MessageEmpty)) break;
server.ts:                    
server.ts:                    console.log(`[Debug] sourceClient returned empty, trying destClient.`);
server.ts:                    const destSourcePeer = (destClient === sourceClient) ? sourcePeer : await safelyResolveEntity(destClient, linkData.channelId).catch(() => null);
server.ts:                    if (destSourcePeer) {
server.ts:                        const destMessages = await destClient.getMessages(destSourcePeer, { ids: [linkData.msgId] });
server.ts:                        msg = destMessages?.[0];
server.ts:                        if (msg && !(msg instanceof Api.MessageEmpty)) break;
server.ts:                    }
server.ts:

server.ts:                        throw new Error("DOWNLOAD_PAUSED");

server.ts:                    const speed = elapsed > 0 ? (currentBytes / elapsed) : 0;
server.ts:                    const percent = totalBytes > 0 ? ((currentBytes / totalBytes) * 100) : 0;
server.ts:                    const eta = speed > 0 && totalBytes > 0 ? Math.max(0, (totalBytes - currentBytes) / speed) : -1;

server.ts:                            speed: speed,

server.ts:                            elapsed: Math.floor(elapsed),
server.ts:                            eta: Math.round(eta)
server.ts:                        };

server.ts:            if (totalSize > 1000 * 1024 * 1024) { // > 1GB
server.ts:                uploadWorkers = 16;
server.ts:            } else if (totalSize > 500 * 1024 * 1024) { // > 500 MB
server.ts:                uploadWorkers = 10;
server.ts:            } else if (totalSize > 100 * 1024 * 1024) {
server.ts:                uploadWorkers = 8;
server.ts:            } else if (totalSize > 20 * 1024 * 1024) {
server.ts:                uploadWorkers = 4;
server.ts:            }
server.ts:
server.ts:            let uploadDone = false;
server.ts:            let uploadRetries = 0;
server.ts:            let sentMsg: any = null;
server.ts:
server.ts:            while (!uploadDone) {
server.ts:                try {
server.ts:                    if (!destClient.connected) await destClient.connect().catch(() => {});
server.ts:                    const uploadedFile = await destClient.uploadFile({
server.ts:                        file: new CustomFile(filename, totalSize, tempFilePath),
server.ts:                        workers: uploadWorkers,
server.ts:                        onProgress: async (current: any) => {
server.ts:                            let currentBytes = Number(current);
server.ts:                            if (currentBytes <= 1.0 && currentBytes >= 0) {
server.ts:                                currentBytes = Math.floor(currentBytes * totalSize);
server.ts:                            }
server.ts:                            const now = Date.now();
server.ts:                            const elapsed = (now - uploadStartTime) / 1000;
server.ts:                            const speed = elapsed > 0 ? (currentBytes / elapsed) : 0;
server.ts:                            const percent = totalSize > 0 ? ((currentBytes / totalSize) * 100) : 0;
server.ts:                            const eta = speed > 0 && totalSize > 0 ? Math.max(0, (totalSize - currentBytes) / speed) : -1;
server.ts:        
server.ts:                            const jobKey = `${userId}-${link}`;
server.ts:                            const job = activeTaskJobs.get(jobKey);
server.ts:                            if (job) {
server.ts:                                job.phase = 'uploading';
server.ts:                                job.progress = {
server.ts:                                    total: totalSize,
server.ts:                                    current: currentBytes,
server.ts:                                    speed: speed,
server.ts:                                    percent: percent,
server.ts:                                    elapsed: Math.floor(elapsed),
server.ts:                                    eta: Math.round(eta)
server.ts:                                };
server.ts:                            }
server.ts:        
server.ts:                            if (now - lastUploadUpdate > 1000 || currentBytes === totalSize) {
server.ts:                                lastUploadUpdate = now;
server.ts:                                const text = createProgressBar(Number(totalSize), currentBytes, "Uploading", uploadStartTime, pathDisplay);
server.ts:                                const progressRes = await safeEditMessage(text, { chat_id: chatId, message_id: statusMsgId, parse_mode: 'Markdown' });
server.ts:                                if (progressRes && progressRes.id) statusMsgId = progressRes.id;
server.ts:                            }
server.ts:                        }
server.ts:                    });
server.ts:        
server.ts:                    const attributes: any[] = [new Api.DocumentAttributeFilename({ fileName: filename })];
server.ts:                    
server.ts:                    if (msg.media instanceof Api.MessageMediaDocument && msg.media.document instanceof Api.Document) {
server.ts:                        const videoAttr = msg.media.document.attributes.find(a => a instanceof Api.DocumentAttributeVideo);
server.ts:                        if (videoAttr) {
server.ts:                            const vAttr = videoAttr as any;
server.ts:                            attributes.push(new Api.DocumentAttributeVideo({
server.ts:                                duration: Number(vAttr.duration || 0),
server.ts:                                w: Number(vAttr.w || 0),
server.ts:                                h: Number(vAttr.h || 0),
server.ts:                                supportsStreaming: true,
server.ts:                                nosound: vAttr.nosound
server.ts:                            }));
server.ts:                        } else if (filename.endsWith('.mp4') || filename.endsWith('.mkv') || filename.endsWith('.mov') || filename.endsWith('.avi') || filename.endsWith('.webm')) {
server.ts:                            attributes.push(new Api.DocumentAttributeVideo({
server.ts:                                duration: 0,
server.ts:                                w: 0,
server.ts:                                h: 0,
server.ts:                                supportsStreaming: true
server.ts:                            }));
server.ts:                        }
server.ts:                    } else if (filename.endsWith('.mp4') || filename.endsWith('.mkv') || filename.endsWith('.mov') || filename.endsWith('.avi') || filename.endsWith('.webm')) {
server.ts:                        attributes.push(new Api.DocumentAttributeVideo({
server.ts:                            duration: 0,
server.ts:                            w: 0,
server.ts:                            h: 0,
server.ts:                            supportsStreaming: true
server.ts:                        }));
server.ts:                    }
server.ts:                    
server.ts:                    let caption = applyRenameRules(msg.message || "", customRules);
server.ts:                    if (userDoc?.customCaptionTemplate) {
server.ts:                        const template = userDoc.customCaptionTemplate;
server.ts:                        caption = template.includes("{original}") ? template.replace("{original}", caption) : `${caption}\n\n${template}`;
server.ts:                    }
server.ts:        
server.ts:                    sentMsg = await destClient.sendFile(finalDestPeer, {
server.ts:                        file: uploadedFile,
server.ts:                        caption: caption,
server.ts:                        workers: uploadWorkers,
server.ts:                        attributes: attributes,
server.ts:                        thumb: hasThumb ? thumbPath : undefined,
server.ts:                        replyTo: threadId,
server.ts:                    } as any);
server.ts:
server.ts:                    // --- Save Copy to Saved Files Cache topic in DEFAULT_LOG_GROUP start ---
server.ts:                    let savedLogMsg: any = null;
server.ts:                    try {
server.ts:                        const logGroupPeer = await safelyResolveEntity(destClient, DEFAULT_LOG_GROUP);
server.ts:                        if (logGroupPeer) {
server.ts:                            const cachedTopicId = await getOrCreateCachedFilesTopicId(destClient);
server.ts:                            console.log(`[CacheLog] Saving copy of file to DEFAULT_LOG_GROUP under topic/thread ${cachedTopicId}`);
server.ts:                            
server.ts:                            savedLogMsg = await destClient.sendFile(logGroupPeer, {
server.ts:                                file: uploadedFile,
server.ts:                                caption: caption,
server.ts:                                workers: uploadWorkers,
server.ts:                                attributes: attributes,
server.ts:                                thumb: hasThumb ? thumbPath : undefined,
server.ts:                                replyTo: cachedTopicId
server.ts:                            } as any);
server.ts:                        }
server.ts:                    } catch (logErr) {
server.ts:                        console.error("[CacheLog] Failed to save copy of file to DEFAULT_LOG_GROUP:", logErr);
server.ts:                    }
server.ts:
server.ts:                    if (savedLogMsg && fileKey && fileCacheCollection) {
server.ts:                        try {
server.ts:                            await fileCacheCollection.updateOne(
server.ts:                                { fileKey },
server.ts:                                {
server.ts:                                    $set: {
server.ts:                                        fileKey,
server.ts:                                        fileName: filename,
server.ts:                                        totalSize: totalSize,
server.ts:                                        savedMsgId: savedLogMsg.id,
server.ts:                                        savedChatId: secureMetadataField(DEFAULT_LOG_GROUP),
server.ts:                                        sourceLink: link,
server.ts:                                        cachedAt: new Date(),
server.ts:                                        expiresAt: new Date(Date.now() + CACHE_TTL_MS)
server.ts:                                    }
server.ts:                                },
server.ts:                                { upsert: true }
server.ts:                            );
server.ts:                            console.log(`[CacheLog] File successfully registered in file_cache collection under fileKey: ${fileKey}`);
server.ts:                        } catch (dbErr) {
server.ts:                            console.error("[CacheLog] Failed to insert file cache record to MongoDB:", dbErr);
server.ts:                        }
server.ts:                    }
server.ts:                    // --- Save Copy to Saved Files Cache topic in DEFAULT_LOG_GROUP end ---
server.ts:
server.ts:                    uploadDone = true;
server.ts:                } catch (err: any) {
server.ts:                    const errStr = (err.message || "").toUpperCase();
server.ts:                    const isTimeout = errStr.includes("TIMEOUT") || errStr.includes("ETIMEDOUT") || errStr.includes("SOCKET HANG UP");
server.ts:                    
server.ts:                    if (isTimeout && uploadRetries < 5) {
server.ts:                        uploadRetries++;
server.ts:                        console.log(`[Upload] Upload failed due to timeout. Retrying... (Attempt ${uploadRetries}/5). Error: ${errStr}`);
server.ts:                        continue;
server.ts:                    }
server.ts:                    
server.ts:                    throw err;
server.ts:                }
server.ts:            }
server.ts:
server.ts:            if (fs.existsSync(tempFilePath)) fs.unlinkSync(tempFilePath);
server.ts:            if (hasThumb && fs.existsSync(thumbPath)) fs.unlinkSync(thumbPath);
server.ts:            
server.ts:            let uploadedLink = "";
server.ts:            try {
server.ts:                const entity = await destClient.getEntity(finalDestPeer);
server.ts:                const channelId = entity.id.toString().replace("-100", "");
server.ts:                uploadedLink = `https://t.me/c/${channelId}/${sentMsg.id}`;
server.ts:            } catch(e) {}
server.ts:            
server.ts:            let message = `┏━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━┓\n┃ 🎯 𝗦𝘂𝗰𝗰𝗲𝘀𝘀𝗳𝘂𝗹𝗹𝘆 𝗠𝗶𝗿𝗿𝗼𝗿𝗲𝗱! ┃\n┗━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━┛`;
server.ts:            
server.ts:            const kb: any[] = [];
server.ts:            const row: any[] = [];
server.ts:            if (link && link.startsWith("http")) {
server.ts:                row.push({ text: "🔗 𝗦𝗼𝘂𝗿𝗰𝗲", url: link });
server.ts:            }
server.ts:            if (uploadedLink) {
server.ts:                row.push({ text: "📥 𝗗𝗼𝘄𝗻𝗹𝗼𝗮𝗱", url: uploadedLink });
server.ts:            }
server.ts:            if (row.length > 0) kb.push(row);
server.ts:            
server.ts:            await safeEditMessage(message, { chat_id: chatId, message_id: statusMsgId, reply_markup: kb.length > 0 ? { inline_keyboard: kb } : undefined });
server.ts:            await recordSuccessfulMirror();
server.ts:            return true;
server.ts:        } catch (err: any) {
server.ts:            const isSkip = err.message?.includes("DOWNLOAD_SKIPPED");
server.ts:            if (!isSkip) {
server.ts:                console.error("Link Process Error:", err);
server.ts:            } else {
server.ts:                console.log("[Process] Task was skipped gracefully by user choice.");
server.ts:            }
server.ts:            let errMsg = err.message || "";
server.ts:            if (err.errorMessage === 'CHANNEL_INVALID' || errMsg.includes("CHANNEL_INVALID")) errMsg = "Channel not found. Ensure Userbot is a member of BOTH chats.";
server.ts:            else if (errMsg.includes("Content not found") || errMsg.includes("PEER_ID_INVALID") || errMsg.includes("USER_NOT_PARTICIPANT")) {
server.ts:                errMsg = "Content inaccessible: Userbot session does not have access. Join source chats, verify link is not restricted.";
server.ts:            }
server.ts:            if (!errMsg && err.errorMessage) errMsg = err.errorMessage;
server.ts:            
server.ts:            // Clean up files on error
server.ts:            if (tempFilePath && fs.existsSync(tempFilePath)) {
server.ts:                try { fs.unlinkSync(tempFilePath); } catch (e) {}
server.ts:            }
server.ts:            if (thumbPath && fs.existsSync(thumbPath)) {
server.ts:                try { fs.unlinkSync(thumbPath); } catch (e) {}
server.ts:            }
server.ts:
server.ts:            throw new Error(errMsg || "Unknown Error");
server.ts:        }
server.ts:    };
server.ts:
server.ts:    bot.on('message', async (msg) => {
server.ts:      const chatId = msg.chat.id;
server.ts:      const fromId = msg.from?.id;
server.ts:      const text = msg.text;
server.ts:
server.ts:      console.log(`[Message Handler] Received message from ${fromId}: ${text || 'No text'}`);
server.ts:
server.ts:      if (text === '⚙️ Settings') { handleSettings(chatId, fromId); return; }
server.ts:      if (text === '📈 Dashboard') {
server.ts:          if (!fromId || !isAdmin(fromId)) return;
server.ts:          try {
server.ts:              const textStr = await generateDashboardText();
server.ts:              bot?.sendMessage(chatId, textStr, {
server.ts:                  parse_mode: 'Markdown',
server.ts:                  disable_web_page_preview: true,
server.ts:                  reply_markup: {
server.ts:                      inline_keyboard: [
server.ts:                          [
server.ts:                              { text: '🔄 Refresh Stats', callback_data: 'refresh_dashboard' },
server.ts:                              isQueuePaused ? { text: '▶️ Resume Queue', callback_data: 'resume_queue_cb' } : { text: '⏸️ Pause Queue', callback_data: 'pause_queue_cb' }
server.ts:                          ],
server.ts:                          [
server.ts:                              { text: '📋 View Queue', callback_data: 'view_queue_cb' },
server.ts:                              { text: '🗑️ Clear Queue', callback_data: 'clear_queue_cb' }
server.ts:                          ]
server.ts:                      ]
server.ts:                  }
server.ts:              });
server.ts:          } catch (err: any) {
server.ts:              safeSendMessage(chatId, `❌ **Dashboard Error:** ${err.message}`);
server.ts:          }
server.ts:          return;
server.ts:      }
server.ts:      if (text === '⬅️ Back') { sendMainMenu(chatId); return; }
server.ts:      if (text === '📦 Batch') { handleBatch(chatId, fromId); return; }
server.ts:      if (text === '📍 Set Path') { 
server.ts:          if (!fromId || !isAdmin(fromId)) {
server.ts:             bot.sendMessage(chatId, "❌ Restricted to Admin");
server.ts:             return;
server.ts:          }
server.ts:          userActionStates[fromId] = { type: 'set_path' };
server.ts:          bot.sendMessage(chatId, "📍 **Set Custom Destination**\n\nPlease forward any message from target **Group/Channel** here, or send its **Public Link**.\n\n_Bot will upload files to this location instead of your private DM._", { 
server.ts:              parse_mode: 'Markdown',
server.ts:              reply_markup: { force_reply: true }
server.ts:          });
server.ts:          return; 
server.ts:      }
server.ts:      if (text === '⚙️ Mirror Engine') { handleMirror(chatId, fromId, msg.message_id); return; }
server.ts:      if (text === '❌ Cancel') { handleCancel(chatId, fromId); return; }
server.ts:      if (text === '🚀 Start') { 
server.ts:          handleStartMessage(msg);
server.ts:          return; 
server.ts:      }
server.ts:
server.ts:      // Intercept states early to allow non-text actions (like setting custom thumbnail image)
server.ts:      if (fromId && userActionStates[fromId]) {
server.ts:          const state = userActionStates[fromId];
server.ts:
server.ts:          console.log(`[Message Handler] State type for ${fromId}: ${state.type}`);
server.ts:          if (state.type === 'forward_start_link') {
server.ts:              userActionStates[fromId].startLink = msg.text;
server.ts:              userActionStates[fromId].type = 'forward_end_link';
server.ts:              bot.sendMessage(chatId, "✅ Starting link saved.\n\nNow send the **Ending Link**.");
server.ts:              return;
server.ts:          }
server.ts:          if (state.type === 'forward_end_link') {
server.ts:              const startLink = userActionStates[fromId].startLink;
server.ts:              const endLink = msg.text!;
server.ts:              delete userActionStates[fromId];
server.ts:              
server.ts:              bot.sendMessage(chatId, "⏳ **Processing batch forward...**\n\nThis might take a while.");
server.ts:              handleBatchForward(chatId, fromId, startLink, endLink).catch(err => {
server.ts:                  safeSendMessage(chatId, `❌ **Forwarding Error:** ${err.message}`);
server.ts:              });
server.ts:              return;
server.ts:          }
server.ts:
server.ts:          if (state.type === 'add_blocked_topic') {
server.ts:              const textInput = msg.text || '';
server.ts:              delete userActionStates[fromId];
server.ts:              const cleanedTopic = textInput.trim();
server.ts:              if (cleanedTopic) {
server.ts:                  let finalVal = cleanedTopic;
server.ts:                  const match = cleanedTopic.match(/t\.me\/(?:c\/)?([a-zA-Z0-9_-]+)\/(\d+)/i);
server.ts:                  if (match) {
server.ts:                      let groupId = match[1];
server.ts:                      let topicId = match[2];
server.ts:                      
server.ts:                      // normalize numerical group ids
server.ts:                      if (/^\d+$/.test(groupId)) {
server.ts:                          groupId = '-100' + groupId; // Standardize to -100 format if it was numerical
server.ts:                      } else {
server.ts:                          groupId = groupId.toLowerCase();
server.ts:                      }
server.ts:                      
server.ts:                      finalVal = `${groupId}_${topicId}`;
server.ts:                  }
server.ts:
server.ts:                  const settingsUid = await resolveSettingsUserId(fromId);
server.ts:                  if (approvedUsersCollection) {
server.ts:                      await approvedUsersCollection.updateOne(
server.ts:                          { userId: settingsUid },
server.ts:                          { $addToSet: { blockedTopics: finalVal } },
server.ts:                          { upsert: true }
server.ts:                      );
server.ts:                      safeSendMessage(chatId, `✅ **Topic Blocked successfully!**\n└ Link/Name: \`${cleanedTopic}\`${finalVal !== cleanedTopic ? `\n└ Internal Format: \`${finalVal}\`` : ''}`, { parse_mode: 'Markdown' });
server.ts:                  }
server.ts:              } else {
server.ts:                  safeSendMessage(chatId, `❌ **Invalid input.** Blocked topic name cannot be empty.`);
server.ts:              }
server.ts:              await showBlockedTopicsPanel(chatId, fromId);
server.ts:              return;
server.ts:          }
server.ts:
server.ts:          if (state.type === 'set_source_id') {
server.ts:              const textInput = msg.text || '';
server.ts:              delete userActionStates[fromId];
server.ts:              await saveRecentSource(fromId, textInput, textInput);
server.ts:              safeSendMessage(chatId, `✅ **Source ID Saved:** \`${textInput}\``);
server.ts:              return;
server.ts:          }
server.ts:          if (state.type === 'set_dest_id') {
server.ts:              const textInput = msg.text || '';
server.ts:              delete userActionStates[fromId];
server.ts:              await saveRecentDestination(fromId, textInput, "Manual Destination");
server.ts:              safeSendMessage(chatId, `✅ **Destination ID Saved:** \`${textInput}\``);
server.ts:              return;
server.ts:          }
server.ts:
server.ts:          if (state.type === 'enter_manual_specific_topic') {
server.ts:              const textInput = msg.text || '';
server.ts:              delete userActionStates[fromId];
server.ts:              const cleaned = textInput.trim();
server.ts:              if (!cleaned) {
server.ts:                  safeSendMessage(chatId, "❌ **Operation canceled or empty input.**");
server.ts:                  return;
server.ts:              }
server.ts:              const parts = cleaned.split(/\s+/);
server.ts:              const rawGroupId = parts[0];
server.ts:              if (!rawGroupId.startsWith('-') && !/^\d+$/.test(rawGroupId)) {
server.ts:                  safeSendMessage(chatId, "❌ **Invalid Group ID.** It should typically start with `-` (e.g. `-100xxxxxxxxxx`).");
server.ts:                  return;
server.ts:              }
server.ts:
server.ts:              let topicId: number | null = null;
server.ts:              let groupName = '';
server.ts:              let namePartStartIdx = 1;
server.ts:
server.ts:              if (parts.length > 1) {
server.ts:                  const secondPart = parts[1];
server.ts:                  if (/^\d+$/.test(secondPart)) {
server.ts:                      topicId = parseInt(secondPart);
server.ts:                      namePartStartIdx = 2;
server.ts:                  }
server.ts:              }
server.ts:
server.ts:              groupName = parts.slice(namePartStartIdx).join(' ').trim();
server.ts:              if (!groupName) {
server.ts:                  groupName = `Manual Group ${rawGroupId}`;
server.ts:              }
server.ts:
server.ts:              if (approvedUsersCollection) {
server.ts:                  const settingsUid = await resolveSettingsUserId(fromId);
server.ts:                  const userDoc = await approvedUsersCollection.findOne({ userId: settingsUid });
server.ts:                  const savedDestinations = userDoc?.savedDestinations || [];
server.ts:
server.ts:                  const filtered = savedDestinations.filter((d: any) => !(d.destId === rawGroupId && d.destThreadId === topicId));
server.ts:                  filtered.push({
server.ts:                      destId: rawGroupId,
server.ts:                      destThreadId: topicId,
server.ts:                      groupName,
server.ts:                      topicName: topicId ? `Topic ${topicId}` : 'General',
server.ts:                      createdAt: new Date()
server.ts:                  });
server.ts:
server.ts:                  const finalDest = filtered.slice(-20);
server.ts:                  await approvedUsersCollection.updateOne(
server.ts:                      { userId: settingsUid },
server.ts:                      { $set: { savedDestinations: finalDest } }
server.ts:                  );
server.ts:
server.ts:                  const destDisplay = topicId ? `${groupName} (Topic: ${topicId})` : groupName;
server.ts:                  await safeSendMessage(chatId, `✅ **Specific Destination Stored Successfully!**\n\n📁 Destination: \`${destDisplay}\`\n📍 ID: \`${rawGroupId}\` ${topicId ? `(Topic: \`${topicId}\`)` : ''}\n\nThis target group has been saved to your **Saved Destinations** list!`, { parse_mode: 'Markdown' });
server.ts:
server.ts:                  // Try to send a confirmation directly to that group if the bot is present!
server.ts:                  try {
server.ts:                      const notifyOptions: any = { parse_mode: 'Markdown' };
server.ts:                      if (topicId) notifyOptions.message_thread_id = topicId;
server.ts:                      await safeSendMessage(Number(rawGroupId), `✅ **Specific Destination Registered!**\n\nThis group has been registered as an upload destination inside the bot for admin/user configuration.`, notifyOptions);
server.ts:                  } catch (e) {
server.ts:                      console.log("[setspecifictopic] Could not send direct notification to manually added group in state handler (expected if bot has not joined yet):", e);
server.ts:                  }
server.ts:              }
server.ts:              return;
server.ts:          }
server.ts:
server.ts:          if (state.type === 'set_api_id') {
server.ts:              const textInput = msg.text || '';
server.ts:              delete userActionStates[fromId];
server.ts:              const parsedId = Number(textInput.trim());
server.ts:              if (!isNaN(parsedId) && parsedId > 0) {
server.ts:                  apiIdValue = parsedId;
server.ts:                  if (settingsCollection) {
server.ts:                      await settingsCollection.updateOne(
server.ts:                          { type: 'global_config' },
server.ts:                          { $set: { apiId: parsedId.toString() } },
server.ts:                          { upsert: true }
server.ts:                      );
server.ts:                  }
server.ts:                  safeSendMessage(chatId, `✅ **Telegram API ID Saved successfully!** (Hidden for Security)`, { parse_mode: 'Markdown' });
server.ts:              } else {
server.ts:                  safeSendMessage(chatId, `❌ **Invalid Input.** API ID must be a positive number. Setting cancelled.`);
server.ts:              }
server.ts:              handleSettings(chatId, fromId);
server.ts:              return;
server.ts:          }
server.ts:
server.ts:          if (state.type === 'set_api_hash') {
server.ts:              const textInput = msg.text || '';
server.ts:              delete userActionStates[fromId];
server.ts:              const cleanedHash = textInput.trim();
server.ts:              if (cleanedHash.length === 32) {
server.ts:                  apiHashValue = cleanedHash;
server.ts:                  if (settingsCollection) {
server.ts:                      await settingsCollection.updateOne(
server.ts:                          { type: 'global_config' },
server.ts:                          { $set: { apiHash: cleanedHash } },
server.ts:                          { upsert: true }
server.ts:                      );
server.ts:                  }
server.ts:                  safeSendMessage(chatId, `✅ **Telegram API Hash Saved successfully!** (Hidden for Security)`, { parse_mode: 'Markdown' });
server.ts:              } else {
server.ts:                  safeSendMessage(chatId, `❌ **Invalid Input.** API Hash must be exactly 32 hexadecimal characters. Setting cancelled.`);
server.ts:              }
server.ts:              handleSettings(chatId, fromId);
server.ts:              return;
server.ts:          }
server.ts:
server.ts:          if (state.type === 'set_thumb') {
server.ts:              if (msg.photo && msg.photo.length > 0) {
server.ts:                  delete userActionStates[fromId];
server.ts:                  const fileId = msg.photo[msg.photo.length - 1].file_id;
server.ts:                  const settingsUid = await resolveSettingsUserId(fromId);
server.ts:                  if (approvedUsersCollection) {
server.ts:                      await approvedUsersCollection.updateOne(
server.ts:                          { userId: settingsUid },
server.ts:                          { $set: { customThumbnailFileId: fileId } }
server.ts:                      );
server.ts:                  }
server.ts:                  // Download locally as well just in case
server.ts:                  const userCustomThumbPath = path.join(os.tmpdir(), `custom_thumb_${settingsUid}.jpg`);
server.ts:                  try {

server.ts:                  success = true;

server.ts:                          }

server.ts:      // Handle Interactive Login Steps

server.ts:            const resolve = state.resolvePhoneCode;
server.ts:            delete state.resolvePhoneCode;
server.ts:            // Simulate realistic human typing delay (2s to 4.5s)
server.ts:            await sleep(Math.random() * 2500 + 2000);
server.ts:            return resolve(val.replace(/[^a-zA-Z0-9]/g, ''));
server.ts:        }
server.ts:
server.ts:        if (state.resolvePassword) {
server.ts:            const resolve = state.resolvePassword;
server.ts:            delete state.resolvePassword;
server.ts:            // Simulate human typing delay (1s to 3s)
server.ts:            await sleep(Math.random() * 2000 + 1000);
server.ts:            return resolve(val);
server.ts:        }
server.ts:
server.ts:        // Fresh login: this must be the phone number
server.ts:        if (!state.client) {
server.ts:            try {
server.ts:                // Ensure phone number starts with '+' and is stripped of whitespace or dashes
server.ts:                let phone = val.replace(/\s+/g, '').replace(/[-()]/g, '');

server.ts:                }
server.ts:

server.ts:                }
server.ts:
server.ts:                const client = new TelegramClient(new StringSession(""), apiIdValue, apiHashValue, {
server.ts:                    connectionRetries: 15,
server.ts:                    timeout: 300000,

server.ts:                    ...getRandomDeviceProps(),

server.ts:                    proxy: undefined,
server.ts:                });

server.ts:                    }
server.ts:                }
server.ts:

server.ts:                    throw new Error("Could not establish connection to Telegram servers. Please check your proxy or try again later.");

server.ts:                    phoneNumber: async () => state.phone!,

server.ts:                        await sleep(1000);

server.ts:                            });

server.ts:                            });

server.ts:                        });
server.ts:                    },

server.ts:                        await sleep(1000);
server.ts:                        if (state.hasError2Fa) {

server.ts:                        }

server.ts:      // Direct Source Group ID detection & saving when no other state is active

server.ts:        if (msg.message_thread_id) options.message_thread_id = msg.message_thread_id;
server.ts:         const addedCount = links.length;
server.ts:         const totalQueued = taskQueue.length;
server.ts:         const message = `╭─ ⌛ 𝗤𝘂𝗲𝘂𝗲𝗱 ───╮\n│ ✅ 𝗔𝗱𝗱𝗲𝗱 : ${addedCount}         \n│ 📦 𝗧𝗼𝘁𝗮𝗹 : ${totalQueued}\n╰────────────╯`;
server.ts:         safeSendMessage(msg.chat.id, message, options);
server.ts:        return;
server.ts:      }
server.ts:    });
server.ts:
server.ts:    bot.on('polling_error', (error) => {
server.ts:      // Silence noisy but common network/polling errors in this environment
server.ts:      const silentErrors = [
server.ts:        'TIMEOUT',
server.ts:        '409 Conflict',
server.ts:        'socket hang up',
server.ts:        'ECONNRESET',
server.ts:        'ECONNREFUSED',
server.ts:        'ETIMEDOUT',
server.ts:        'EHOSTUNREACH'
server.ts:      ];
server.ts:      
server.ts:      if (silentErrors.some(msg => error.message?.includes(msg))) {
server.ts:        return;
server.ts:      }
server.ts:      console.error('Bot Polling Error:', error.message);
server.ts:    });
server.ts:
server.ts:    // Graceful shutdown
server.ts:    const shutdown = async () => {
server.ts:      console.log('Shutting down bot...');
server.ts:      if (bot) await bot.stopPolling();
server.ts:      if (client) await client.close();
server.ts:      process.exit(0);
server.ts:    };
server.ts:
server.ts:    process.on('SIGINT', shutdown);
server.ts:    process.on('SIGTERM', shutdown);
server.ts:
server.ts:    bot.on('error', (error: any) => {
server.ts:      console.error('Bot Critical Error:', error.message || error);
server.ts:      botStatus = 'Error';
server.ts:    });
server.ts:
server.ts:  } catch (err) {
server.ts:    console.error('Init failed:', err);
server.ts:    botStatus = 'Failed';
server.ts:  }

server.ts:        }));

server.ts:        const seen = new Set();
server.ts:        const merged = [];

server.ts:          if (!seen.has(key)) {
server.ts:            seen.add(key);
server.ts:            merged.push(log);
server.ts:          }
server.ts:        }
server.ts:        return res.json({ logs: merged.slice(0, 100) });
server.ts:      } catch (dbErr) {

server.ts:      }
server.ts:    }

server.ts:app.post('/api/batch/start', async (req, res) => {
server.ts:  const { startLink, endLink, isMirror } = req.body;
server.ts:  if (!startLink || !endLink) return res.status(400).json({ error: 'Missing startLink or endLink' });
server.ts:  
server.ts:  try {
server.ts:    const startId = getMsgId(startLink);
server.ts:    const endId = getMsgId(endLink);
server.ts:    const baseUrl = startLink.substring(0, startLink.lastIndexOf('/') + 1);
server.ts:
server.ts:    if (isNaN(startId) || isNaN(endId)) throw new Error("Invalid range message IDs.");
server.ts:    if (endId < startId) throw new Error("End link ID must be greater than start link ID.");
server.ts:
server.ts:    const count = endId - startId + 1;
server.ts:    // Unlimited batch size as requested by user
server.ts:
server.ts:    const systemAdminId = Number(currentAdminId || ALLOWED_ADMIN_IDS[0] || 0);
server.ts:    const batchId = `batch_${Date.now()}_web`;
server.ts:
server.ts:    batchStatusMap.set(batchId, {
server.ts:      total: count,
server.ts:      processed: 0,
server.ts:      success: 0,
server.ts:      failed: 0,
server.ts:      startTime: Date.now(),
server.ts:      summaryMsgId: 0,
server.ts:      chatId: systemAdminId
server.ts:    });
server.ts:
server.ts:    const batchTasksToQueue: Task[] = [];
server.ts:    for (let i = startId; i <= endId; i++) {
server.ts:        const link = `${baseUrl}${i}`;
server.ts:        batchTasksToQueue.push({ 
server.ts:          chatId: systemAdminId, 
server.ts:          link, 
server.ts:          batchId, 
server.ts:          userId: systemAdminId,
server.ts:          isMirror: !!isMirror 
server.ts:        });
server.ts:    }
server.ts:
server.ts:    if (batchTasksToQueue.length > 0) {
server.ts:        taskQueue.push(...batchTasksToQueue);
server.ts:        if (approvedUsersCollection) {
server.ts:          dbEnqueueTasks(batchTasksToQueue).catch(e => console.error("[Queue DB] Bulk enqueue error:", e));
server.ts:        }
server.ts:    }
server.ts:    
server.ts:    if (typeof runNextTask === 'function') {
server.ts:      runNextTask();
server.ts:    }
server.ts:    res.json({ success: true, count, batchId });
server.ts:  } catch (err: any) {
server.ts:    res.status(500).json({ error: err.message });
server.ts:  }
server.ts:});

server.ts:app.post('/api/settings', async (req, res) => {
server.ts:  if (!settingsCollection) return res.status(503).json({ error: 'Database not ready' });
server.ts:  const { adminId, stringSession, destinationChatId: newDestId, apiId: newApiId, apiHash: newApiHash, downloadLibrary, uploadEngine, renameRules, proxy, cooldownSeconds } = req.body;
server.ts:  try {
server.ts:    const updateData: any = {};
server.ts:    if (adminId) updateData.adminId = adminId;
server.ts:        if (stringSession) {
server.ts:            updateData.stringSession = stringSession;
server.ts:            const activeAdminId = adminId || currentAdminId || ALLOWED_ADMIN_IDS[0];
server.ts:            if (activeAdminId && approvedUsersCollection) {
server.ts:                await approvedUsersCollection.updateOne(
server.ts:                    { userId: activeAdminId.toString() },
server.ts:                    { $set: { stringSession } },
server.ts:                    { upsert: true }
server.ts:                );
server.ts:                userSessions.set(Number(activeAdminId), stringSession);
server.ts:                approvedUsersCache.add(activeAdminId.toString());
server.ts:            }
server.ts:        }
server.ts:    if (newDestId) updateData.destinationChatId = newDestId;
server.ts:        if (newApiId) {
server.ts:            updateData.apiId = newApiId;
server.ts:            apiIdValue = Number(newApiId);
server.ts:        }
server.ts:        if (newApiHash) {
server.ts:            updateData.apiHash = newApiHash;
server.ts:            apiHashValue = newApiHash;
server.ts:        }
server.ts:        if (downloadLibrary) {
server.ts:            updateData.downloadLibrary = downloadLibrary;
server.ts:            currentDownloadLibrary = downloadLibrary;
server.ts:        }
server.ts:        if (uploadEngine) {
server.ts:            updateData.uploadEngine = uploadEngine;
server.ts:            currentUploadEngine = uploadEngine;
server.ts:        }
server.ts:        if (cooldownSeconds !== undefined) {
server.ts:             updateData.cooldownSeconds = Number(cooldownSeconds);
server.ts:             globalCooldownSeconds = Number(cooldownSeconds);
server.ts:        }
server.ts:        if (Array.isArray(renameRules)) {
server.ts:            updateData.renameRules = renameRules;
server.ts:            globalRenameRules = renameRules;
server.ts:        }
server.ts:
server.ts:        await settingsCollection.updateOne({ type: 'global_config' }, { $set: updateData }, { upsert: true });
server.ts:        
server.ts:        if (adminId) currentAdminId = adminId;
server.ts:        if (newDestId) destinationChatId = newDestId;
server.ts:        res.json({ success: true });
server.ts:  } catch (err: any) {
server.ts:    res.status(500).json({ error: err.message });
server.ts:  }
server.ts:});
server.ts:
server.ts:// Global error handlers to prevent unhandled rejections from crashing or being noisy
server.ts:process.on('unhandledRejection', (reason: any, promise) => {
server.ts:    const msg = (reason?.message || String(reason)).toLowerCase();
server.ts:    if (msg.includes('429') || reason?.error_code === 429 || msg.includes('topic_closed') || msg.includes('message thread not found') || msg.includes('timeout') || msg.includes('etimedout') || msg.includes('socket hang up') || msg.includes('econnreset') || msg.includes('econnrefused')) {
server.ts:        console.warn('Silent caught known Telegram Rejection:', msg);
server.ts:    } else {
server.ts:        console.error('Unhandled Rejection at:', promise, 'reason:', reason);
server.ts:    }
server.ts:});
server.ts:
server.ts:process.on('uncaughtException', (err: any) => {
server.ts:    const msg = (err?.message || String(err)).toLowerCase();

grep_results.txt:chrome/linux-149.0.7827.155/chrome-linux64/chrome-wrapper:# Check to see if there is a desktop file of the given name.
grep_results.txt:chrome/linux-149.0.7827.155/chrome-linux64/chrome-wrapper:exists_desktop_file() {
grep_results.txt:chrome/linux-149.0.7827.155/chrome-linux64/chrome-wrapper:    # Build a search list from $XDG_DATA_HOME and $XDG_DATA_DIRS, the latter
grep_results.txt:chrome/linux-149.0.7827.155/chrome-linux64/chrome-wrapper:    # of which can itself be a colon-separated list of directories to search.
grep_results.txt:chrome/linux-149.0.7827.155/chrome-linux64/chrome-wrapper:    search="${XDG_DATA_HOME:-$HOME/.local/share}:${XDG_DATA_DIRS:-/usr/local/share:/usr/share}"
grep_results.txt:chrome/linux-149.0.7827.155/chrome-linux64/chrome-wrapper:    IFS=:
grep_results.txt:chrome/linux-149.0.7827.155/chrome-linux64/chrome-wrapper:    for dir in $search; do
grep_results.txt:chrome/linux-149.0.7827.155/chrome-linux64/chrome-wrapper:        unset IFS
grep_results.txt:chrome/linux-149.0.7827.155/chrome-linux64/chrome-wrapper:        [ "$dir" -a -d "$dir/applications" ] || continue
grep_results.txt:chrome/linux-149.0.7827.155/chrome-linux64/chrome-wrapper:        [ -r "$dir/applications/$DESKTOP.desktop" ] && return
grep_results.txt:chrome/linux-149.0.7827.155/chrome-linux64/chrome-wrapper:    done
grep_results.txt:chrome/linux-149.0.7827.155/chrome-linux64/chrome-wrapper:    # Didn't find it in the search path.
grep_results.txt:chrome/linux-149.0.7827.155/chrome-linux64/chrome-wrapper:    return 1
grep_results.txt:chrome/linux-149.0.7827.155/chrome-linux64/chrome-wrapper:}
grep_results.txt:chrome/linux-149.0.7827.155/chrome-linux64/chrome-wrapper:
grep_results.txt:chrome/linux-149.0.7827.155/chrome-linux64/chrome-wrapper:# Checks a file to see if it's a 32 or 64-bit.
grep_results.txt:chrome/linux-149.0.7827.155/chrome-linux64/chrome-wrapper:check_executable() {
grep_results.txt:chrome/linux-149.0.7827.155/chrome-linux64/chrome-wrapper:    out=$(file $(readlink -f $1) 2> /dev/null)
grep_results.txt:chrome/linux-149.0.7827.155/chrome-linux64/chrome-wrapper:    echo $out | grep -qs "ELF 32-bit LSB"
grep_results.txt:chrome/linux-149.0.7827.155/chrome-linux64/chrome-wrapper:    if [ $? = 0 ]; then
grep_results.txt:chrome/linux-149.0.7827.155/chrome-linux64/chrome-wrapper:        echo 32
grep_results.txt:chrome/linux-149.0.7827.155/chrome-linux64/chrome-wrapper:        return
grep_results.txt:chrome/linux-149.0.7827.155/chrome-linux64/chrome-wrapper:    fi
grep_results.txt:chrome/linux-149.0.7827.155/chrome-linux64/chrome-wrapper:    echo $out | grep -qs "ELF 64-bit LSB"
grep_results.txt:chrome/linux-149.0.7827.155/chrome-linux64/chrome-wrapper:    if [ $? = 0 ]; then
grep_results.txt:chrome/linux-149.0.7827.155/chrome-linux64/chrome-wrapper:        echo 64
grep_results.txt:chrome/linux-149.0.7827.155/chrome-linux64/chrome-wrapper:        return
grep_results.txt:chrome/linux-149.0.7827.155/chrome-linux64/chrome-wrapper:    fi
grep_results.txt:chrome/linux-149.0.7827.155/chrome-linux64/chrome-wrapper:    echo neither
grep_results.txt:chrome/linux-149.0.7827.155/chrome-linux64/chrome-wrapper:}
grep_results.txt:chrome/linux-149.0.7827.155/chrome-linux64/chrome-wrapper:
grep_results.txt:chrome/linux-149.0.7827.155/chrome-linux64/chrome-wrapper:# Generate a desktop file that will run this script.
grep_results.txt:chrome/linux-149.0.7827.155/chrome-linux64/chrome-wrapper:generate_desktop_file() {
grep_results.txt:chrome/linux-149.0.7827.155/chrome-linux64/chrome-wrapper:    apps="${XDG_DATA_HOME:-$HOME/.local/share}/applications"
grep_results.txt:chrome/linux-149.0.7827.155/chrome-linux64/chrome-wrapper:    mkdir -p "$apps"
grep_results.txt:chrome/linux-149.0.7827.155/chrome-linux64/chrome-wrapper:    cat > "$apps/$DESKTOP.desktop" << EOF
grep_results.txt:chrome/linux-149.0.7827.155/chrome-linux64/chrome-wrapper:[Desktop Entry]
grep_results.txt:chrome/linux-149.0.7827.155/chrome-linux64/chrome-wrapper:Version=1.0
grep_results.txt:chrome/linux-149.0.7827.155/chrome-linux64/chrome-wrapper:Encoding=UTF-8
grep_results.txt:chrome/linux-149.0.7827.155/chrome-linux64/chrome-wrapper:Name=$TITLE
grep_results.txt:chrome/linux-149.0.7827.155/chrome-linux64/chrome-wrapper:Exec=$CHROME_WRAPPER %U
grep_results.txt:chrome/linux-149.0.7827.155/chrome-linux64/chrome-wrapper:Terminal=false
grep_results.txt:chrome/linux-149.0.7827.155/chrome-linux64/chrome-wrapper:Icon=$HERE/product_logo_48.png
grep_results.txt:chrome/linux-149.0.7827.155/chrome-linux64/chrome-wrapper:Type=Application
grep_results.txt:chrome/linux-149.0.7827.155/chrome-linux64/chrome-wrapper:Categories=Application;Network;WebBrowser;
grep_results.txt:chrome/linux-149.0.7827.155/chrome-linux64/chrome-wrapper:MimeType=text/html;text/xml;application/xhtml_xml;
grep_results.txt:chrome/linux-149.0.7827.155/chrome-linux64/chrome-wrapper:EOF
grep_results.txt:chrome/linux-149.0.7827.155/chrome-linux64/chrome-wrapper:}

grep_results.txt:tmplogin/plugins/batch.py:async def prog(c, t, C, h, m, st):
grep_results.txt:tmplogin/plugins/batch.py:    global P
grep_results.txt:tmplogin/plugins/batch.py:    p = c / t * 100
grep_results.txt:tmplogin/plugins/batch.py:    interval = 10 if t >= 100 * 1024 * 1024 else 20 if t >= 50 * 1024 * 1024 else 30 if t >= 10 * 1024 * 1024 else 50
grep_results.txt:tmplogin/plugins/batch.py:    step = int(p // interval) * interval
grep_results.txt:tmplogin/plugins/batch.py:    if m not in P or P[m] != step or p >= 100:
grep_results.txt:tmplogin/plugins/batch.py:        P[m] = step
grep_results.txt:tmplogin/plugins/batch.py:        c_mb = c / (1024 * 1024)
grep_results.txt:tmplogin/plugins/batch.py:        t_mb = t / (1024 * 1024)
grep_results.txt:tmplogin/plugins/batch.py:        bar = '🟢' * int(p / 10) + '🔴' * (10 - int(p / 10))
grep_results.txt:tmplogin/plugins/batch.py:        speed = c / (time.time() - st) / (1024 * 1024) if time.time() > st else 0
grep_results.txt:tmplogin/plugins/batch.py:        eta = time.strftime('%M:%S', time.gmtime((t - c) / (speed * 1024 * 1024))) if speed > 0 else '00:00'
grep_results.txt:tmplogin/plugins/batch.py:        await C.edit_message_text(h, m, f"__**Pyro Handler...**__\n\n{bar}\n\n⚡**__Completed__**: {c_mb:.2f} MB / {t_mb:.2f} MB\n📊 **__Done__**: {p:.2f}%\n🚀 **__Speed__**: {speed:.2f} MB/s\n⏳ **__ETA__**: {eta}\n\n**__Powered by Team SPY__**")
grep_results.txt:tmplogin/plugins/batch.py:        if p >= 100: P.pop(m, None)

grep_results.txt:tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:def progress_callback(done, total, user_id):

grep_results.txt:tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:async def progress_bar(current: int, total: int, ud_type: str, message, start: float):
grep_results.txt:tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:    """
grep_results.txt:tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:    Updates the progress bar for an ongoing process.
grep_results.txt:tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:    """
grep_results.txt:tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:    now = time.time()
grep_results.txt:tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:    diff = now - start
grep_results.txt:tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:    
grep_results.txt:tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:    if round(diff % 10) == 0 or current == total:
grep_results.txt:tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:        percentage = (current * 100) / total
grep_results.txt:tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:        speed = current / diff if diff else 0
grep_results.txt:tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:        elapsed_time = round(diff * 1000)
grep_results.txt:tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:        time_to_completion = round((total - current) / speed) * 1000 if speed else 0
grep_results.txt:tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:        estimated_total_time = elapsed_time + time_to_completion
grep_results.txt:tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:
grep_results.txt:tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:        elapsed_time_str = TimeFormatter(elapsed_time)
grep_results.txt:tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:        estimated_total_time_str = TimeFormatter(estimated_total_time)
grep_results.txt:tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:
grep_results.txt:tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:        progress = "".join(["♦" for _ in range(math.floor(percentage / 10))]) + \
grep_results.txt:tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:                   "".join(["◇" for _ in range(10 - math.floor(percentage / 10))])
grep_results.txt:tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:        
grep_results.txt:tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:        progress_text = progress + PROGRESS_BAR.format(
grep_results.txt:tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:            round(percentage, 2),
grep_results.txt:tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:            humanbytes(current),
grep_results.txt:tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:            humanbytes(total),
grep_results.txt:tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:            humanbytes(speed),
grep_results.txt:tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:            estimated_total_time_str if estimated_total_time_str else "0 s"
grep_results.txt:tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:        )
grep_results.txt:tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:        try:
grep_results.txt:tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:            await message.edit(text=f"{ud_type}\n│ {progress_text}")

grep_results.txt:tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:def humanbytes(size: int) -> str:
grep_results.txt:tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:    """
grep_results.txt:tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:    Converts bytes into a human-readable format.
grep_results.txt:tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:    """
grep_results.txt:tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:    if not size:
grep_results.txt:tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:        return ""
grep_results.txt:tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:    
grep_results.txt:tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:    power = 2**10
grep_results.txt:tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:    units = ['B', 'KB', 'MB', 'GB', 'TB']
grep_results.txt:tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:    n = 0
grep_results.txt:tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:    while size > power and n < len(units) - 1:
grep_results.txt:tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:        size /= power
grep_results.txt:tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:        n += 1
grep_results.txt:tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:    
grep_results.txt:tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:    return f"{round(size, 2)} {units[n]}"
grep_results.txt:tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:
grep_results.txt:tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:def TimeFormatter(milliseconds: int) -> str:
grep_results.txt:tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:    """
grep_results.txt:tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:    Formats milliseconds into a human-readable duration.
grep_results.txt:tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:    """
grep_results.txt:tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:    seconds, milliseconds = divmod(milliseconds, 1000)
grep_results.txt:tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:    minutes, seconds = divmod(seconds, 60)
grep_results.txt:tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:    hours, minutes = divmod(minutes, 60)
grep_results.txt:tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:    days, hours = divmod(hours, 24)
grep_results.txt:tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:    
grep_results.txt:tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:    parts = []
grep_results.txt:tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:    if days: parts.append(f"{days}d")
grep_results.txt:tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:    if hours: parts.append(f"{hours}h")
grep_results.txt:tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:    if minutes: parts.append(f"{minutes}m")
grep_results.txt:tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:    if seconds: parts.append(f"{seconds}s")
grep_results.txt:tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:    if milliseconds: parts.append(f"{milliseconds}ms")
grep_results.txt:tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:    
grep_results.txt:tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:    return ', '.join(parts)

grep_results.txt:tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:def convert(seconds: int) -> str:
grep_results.txt:tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:    """
grep_results.txt:tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:    Converts seconds into HH:MM:SS format.
grep_results.txt:tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:    """
grep_results.txt:tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:    hours, remainder = divmod(seconds, 3600)
grep_results.txt:tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:    minutes, seconds = divmod(remainder, 60)
grep_results.txt:tmplogin/plugins/ytdl.py:    return f"{hours}:{minutes:02d}:{seconds:02d}"

grep_results.txt:tmplogin/plugins/settings.py:async def handle_setreplacement(event, user_id):

grep_results.txt:tmplogin/plugins/settings.py:    if not match:
grep_results.txt:tmplogin/plugins/settings.py:        await event.respond("❌ Invalid format. Usage: 'WORD(s)' 'REPLACEWORD'")

grep_results.txt:tmplogin/plugins/settings.py:        word, replace_word = match.groups()
grep_results.txt:tmplogin/plugins/settings.py:        delete_words = await get_user_data_key(user_id, 'delete_words', [])

grep_results.txt:tmplogin/plugins/settings.py:            await event.respond(f"❌ The word '{word}' is in the delete list and cannot be replaced.")
grep_results.txt:tmplogin/plugins/settings.py:        else:
grep_results.txt:tmplogin/plugins/settings.py:            replacements = await get_user_data_key(user_id, 'replacement_words', {})
grep_results.txt:tmplogin/plugins/settings.py:            replacements[word] = replace_word
grep_results.txt:tmplogin/plugins/settings.py:            await save_user_data(user_id, 'replacement_words', replacements)
grep_results.txt:tmplogin/plugins/settings.py:            await event.respond(f"✅ Replacement saved: '{word}' will be replaced with '{replace_word}'")

grep_results.txt:tmplogin/utils/encrypt.py:from cryptography.hazmat.primitives import hashes as hsh
grep_results.txt:tmplogin/utils/encrypt.py:from cryptography.hazmat.primitives.kdf.pbkdf2 import PBKDF2HMAC as PBK
grep_results.txt:tmplogin/utils/encrypt.py:from cryptography.hazmat.primitives.ciphers import Cipher as Cp, algorithms as alg, modes as md
grep_results.txt:tmplogin/utils/encrypt.py:import base64 as b64

grep_results.txt:tmplogin/utils/encrypt.py:
grep_results.txt:tmplogin/utils/encrypt.py:def dyk(pwd=M1, slt=I1, l=16):
grep_results.txt:tmplogin/utils/encrypt.py:    pw = pwd.encode()
grep_results.txt:tmplogin/utils/encrypt.py:    sl = slt.encode()
grep_results.txt:tmplogin/utils/encrypt.py:    kdf = PBK(
grep_results.txt:tmplogin/utils/encrypt.py:        algorithm=hsh.SHA256(),
grep_results.txt:tmplogin/utils/encrypt.py:        length=l,
grep_results.txt:tmplogin/utils/encrypt.py:        salt=sl,
grep_results.txt:tmplogin/utils/encrypt.py:        iterations=100000,
grep_results.txt:tmplogin/utils/encrypt.py:    )
grep_results.txt:tmplogin/utils/encrypt.py:    return kdf.derive(pw)
grep_results.txt:tmplogin/utils/encrypt.py:
grep_results.txt:tmplogin/utils/encrypt.py:def ecs(s):
grep_results.txt:tmplogin/utils/encrypt.py:    k = dyk()
grep_results.txt:tmplogin/utils/encrypt.py:    n = osy.urandom(12) 
grep_results.txt:tmplogin/utils/encrypt.py:    cp = Cp(alg.AES(k), md.GCM(n))
grep_results.txt:tmplogin/utils/encrypt.py:    enc = cp.encryptor()
grep_results.txt:tmplogin/utils/encrypt.py:    p = s.encode()
grep_results.txt:tmplogin/utils/encrypt.py:    ct = enc.update(p) + enc.finalize()
grep_results.txt:tmplogin/utils/encrypt.py:    tg = enc.tag
grep_results.txt:tmplogin/utils/encrypt.py:    encd = b64.b64encode(n + tg + ct).decode()
grep_results.txt:tmplogin/utils/encrypt.py:    return encd
grep_results.txt:tmplogin/utils/encrypt.py:
grep_results.txt:tmplogin/utils/encrypt.py:def dcs(ed):
grep_results.txt:tmplogin/utils/encrypt.py:    k = dyk()
grep_results.txt:tmplogin/utils/encrypt.py:    dat = b64.b64decode(ed.encode())
grep_results.txt:tmplogin/utils/encrypt.py:    n = dat[:12]
grep_results.txt:tmplogin/utils/encrypt.py:    tg = dat[12:28]
grep_results.txt:tmplogin/utils/encrypt.py:    ct = dat[28:]
grep_results.txt:tmplogin/utils/encrypt.py:    cp = Cp(alg.AES(k), md.GCM(n, tg))
grep_results.txt:tmplogin/utils/encrypt.py:    dec = cp.decryptor()
grep_results.txt:tmplogin/utils/encrypt.py:    res = dec.update(ct) + dec.finalize()
grep_results.txt:tmplogin/utils/encrypt.py:    return res.decode()

grep_results.txt:tmplogin/utils/func.py:    try:
grep_results.txt:tmplogin/utils/func.py:        def _extract_metadata():
grep_results.txt:tmplogin/utils/func.py:            try:
grep_results.txt:tmplogin/utils/func.py:                vcap = cv2.VideoCapture(file_path)
grep_results.txt:tmplogin/utils/func.py:                if not vcap.isOpened():
grep_results.txt:tmplogin/utils/func.py:                    return default_values
grep_results.txt:tmplogin/utils/func.py:
grep_results.txt:tmplogin/utils/func.py:                width = round(vcap.get(cv2.CAP_PROP_FRAME_WIDTH))

grep_results.txt:tmplogin/utils/func.py:
grep_results.txt:tmplogin/utils/func.py:                duration = round(frame_count / fps)

grep_results.txt:tmplogin/utils/func.py:                    return default_values
grep_results.txt:tmplogin/utils/func.py:
grep_results.txt:tmplogin/utils/func.py:                vcap.release()

grep_results.txt:tmplogin/LICENSE:into a dwelling.  In determining whether a product is a consumer product,

grep_results.txt:tmplogin/LICENSE:of the particular user or of the way in which the particular user

grep_results.txt:tmplogin/LICENSE:commercial, industrial or non-consumer uses, unless such uses represent
grep_results.txt:tmplogin/LICENSE:the only significant mode of use of the product.
